[**June 3, 1781:** Jack Jouett, a lesser-known figure in American history who played a vital role during the Revolutionary War. Dubbed the "Paul Revere of the South," Jouett embarked on a daring midnight ride to warn Thomas Jefferson and the Virginia legislature of the approaching British troops. His heroic act helped save important leaders and ultimately influenced the outcome of the war.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=fd9cc865ab2a450f97309ff0788547c4&_e=xOMhX31eDK-KKJLnE7NdC-lyhUcJjBxCtDeenPgEeIqLCzmEIvENspD-EYPgNfeAQWKEk2RtM91M6mhyLtukWu6qDuv1CA-VBOre235-I0A6VNz3SLKdovMvLx1BhzTO2J7bxHTJl-klUfZsAhg8Ji45BBOdEXGTCVcnYZDAzKyJwLQVcfJqddMKSJZbrV9aFIslNPHoxAOcf7nnsP9XHs7Ca3DCWt8m6oZmXRz00N0Xxu2YJoSTAnd4-yj3HWSzm8B6SNNzIcUayFN1HFUo3g69XFk1PAtyd-ANH89PQv4%3D) **Source -[history.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=fd9cc865ab2a450f97309ff0788547c4&_e=xOMhX31eDK-KKJLnE7NdC-lyhUcJjBxCtDeenPgEeIqLCzmEIvENspD-EYPgNfeAQWKEk2RtM91M6mhyLtukWu6qDuv1CA-VBOre235-I0A6VNz3SLKdovMvLx1BhzTOYUiuTbe8TqpoDloiUjrepdpKHZzqX8-IFCFdSNBxZLH5-QAoOJ8wcmBtpFVyVi5VEWoSLSztoQ9K06KcL74-9LpJMtInBYq5BAda5YJDnCThIThXwmxb0dBu2vn9VKMr5aqd-B4dxEh8xqTg2eR5vG_EKMko89mjT50Y6caxQEA%3D)**

[**June 3, 1864:** The second battle of Cold Harbor commenced on June 3, 1864, following the Union's hard-won victory at Spotsylvania Court House. Union General Ulysses S. Grant encountered entrenched Confederate troops led by General Robert E. Lee near Richmond. After nine days of intense fighting, the Union lost 7,000 soldiers while the Confederates suffered 1,500 casualties. Grant proceeded to besiege Petersburg, marking the final major siege of the war. Eventually, Confederate forces relinquished Petersburg and Richmond on April 2, 1865.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=fd9cc865ab2a450f97309ff0788547c4&_e=xOMhX31eDK-KKJLnE7NdC-lyhUcJjBxCtDeenPgEeIqNxi4Vb1LJiW7F0e9ZeLlQjp8TPQajxL0wVksn30HZETeIVJwV7vh4nnZGuESEXvdAiIjIbNmi-dM7jv3enU9Ga99HKEL-eDWQjd6wcT4mr-isAovTZ0p7vR0kwdi26BtlhB3jo59nTNBk67Ihi57gmqFAHL3Tp7Fc2ZIiBhOUs_0sUY76PNuwkeLZCiObdsGdK4zA5uXKS-JbxwVbNvQj) **Source -[loc.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=fd9cc865ab2a450f97309ff0788547c4&_e=xOMhX31eDK-KKJLnE7NdC-lyhUcJjBxCtDeenPgEeIqNxi4Vb1LJiW7F0e9ZeLlQjp8TPQajxL0wVksn30HZETeIVJwV7vh4nnZGuESEXvcpv89y7DBtZuT4gzLBh5oqbigPKTzbrnj9HTCXYLtY6zbPtuCqz4RzooGS0He--BI1vJzxffG1f_ESKD3gA7ShDypxv7oj62y7vUKkBe9BfqwzRoUf_qiw2oIinlEPgYUeCoDi6CtJj9entGp03Bjb)**

[**June 3, 2016:** Muhammad Ali, was a renowned boxer who became an influential figure both in and out of the ring. Ali's career spanned three decades, during which he achieved numerous victories and became the heavyweight champion of the world three times. Ali was known for his outspokenness, activism, and refusal to serve in the Vietnam War. His contributions to the civil rights movement and his impact on popular culture solidified his status as one of the most iconic and inspiring athletes in history.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=fd9cc865ab2a450f97309ff0788547c4&_e=xOMhX31eDK-KKJLnE7NdC-lyhUcJjBxCtDeenPgEeIq6w02E1x6cwRQ98rxYHqYMFeZRyg7dna_M-BWRyoVx7tbYVd_TJBWhCkd3mbU5VdYgMoD0hCp7Khvd5kkjwTQdg4UtEFT_PmWObFBdG1GteFGKmcOILPZyNepPCFny4Xms-h0LzwE59aE84moQE8UA8Ng2GoGhZt9FZrVYjh7PJBFKZS2qkjAY4F92kyE50wT3pOTF74lhIewcpqzikUek-iPzXbDgJBTYVH0uDY1ZV6GNQJjycyYxP9Vhb5WtP2k%3D) **Source -[britannica.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=fd9cc865ab2a450f97309ff0788547c4&_e=xOMhX31eDK-KKJLnE7NdC-lyhUcJjBxCtDeenPgEeIq6w02E1x6cwRQ98rxYHqYMFeZRyg7dna_M-BWRyoVx7tbYVd_TJBWhCkd3mbU5VdYgMoD0hCp7Khvd5kkjwTQdg4UtEFT_PmWObFBdG1GteNuGs1puhLj28sJrgzau7oesqPkAMSVcDbPQ7nDwDHbu1z-wvaciKpsLOtW8G5ZzDZEpzD4cQBUzcp-DJRuYkRc1N11ejno5VWaNqjt5a8U23b3ZdzciJBUMtVC6nzJaIvOr0qNciNYJ9aJM-liWX-Y%3D)**

subject: The Reality of Violent Crime
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/23ab70e6c9e8/failed-border-policies-threaten-rural-america-12607947?e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| |
---
| In 2014, Mississippi enacted criminal justice reforms aimed at reducing prison populations. The Mississippi legislature, inspired by the data collected by the Corrections and Criminal Justice Task Force, passed H.B. 585. At the time, Gov. Phil Bryant heralded the reforms as a win for public safety and fiscal responsibility. Time, however, has not been kind to the reforms of 2014. Unfortunately, the application of H.B. 585 has evolved into a catch-and-release program that allows career criminals to operate in our communities. It is time to redress the reforms of 2014, this time focusing on honest sentencing, curtailing recidivism, and proactive policing.
Prior to criminal justice reform, the Mississippi prison system was, at minimum, bloated, perhaps even busting at the seams. At the same time, violent crime in DeSoto County, was remarkably lower, falling from an all-time high in 2009 to an all-time low in 2012. However, in the two years following the implementation of the reforms, DeSoto County saw a 600% increase in violent crime, when compared to two years prior to reform. The criminal justice reforms of 2014 undid all of the momentum dedicated police officers had worked tirelessly to build. As a result, a significant gap has emerged — and continues to widen — between violent crimes committed and violent cases closed. Prior to reform, investigations almost always led to indictments. Now, less than 50% of DeSoto County’s violent crimes are closed. Police departments have become inundated, and thus overwhelmed, with crime committed by repeat offenders that should still be in jail. As the volume of crime increases, the time to investigate individual crimes decreases, which leads to fewer indictments. Fewer indictments allows more criminals to remain on the streets, thus making the crime problem self-perpetuating.
To right the proverbial ship, it is important to focus on three key areas: honest sentencing, deterring recidivism, and transitioning to a proactive model of law enforcement. Honest sentencing deters initial criminal activity, as well as recidivist criminal behavior, because it shows criminals that they will pay for their crimes. Moreover, utilizing the habitual offender statutes in the criminal code could substantially reduce the number of career criminals on the streets, which would allow law enforcement officers to more efficiently address the remaining criminal element.
The current catch-and-release philosophy has been proven to be ineffective. During a time when state prison populations have declined by more than 25%, DeSoto county has seen a 7-fold increase in violent crime — from 53 violent crimes committed in 2018, to 389 in 2022. In that same timeframe, there has been a 630% increase in cases that have not been closed. This increase in recidivist crime has created a massive, yet undeserved, burden on law enforcement officers. Departments do not have the manpower to proactively police neighborhoods because they are overwhelmed with the myriad of offenses committed by recidivist criminals.
It is time to recognize Mississippi’s criminal justice reforms, while well intentioned, have not been successful. They have created more problems than they have solved. To successfully deter crime, officers must be afforded the opportunity to police proactively, not reactively. However, officers cannot police proactively if they are forced to chase criminals that should already be in jail. It is time to replace catch-and-release with honest sentencing. It is time to empower officers so that they can police proactively instead of reactively. This is the path to a safer DeSoto County, and it is time to make a change.
---
| | |
---
| Matthew Barton
_Sent from my iPhone_

clean_body: | | | | | | In 2014, Mississippi enacted criminal justice reforms aimed at reducing prison populations. The Mississippi legislature, inspired by the data collected by the Corrections and Criminal Justice Task Force, passed H.B. 585. At the time, Gov. Phil Bryant heralded the reforms as a win for public safety and fiscal responsibility. Time, however, has not been kind to the reforms of 2014. Unfortunately, the application of H.B. 585 has evolved into a catch-and-release program that allows career criminals to operate in our communities. It is time to redress the reforms of 2014, this time focusing on honest sentencing, curtailing recidivism, and proactive policing. Prior to criminal justice reform, the Mississippi prison system was, at minimum, bloated, perhaps even busting at the seams. At the same time, violent crime in DeSoto County, was remarkably lower, falling from an all-time high in 2009 to an all-time low in 2012. However, in the two years following the implementation of the reforms, DeSoto County saw a 600% increase in violent crime, when compared to two years prior to reform. The criminal justice reforms of 2014 undid all of the momentum dedicated police officers had worked tirelessly to build. As a result, a significant gap has emerged — and continues to widen — between violent crimes committed and violent cases closed. Prior to reform, investigations almost always led to indictments. Now, less than 50% of DeSoto County’s violent crimes are closed. Police departments have become inundated, and thus overwhelmed, with crime committed by repeat offenders that should still be in jail. As the volume of crime increases, the time to investigate individual crimes decreases, which leads to fewer indictments. Fewer indictments allows more criminals to remain on the streets, thus making the crime problem self-perpetuating. To right the proverbial ship, it is important to focus on three key areas: honest sentencing, deterring recidivism, and transitioning to a proactive model of law enforcement. Honest sentencing deters initial criminal activity, as well as recidivist criminal behavior, because it shows criminals that they will pay for their crimes. Moreover, utilizing the habitual offender statutes in the criminal code could substantially reduce the number of career criminals on the streets, which would allow law enforcement officers to more efficiently address the remaining criminal element. The current catch-and-release philosophy has been proven to be ineffective. During a time when state prison populations have declined by more than 25%, DeSoto county has seen a 7-fold increase in violent crime — from 53 violent crimes committed in 2018, to 389 in 2022. In that same timeframe, there has been a 630% increase in cases that have not been closed. This increase in recidivist crime has created a massive, yet undeserved, burden on law enforcement officers. Departments do not have the manpower to proactively police neighborhoods because they are overwhelmed with the myriad of offenses committed by recidivist criminals. It is time to recognize Mississippi’s criminal justice reforms, while well intentioned, have not been successful. They have created more problems than they have solved. To successfully deter crime, officers must be afforded the opportunity to police proactively, not reactively. However, officers cannot police proactively if they are forced to chase criminals that should already be in jail. It is time to replace catch-and-release with honest sentencing. It is time to empower officers so that they can police proactively instead of reactively. This is the path to a safer DeSoto County, and it is time to make a change. | | | | Matthew Barton Sent from my iPhone PS: If you believe you’ve received this email message in error - or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team for any reason - | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © | Matthew Barton for District Attorney | All rights reserved. body:
Join me and former Congressman Cresent Hardy on June 5th >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/70b7ca8967a1/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-9585665?e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=0d26854fb8&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| Peter,
---
| | I am writing to personally invite you to join me at the Mesquite Meet and Greet on June 5th. This gathering will be a celebration of the patriotic spirit that defines our community and our great state of Nevada.

The Mesquite Meet and Greet will take place at Falcon Ridge Golf Course, located in Mesquite, NV.
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=491ac6c7f4&e=273c9a71fb)
---
|
During the event, I am honored to have Former Congressman Cresent Hardy introduce me. I will share my vision for Nevada's future and the principles that guide me in my campaign. I am also eager to hear your thoughts and ideas as we work together to shape the path forward for our great state and country.

Feel free to bring along your family, friends, and neighbors because, as the saying goes, "united we stand, divided we fall." Together, we'll strengthen the fabric of our community and ignite a spirit of unity that will propel us forward.

---
| [RSVP HERE >>](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=576a77b75a&e=273c9a71fb "RSVP HERE >>")
---
| Thank you for joining me on my journey for Congress. I look forward to meeting you in person.

For Nevada,

David Flippo, Lt. Col. (USAF Ret.)
Candidate for U.S. Congress, NV-4

clean_body: Join me and former Congressman Cresent Hardy on June 5th >> | | | | | | Peter, | | I am writing to personally invite you to join me at the Mesquite Meet and Greet on June 5th. This gathering will be a celebration of the patriotic spirit that defines our community and our great state of Nevada. The Mesquite Meet and Greet will take place at Falcon Ridge Golf Course, located in Mesquite, NV. | | During the event, I am honored to have Former Congressman Cresent Hardy introduce me. I will share my vision for Nevada's future and the principles that guide me in my campaign. I am also eager to hear your thoughts and ideas as we work together to shape the path forward for our great state and country. Feel free to bring along your family, friends, and neighbors because, as the saying goes, "united we stand, divided we fall." Together, we'll strengthen the fabric of our community and ignite a spirit of unity that will propel us forward. | "RSVP HERE >>" | Thank you for joining me on my journey for Congress. I look forward to meeting you in person. For Nevada, David Flippo, Lt. Col. (USAF Ret.) Candidate for U.S. Congress, NV-4 | | | | | | | | | | | | "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada" | | Copyright © 2023 Committee To Elect David Flippo, All rights reserved.

name: Your America
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven’t seen one of these - YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven’t seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25670%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wg0UVN08sGjlfZZg9QLQ1Q&sysid=1) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a ‘Reverse ATM’. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25670%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wg0UVN08sGjlfZZg9QLQ1Q&sysid=1) They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange ‘reverse ATMs.’ And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971\. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> ** “My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short.” **
To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. clean_body: You probably haven’t seen one of these - YET. | Dear Reader, You probably haven’t seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a ‘Reverse ATM’. According to the New York Post , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange ‘reverse ATMs.’ And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971\. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says: “My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short.” To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. Regards, Maria Bonaventura Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics P.S. The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. Your America News Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The truth about America’s Christian heritage
body:
Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu4cvhnsmsf7uc23gco655qj41ekrq2m6ihk8248_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm4o70s9h2bs)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I've written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you'll appreciate.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi92qck5kethgan796v7uijmmonc1enrii6bfoho_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm4o70s9h2bs)
---
| | I would love for you to read this book and discover the truth about our nation's Christian heritage. As a token of appreciation for any gift you can make to Pathway to Victory today, we'll send you a copy of the book. You can secure your copy by donating here: [https://ptv.org/donate/america-is-a-christian-nation-by-dr-robert-jeffress/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z81da101k0rc36f518cukqq7i5tphhgf8b10tld8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm4o70s9h2bs)

Your donation will be matched dollar-for-dollar thanks to a $500,000 matching challenge that ends on July 4th.

As believers, we must preserve America's unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. By understanding our nation's Christian roots, we can work to bring our country back to its founding principles. At the end of my book, I provide suggestions for how to do just that.

I hope you'll consider donating to _Pathway to Victory_ and receiving your copy of _America Is a Christian Nation_ so you can know without a doubt that the foundation of our country was solidly established in the principles of the Bible.

Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

name: Rand Paul
subject: Politicians will not save us
body:
The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zq8011mlhqhsngvqeacgv6v26aao88j4d6smh6g8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm4o73c1h2bs)

Friend,

I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal freedoms it upholds. **Do you want to know something important I 've learned? **

Politicians will not save us.

The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. _Politics is downstream from culture_. Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution.

**Which is why I am supporting the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE):** FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility.

In fact, the Foundation for Economic Education has launched "FEE In the Classroom."

It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teach young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

As thousands of young Americans come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom workshops, their most frequently asked question afterwards is : "_why haven 't I heard these ideas before_?"

You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: _America 's public schools don't teach our nation's founding principles anymore_. But FEE is changing this--and they are doing it in classrooms and virtual classrooms across the country.

[_**I am PERSONALLY supporting FEE In the Classroom and am asking all of my supporters to contribute or even sponsor a FEE In the Classroom program. Please click here to contribute $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $10. **_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zra98gink8epntbr9fa461uu9rus8qp2absdcrco_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm4o73c1h2bs)

[_**Help more high school and college students learn about free markets, entrepreneurship, and our Founding Principles by supporting FEE In the Classroom!**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3jdusmrcv63cv0oa6qvgdc6jklnkjc406g3vdgo_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm4o73c1h2bs)

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5a5kc8drcvs41ir60ji8l4rv7ibokh77tabe690_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm4o73c1h2bs)

**_Let me tell you more about FEE In the Classroom and why you should support this essential program and FEE 's efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom_.**

It's no secret the Radical Left, Cancel Culture, and big government have teamed up to indoctrinate our nation's youth into embracing socialism.

The sad truth is that free market capitalism, the history of our Founding Fathers, entrepreneurship, and are NOT being taught in high schools or college campuses across the country.

FEE's President, Zilvinas Silenas, knows this more than anyone... Zilvinas once lived under the Soviet Union's Communist rule in Lithuania. He's now made it his life's mission to educate young people about the dangers of socialism and how free markets and free people solve problems.

Trust me... if some of my colleagues in the U.S. Senate attended a FEE In the Classroom teaching, we would not be the same mess we are in today.

**Here is our goal:** I am trying to help FEE raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund FEE In the Classroom workshops for over 1,000 students. I hope you will consider making a donation of ANY size by using one of the links below:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zam393bcdi6gcquk7g9frf19csqadpu89tot2kd0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm4o73c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgph2e01ho39dfev0fbtqej77gebug1848n3mrlg_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm4o73c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztea3guohjjn6j4hrtb56vuo7rjd4vf0khcq23l0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm4o73c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfj0q9g99rui7o5palh8aelgp7ig8nivhrdibpjg_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm4o73c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrvfh2vqrfraq59obdvuamjcbjleg6la1rof5v68_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm4o73c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmeqb990akskaj5l026r3h3175emjltpqkt2lcr8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm4o73c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhcnqhinvepilpfqphu3rs8irk71r9i2krnsg2n8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm4o73c1h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>> **_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2za67eoijufdpsbol20k7q15dm3gm6b9tgfj8hrk8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm4o73c1h2bs)

Friend, I'm sure you share my frustration with the direction of our country. We cannot count on our government for fiscal restraint, nor our schools or universities for any fair argument for free-market ideas.

[_**Today I invite you to join me, and thousands of other committed Americans, in supporting FEE and contributing to the economic education of the young men and women who will lead our nation tomorrow.**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbl988ctk78n8gsco76u3nq4nemkav872rrguj90_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm4o73c1h2bs)

I hope I can count on your support and see your name on the list of FEE's newest supporters.

Thank you for everything,

Senator Rand Paul

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb3jhvmbbkkrc3vlsdmd4hha9lp8vaaktf2m0530_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm4o73c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p34cdg6cp724no)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zokfb5jgpe1ajiu09uhaotsvdlreathrd99toqno_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm4o73c1h2bs)_

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgr26g6lbrf5hsu3s4qru2o0747g38rn215bqs0g_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm6ob4cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zebfvrh77i8md2uelf556alpbt4obhega368h8t0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm6ob4cdh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsmfvf1sodvof7aas3l6m4vtufh8rfsr0fdvcaq8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm6ob4cdh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTU1LWQ1MzYyZWUzMDFiYjQ2MTFiOThhNTYxZGQ3MmE3YjY3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL25yc2MvYWUtZWNvbm9taWMtaW1wYWN0LXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWFlX25yc2NfQUUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNjAyX25hX2Vjb25vbWljaW1wYWN0c3VydmV5LXYxX0FFX25yc2NfbnJzYyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1mdW5kcmFpc2luZyZ1dG1fdGVybT1BRV9TUE8wNjA0MjAyMyZhbW91bnQ9MTAwJnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/cClGcR9dcn5icpWC9B-RGQ)
Fellow American,

Since 2020, Joe Biden and the Democrats have ignored the will of the people to pass unprecedented TRILLIONS in new spending for their liberal special interest agenda...

...Their reckless use of taxpayer dollars and their left wing priorities are destroying our savings, crushing our stock portfolios, and wiping out the value of our earnings.

Have you been following the news out of Washington, D.C. surrounding the “debt ceiling” and the debate over more massive, debt-fueled federal spending? We are finally getting to shine a spotlight on the critically important question of our country’s economic situation -- and the direction we should be taking as a nation.

But the Debt Ceiling deal is just a band-aid, a short-term claw-back of some of the Democrats’ wasteful spending.

To permanently change the direction of our nation – to literally SAVE our country from liberals who are spending us into a depression – We need to elect a Republican Senate Majority that can give a new Republican President and our Republican House Majority the leverage to pass meaningful reforms and spending cuts.

That’s why the **National Republican Senatorial Committee** (NRSC), **[is reaching out to grassroots conservatives like you for your input on how the policies of the Biden-Democrats have affected you, your family and your community.](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTU1LWQ1MzYyZWUzMDFiYjQ2MTFiOThhNTYxZGQ3MmE3YjY3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL25yc2MvYWUtZWNvbm9taWMtaW1wYWN0LXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWFlX25yc2NfQUUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNjAyX25hX2Vjb25vbWljaW1wYWN0c3VydmV5LXYxX0FFX25yc2NfbnJzYyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1mdW5kcmFpc2luZyZ1dG1fdGVybT1BRV9TUE8wNjA0MjAyMyZhbW91bnQ9MTAwJnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/gBzm2OCgWvtMFjVz4rOt3A)**

Please **[take just a few moments right now to complete our 2023 Biden Economic Impact Survey](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTU1LWQ1MzYyZWUzMDFiYjQ2MTFiOThhNTYxZGQ3MmE3YjY3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL25yc2MvYWUtZWNvbm9taWMtaW1wYWN0LXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWFlX25yc2NfQUUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNjAyX25hX2Vjb25vbWljaW1wYWN0c3VydmV5LXYxX0FFX25yc2NfbnJzYyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1mdW5kcmFpc2luZyZ1dG1fdGVybT1BRV9TUE8wNjA0MjAyMyZhbW91bnQ9MTAwJnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/V24GVXrIJyo1tVFEPZ-OxA)** and let us know where you stand on the budget, spending, taxes and the national debt.
Fellow American, as you well know, Joe Biden and the Democrats have embarked on an unprecedented course of deficit spending when they had control of both Chambers of Congress and the White House in 2020-2022.

The Democrats seized upon the confusion and urgency of 2020 Covid-19 response to try to “normalize” emergency spending, seeing it as an opportunity to shower their leftist special interests with an astounding multi-trillion dollar spending spree that brought the highest inflation rates in 40 years, wiping out years of retirement savings for millions of Americans and driving up the cost of living.
**[Where do YOU Stand on the Biden Democrats’ Spending and Debt? Take the Biden Economic Impact Survey and Let Us Know NOW!](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTU1LWQ1MzYyZWUzMDFiYjQ2MTFiOThhNTYxZGQ3MmE3YjY3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL25yc2MvYWUtZWNvbm9taWMtaW1wYWN0LXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWFlX25yc2NfQUUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNjAyX25hX2Vjb25vbWljaW1wYWN0c3VydmV5LXYxX0FFX25yc2NfbnJzYyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1mdW5kcmFpc2luZyZ1dG1fdGVybT1BRV9TUE8wNjA0MjAyMyZhbW91bnQ9MTAwJnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/m_AF7Kx0mOn1f8IB6_osCw)**
Fellow American, we need to know where conservatives stand on pivotal questions of spending and debt so we can best help our GOP Senate candidates form effective, aggressive campaign messages that rally voters behind them. By working together, we can erase the Chuck Schumer Democrats’ narrow one-seat advantage in the U.S. Senate and elect Republicans to the Senate to form a new Republican Majority that listens to the people and fights for your interests.
That’s why we’re counting on you **[to take just a few moments to answer some critically important questions](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTU1LWQ1MzYyZWUzMDFiYjQ2MTFiOThhNTYxZGQ3MmE3YjY3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL25yc2MvYWUtZWNvbm9taWMtaW1wYWN0LXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWFlX25yc2NfQUUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNjAyX25hX2Vjb25vbWljaW1wYWN0c3VydmV5LXYxX0FFX25yc2NfbnJzYyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1mdW5kcmFpc2luZyZ1dG1fdGVybT1BRV9TUE8wNjA0MjAyMyZhbW91bnQ9MTAwJnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/y4k9A9hKjq_UJXM0l5Z-vw)** \-- and provide your views on the budgetary battle.

name: 1600 Daily
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4glpubnoj1lf66fcns22g1f8akki5mcju1m9g40_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jmepj4c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeiduvs2o76sva21ho9619kg21528q00cd9c6qr8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jmepj4c3h2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6gvqnpmfs2loe42hlo3vi30sgd7qmghkfl5s3f8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jmepj4c3h2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvh11bbu38gst8dgammr08a06vpjailtj9suf9io_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jmepj4c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chi66o35clh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3a50mqahhbooitenl1dufcpbr1pda0kb96f6aag_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jmepj4c3h2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp1231vil95r12l2225jqu70no6pdq6dbvabl1qo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or0slgeepr6chge49fg)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: What Hemingway said
body:
Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1p1odhpr0nv5m3dgu5o2ap8ljkuqbtgvjivts7g_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm1oj2cth2bs)
---
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| |
Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name. It’s _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we’re working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America’s greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, “****Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** ”](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6lvsa615hqfboe3dcmhu92ibmgnvf1vig09bg50_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm1oj2cth2bs) Twain’s realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. name: American Defense News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z62fdroc50k029asd1b9j4chcr25nit2fpo42abo_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm9p32cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjo34asej600fktg54d3ourpv5s7tobgbh0v25c0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm9p32cth2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z43q1cgg028tp97fjbmm9rciihelcso6vvcgqns8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm9p32cth2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: ICYMI News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0r02e325eli1lmmav7reva814u3pu22hu8jk5g8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm9p32cth2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjbvgtb8k4sfat2fmpjsum9a7plmtla8bcigc6q0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm9p32cth2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmmk6uhp75imi5osgh59shblplqcv33rk82nec7g_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3jm9p32cth2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Get your kids off TikTok and into books
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
TikTok (and all social media, for that matter) correlates with higher anxiety and attention issues in kids.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqqsd8dou0rqmqj4n8p09flj3edcfvijltosgj38_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3ge0o31chh2bs "Tuttle Twins")

Friend,

TikTok (and all social media, for that matter) correlates with higher anxiety and attention issues in kids.

Mindless scrolling keeps kids engaged and has even led to some dangerous trends.

However, adults concerned about what kids are doing is nothing new.

When I grew up, video games were a major concern. Video games were seen as mindless and addictive and were even blamed for the Columbine shooting by some people.

As I became a parent, I wanted my kids to learn about freedom, our history, and personal responsibility, but in an entertaining way. I wanted books that would keep them engaged while learning about the ideas of liberty, free market economics, and the dangers of socialism.

I decided I had to create my own fun educational experience for my kids. So I began writing the Tuttle Twins children's books nearly a decade ago!

And I never dreamed of how successful it would become. We've distributed nearly 5 MILLION copies across the country!
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z68306o89dt92ocqf22n0v754v6rc1pki63u5iog_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3ge0o31chh2bs)
Here's why I'm emailing you.

I share your concerns about social media. Instead of banning things, I am in the business of creating positive alternatives you can point your children to.

It costs roughly $10 to ship a book.

**I aim to distribute another 1 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins books to libraries, schools, and families this year. It 's an ambitious goal, and I must raise $100,000 this month to stay on track. Can you donate $10 or more to distribute a copy of the Tuttle Twins?**
**_All online donations are being matched right now. So your $10 becomes $20_!**
[Donate $10 (x2 Match) >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0q6h0ctcqdv5204m7ap1q7df87q9j7d1j35emq8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3ge0o31chh2bs)

[Donate $500 (x2 Match) >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqs9h6r1sp7fqjvs7gv24j8vhem4d343gucv3m9o_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3ge0o31chh2bs)
[Donate $1,000 (x2 Match) >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmual1p4ef43bov2c4il2q820ei8vkkceb8r7i60_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3ge0o31chh2bs)

The Tuttle Twins teach kids about personal responsibility, freedom, the rule of law, free market economics, and more.

And the best part, kids love them!

While there are many books to teach these ideas to adults, there has been a profound void in the children's literature market. The Tuttle Twins series closes the gap, helping parents convey the principles of freedom to their kids in a fun way.

Each book in this series focuses on a different aspect of the principles of a free society: free markets, competition, individual rights, the non-aggression principle, personal responsibility, protectionism, and a variety of other issues--all boiled down to core concepts that children of different ages can easily grasp.

[Please donate $10 or more today and have your contribution will be MATCHED! You can double your impact in bringing pro-liberty education to families >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp8520stkbpgb60v9q51l9l0b1no61vqf7v8k408_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3ge0o31chh2bs)

Lastly, I want to share with you our biggest compliment ever. It's from CNN! They called us "right-wing children's entertainment."

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z82pi7mbeer43ktq8pmhjd3cmvrd93jcdpgv2cs8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3ge0o31chh2bs)
I am counting on you to help me distribute 1 MILLION copies. Children's libraries are full of all kinds of books (some shouldn't even be in there). Why should they not have access to pro-liberty books?

I don't have woke billionaires behind me. I can't rely on the media to be friendly towards our books. I depend on your support to get these books into the hands of kids.

Thank you,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
President, Libertas Institute

Get to know Connor Boyack

Connor Boyack founded Libertas Institute in 2011 and serves as its president. Named one of Utah's most politically influential people by The Salt Lake Tribune, Connor's leadership has led to changing over 100 laws on issues ranging from privacy and government transparency to property rights and education.

A public speaker and author of 40 books, he is best known for the Tuttle Twins books, a children's series introducing young readers to economic, political, and civic principles. The books have sold nearly 5 million copies and have now been turned into a cartoon, also named The Tuttle Twins, for which he serves as executive producer.

clean_body: TikTok (and all social media, for that matter) correlates with higher anxiety and attention issues in kids. "Tuttle Twins" Friend, TikTok (and all social media, for that matter) correlates with higher anxiety and attention issues in kids. Mindless scrolling keeps kids engaged and has even led to some dangerous trends. However, adults concerned about what kids are doing is nothing new. When I grew up, video games were a major concern. Video games were seen as mindless and addictive and were even blamed for the Columbine shooting by some people. As I became a parent, I wanted my kids to learn about freedom, our history, and personal responsibility, but in an entertaining way. I wanted books that would keep them engaged while learning about the ideas of liberty, free market economics, and the dangers of socialism. I decided I had to create my own fun educational experience for my kids. So I began writing the Tuttle Twins children's books nearly a decade ago! And I never dreamed of how successful it would become. We've distributed nearly 5 MILLION copies across the country! Here's why I'm emailing you. I share your concerns about social media. Instead of banning things, I am in the business of creating positive alternatives you can point your children to. It costs roughly $10 to ship a book. I aim to distribute another 1 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins books to libraries, schools, and families this year. It 's an ambitious goal, and I must raise $100,000 this month to stay on track. Can you donate $10 or more to distribute a copy of the Tuttle Twins? All online donations are being matched right now. So your $10 becomes $20! The Tuttle Twins teach kids about personal responsibility, freedom, the rule of law, free market economics, and more. And the best part, kids love them! While there are many books to teach these ideas to adults, there has been a profound void in the children's literature market. The Tuttle Twins series closes the gap, helping parents convey the principles of freedom to their kids in a fun way. Each book in this series focuses on a different aspect of the principles of a free society: free markets, competition, individual rights, the non-aggression principle, personal responsibility, protectionism, and a variety of other issues--all boiled down to core concepts that children of different ages can easily grasp. Lastly, I want to share with you our biggest compliment ever. It's from CNN! They called us "right-wing children's entertainment." I am counting on you to help me distribute 1 MILLION copies. Children's libraries are full of all kinds of books (some shouldn't even be in there). Why should they not have access to pro-liberty books? All online donations are being matched. Please send your generous support today by selecting an amount below to help me raise $100,000 this month. I don't have woke billionaires behind me. I can't rely on the media to be friendly towards our books. I depend on your support to get these books into the hands of kids. Thank you, Connor Boyack Author, Tuttle Twins President, Libertas Institute Get to know Connor Boyack Connor Boyack founded Libertas Institute in 2011 and serves as its president. Named one of Utah's most politically influential people by The Salt Lake Tribune, Connor's leadership has led to changing over 100 laws on issues ranging from privacy and government transparency to property rights and education. A public speaker and author of 40 books, he is best known for the Tuttle Twins books, a children's series introducing young readers to economic, political, and civic principles. The books have sold nearly 5 million copies and have now been turned into a cartoon, also named The Tuttle Twins, for which he serves as executive producer. Paid for by Libertas Institute GOP Presidential 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: American Action News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn8rt06eluqrcuoftguulb2mp7ceiv9k9tdrd5so_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3ge0o35c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zga95lfj67qfjpro8lrm655uua5iegl80abmjn78_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3ge0o35c1h2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6s9tmd2v93udsgkn3dvo2lk72uqp49aecvgk3n8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3ge0o35c1h2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4gsmp6g7ct08fsghios7t3be5s6mmct84j1vbio_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3ge0o35c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34chhm0or4s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9ahlsm9isqlngl2psbbi5s06od37jjt5rgsaq98_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3ge0o35c1h2bs)_

name: American Defense News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z62m40prhpg48529dnttvbpjpamjluqdhqm2cvc8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3geaob1cph2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl6tiusj7c0kd1q5bu8pdhdb5kmbqi1lo04b5sd8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3geaob1cph2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm7pf5jcakmg4mi60utmbb2nfauu7fm0njf85lgo_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3geaob1cph2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

body:

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T25cd0427-7db7-4283-855b-d1b2ef1e2190/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._

But Ted Cruz isn’t going down without a fight. It’s clear this will be one of the most expensive races in the country, and we’re counting on your grassroots support to make sure Colin has the resources he needs to defeat Ted Cruz. [Please, will you rush $10 or more to split between our campaign and Blue Amp Action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2310c6d1-8f76-4923-bc37-b4a2f5f09e8a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ before our midnight fundraising deadline to help Colin beat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3157f260-12cb-46c6-a752-7a108bc696da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, Team Allred

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Don’t let this classic disappear forever
body:
Even if you haven't read the book, you know the name.

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ecf2bde9b9c04dfab365f6c840decbba&_e=avCmDF_nbehOIlCg1CoJOzeUaHu4jMvG5aE-WRXHJkXXPItdDiZiBnlGq8Mu0hcv4XeRu2Lun-JE1WbpbtH-9LKIRZuMun4N6LPwLOp3O0_i6ob2ycQH4nbihp9OO7SCgVYdG4oiBuvsJ6zSbgifFymPqbjUCd_RvnXPHLTeaIDUAPEGveYgSPmBxivUqz8ed9TVp_pdR-LaeRrlGPWj8xkqYwEoHScmEBemZqUg87guxROfIlPbfFeSeSUl3y98ARLS8_0SYqaTR00RLq6ekmQQfU_MCFPdIRtcmFgaoNZEsnCeQ9pteMs3dYWjJLYw6LWdJGDrVV7AwqlMOFCOdkDvvdmGO9EtAvVyN5P5VtIqD77-S310azu9R1eNAs7M_cRaKE3nbJCFnI3VL1Uh1lG3luKO_WBX6hzH9SDcl6iRWI2GmsiQl4gvVkQfxES_)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven't read the book, you know the name. It's _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we're working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America 's greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, "****Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer**_**, **_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** "](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ecf2bde9b9c04dfab365f6c840decbba&_e=avCmDF_nbehOIlCg1CoJOzeUaHu4jMvG5aE-WRXHJkXXPItdDiZiBnlGq8Mu0hcv4XeRu2Lun-JE1WbpbtH-9LKIRZuMun4N6LPwLOp3O0_i6ob2ycQH4nbihp9OO7SCgVYdG4oiBuvsJ6zSbgifFymPqbjUCd_RvnXPHLTeaIDUAPEGveYgSPmBxivUqz8ed9TVp_pdR-LaeRrlGPWj8xkqYwEoHScmEBemZqUg87guxROfIlPbfFeSeSUl3y98ARLS8_0SYqaTR00RLq6ekicv44lZLHELbR3FeMQBgsfMXFBjaLc-4N1ri2Jfpsf_472URPaF9KDGqbGNNCoPdZUTYenlkepJr9Oiulh-Zlo8y8STmM5UQdg-U5PRH7a1655jlbGeWkO_wiuD-_Z7NIkpaRUSRBZyB5JeKmvbnTNP6M0s5ndiuJWR9WYgewMS) Twain's realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I 'd like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ecf2bde9b9c04dfab365f6c840decbba&_e=avCmDF_nbehOIlCg1CoJOzeUaHu4jMvG5aE-WRXHJkXXPItdDiZiBnlGq8Mu0hcv4XeRu2Lun-JE1WbpbtH-9LKIRZuMun4N6LPwLOp3O0_i6ob2ycQH4nbihp9OO7SCgVYdG4oiBuvsJ6zSbgifFymPqbjUCd_RvnXPHLTeaIDUAPEGveYgSPmBxivUqz8ed9TVp_pdR-LaeRrlGPWj8xkqYwEoHScmEBemZqUg87guxROfIlPbfFeSeSUl3y98ARLS8_0SYqaTR00RLq6ekmeO-PzRgS02CjYi_k9rJObJtvYzWKihXdovA8gtCcAjxrUHwSicMbqEyFiWF6OHAe67KHhvZYQN0uCI5i53bjjGF9JyplZLN3bJeYh__-bZWC8ovDU3uMugKu7xMTN-LAEcD992o0o9okpyiFINgp4OjuWD6_rLMGphaeI7eHfW).

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e0c44a28d910421db49bcf5f2713d3c4&_e=MnD7j6pPgFI42Md2rx-figL5bca28qe2eyJ661t73ta9Wvu4IRa2JB_DY-i-Uy3vIafAp5foiHOmKfGKc3diRIG1Vf8KXDnKVxajGcrECGbpCskeFqmr0uyWk3JL9D2qWnG3JED4Vm773k9W5Bk5FTG9qiK0mVxTI1yOatqWvyVLvsjj4YGB8qhQ509txYI2MNU0pL6LVsNR3ymOunyR_IxcVlCmTk8TBflV9O9a-1kDA1k1Sk_PJwkkRFtDiv_z1CqUgCByS0xZPl6-GDLnjoMzOuhQBQS1hrKmHaTcKAvqpzc-zq9dxD6dOQVEasK7bhBVCP6XgrANIfLy4GHhrWoy8OVxLaIA9dXuBIZCE_AgZALRstksC0OodEtCewP-FmrD1tBw45PjsWpWuKtU5A%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e0c44a28d910421db49bcf5f2713d3c4&_e=MnD7j6pPgFI42Md2rx-figL5bca28qe2eyJ661t73ta9Wvu4IRa2JB_DY-i-Uy3vIafAp5foiHOmKfGKc3diRIG1Vf8KXDnKVxajGcrECGbpCskeFqmr0uyWk3JL9D2qWnG3JED4Vm773k9W5Bk5FTG9qiK0mVxTI1yOatqWvyVLvsjj4YGB8qhQ509txYI2MNU0pL6LVsNR3ymOunyR_IxcVlCmTk8TBflV9O9a-1kDA1k1Sk_PJwkkRFtDiv_zeRDvxjXnQWxEXmiCmsHF3FZeYoCyICSLYKeutlHFjSfke3KuL1SHBHZkwRn_jACL0yNuNjyKxI48O9qtpjc-CA8eMpPqbNxaRWUv-amJ3VBP0omFMKuNnSuAcyxRCBQRkCisXO1y2U1QmJMoKvDD-Q%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e0c44a28d910421db49bcf5f2713d3c4&_e=MnD7j6pPgFI42Md2rx-figL5bca28qe2eyJ661t73ta9Wvu4IRa2JB_DY-i-Uy3vIafAp5foiHOmKfGKc3diRIG1Vf8KXDnKVxajGcrECGbpCskeFqmr0uyWk3JL9D2qWnG3JED4Vm773k9W5Bk5FTG9qiK0mVxTI1yOatqWvyVLvsjj4YGB8qhQ509txYI2MNU0pL6LVsNR3ymOunyR_IxcVlCmTk8TBflV9O9a-1kDA1k1Sk_PJwkkRFtDiv_zdSDww5_6nPR2737ZhS93Tc5Ha8ah2qMds1e0bHemnb7fOTwgL-gS9H6g--qQocdnny8tWl0CZ0UcDTgKG__gHqHYnj_UF3sDng-f0zARuz39ZdD0v21JyRNTd6ejX4iPJj8QFRyGUW2xyHejh3nxEQ%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
