clean_body: It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c2d04c83f9a4c319e31cb1d3cab0f33&_e=uJuoVhY5ZfTWizYaFxc3vDMxpOUZCTrwHRrsD8zIZc16eJh1TrH42Va_s-wYGZuaswgZ8EbZPK6ettMiXgj4l4RnkMibKKCYUXHJCozUj7bD49CE35Y3a8srdgeOCLkL1wUxzIwGXtE1RS0CKwd2LniaoukiQFRYR79FmD2rOqQQVe0fc8lEvRbERCZkkvykcIEOCxVqWLK9IEHCXcappRAEVGbihLf2w_QNIPzuE3xmDoZuk8sI_XznJDIuzRAX5RrrSyPJjHCSxZJFnPoEcT8YAA5wGn7Mi9lKlkvc_iqEPsFlcYun2AxOmbXT3RSjcYHwENrgJhMMPWIlQayDRQZg80jE2FYNRVeIGJN5XExfTuZff2j1VK_ScL81HkIhP76gispXOSAdYSGyK0CoO1pmLZt4QvO9_ACDwgXeM-Y%3D)

| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c2d04c83f9a4c319e31cb1d3cab0f33&_e=uJuoVhY5ZfTWizYaFxc3vDMxpOUZCTrwHRrsD8zIZc16eJh1TrH42Va_s-wYGZuaswgZ8EbZPK6ettMiXgj4l4RnkMibKKCYUXHJCozUj7bD49CE35Y3a8srdgeOCLkL1wUxzIwGXtE1RS0CKwd2LniaoukiQFRYR79FmD2rOqQQVe0fc8lEvRbERCZkkvykcIEOCxVqWLK9IEHCXcappRAEVGbihLf2w_QNIPzuE3xmDoZuk8sI_XznJDIuzRAXKcs5G8idaGKl32YEmpERWe-TcibWjjiofSQlxYqLOBTmBTZItxLclkl8VhUhyhMNa5rXyWArXw0Zky4lmOKE65sPZFDDxhMqWxq4W3Mg4WfctPrw5C1X_SSFgHvDLCG4eln3-g2plFjtOz3XkCRdCu05zu3FsbS2clG_HeXWKOI%3D)

Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c2d04c83f9a4c319e31cb1d3cab0f33&_e=uJuoVhY5ZfTWizYaFxc3vDMxpOUZCTrwHRrsD8zIZc16eJh1TrH42Va_s-wYGZuaswgZ8EbZPK6ettMiXgj4l4RnkMibKKCYUXHJCozUj7bD49CE35Y3a8srdgeOCLkL1wUxzIwGXtE1RS0CKwd2LniaoukiQFRYR79FmD2rOqQQVe0fc8lEvRbERCZkkvykcIEOCxVqWLK9IEHCXcappRAEVGbihLf2w_QNIPzuE3xmDoZuk8sI_XznJDIuzRAXB1UUjD3jhPkEnpmZJmPKGOoAw7gB6xgsOu4y6OndWqY72i_ren5sn0LUDZ0qb6gT0oJCNvfiYcUaUnOhnOcxGURe6SCHnu0V8P0wkOvYeXUavS-B3WAdgqntusPIsw1QFOgFLmwtwnsYz90hCUmpHV60-5-qMhTRDxrhNY-BnwY%3D)

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0e81256065f043e18c91ced6ed6c7c3d&_e=fP6uX_E74tZOMioOUG1AVRTZWuTm4m32a0PFvYJMG1WHQ8FbcXs7qIAUMtxY1lLaVSiw3EGIq38k2U3nfZQvrPAnrr34Gnz2_xqmlUbN2O2Vp2w9iqm4wxkpfJgp0NF7cW0BFJPikHQIJlAvjAN4nUVnJ4YOl0TsQ94Bv3-11LTEt0suz4vr_vvrN4zVD_cu7Fv2F5bFkUxprw3n2YLrWJMaVMld1uDwOZ0abjtzSHT0CmeHxGfuRZ0oaGg9FalIVIxVmPU_LW6lbJldgfdP4jg8yj10xxwLkq_iU--e0BA%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0e81256065f043e18c91ced6ed6c7c3d&_e=fP6uX_E74tZOMioOUG1AVRTZWuTm4m32a0PFvYJMG1WHQ8FbcXs7qIAUMtxY1lLaVSiw3EGIq38k2U3nfZQvrPAnrr34Gnz2_xqmlUbN2O2Vp2w9iqm4wxkpfJgp0NF7cW0BFJPikHQIJlAvjAN4nZlJ_YVDbuZQLsMP4DPlsVYP2mKQqemTCezLlgezaXouVcWoyfvjlSLeUUj0TLk6hZ1JAJzUGu-Q5T_ckKQNt999u9_3VLJCpawyVB18VpO1fwZ3hVl6QLWnQp4M527DVB70lsedfwCvZSQf6NVMPDM%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0e81256065f043e18c91ced6ed6c7c3d&_e=fP6uX_E74tZOMioOUG1AVRTZWuTm4m32a0PFvYJMG1WHQ8FbcXs7qIAUMtxY1lLaVSiw3EGIq38k2U3nfZQvrPAnrr34Gnz2_xqmlUbN2O2Vp2w9iqm4wxkpfJgp0NF7cW0BFJPikHQIJlAvjAN4nUSmjII5cC2r5NQqtU0FNPYgNsGu2Ck-_nrG2c_rJcmMTrT6hhzEn9TcWBwNPjRgaGphe-gSTsToM2V236JxbMNszf22uqx0WPCr79hMhMiFagbydfDnAd1v4TX_5nudhh5gYOqPBVES-whETj3fdfA%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0e81256065f043e18c91ced6ed6c7c3d&_e=fP6uX_E74tZOMioOUG1AVRTZWuTm4m32a0PFvYJMG1WHQ8FbcXs7qIAUMtxY1lLaVSiw3EGIq38k2U3nfZQvrPAnrr34Gnz2_xqmlUbN2O2Vp2w9iqm4wxkpfJgp0NF7cW0BFJPikHQIJlAvjAN4nQEIQGMprHXFv7ny5SpGVZNk8mCSxzaAN0pjR9UnY38uOdwM-49FoA6ijKHpxPxY4azLwazf6SXtlz8plz8msemX-C6CUhwgKW65OmWU5BL8AZfUfA8prs1gOgJf-aIUxW2Vc-7R64CohTN7Xp92JV0%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0e81256065f043e18c91ced6ed6c7c3d&_e=fP6uX_E74tZOMioOUG1AVRTZWuTm4m32a0PFvYJMG1WHQ8FbcXs7qIAUMtxY1lLaVSiw3EGIq38k2U3nfZQvrPAnrr34Gnz2_xqmlUbN2O2Vp2w9iqm4wxkpfJgp0NF7cW0BFJPikHQIJlAvjAN4nZ1tzhe2iWhrfCIgX04O6nBvFRVl4AJOsEBs-Ypkn2-sKTDeg6UGvR7UtBTvg5Hf7OkX0aFIUiH8ZWbcaRVq9-KTuMjSj6LqVQnkNA_o5HDjzKsR-hWDQSN9v6TeX1G0yovOgSr0-dZvyqTWQdGWFxA%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0e81256065f043e18c91ced6ed6c7c3d&_e=fP6uX_E74tZOMioOUG1AVRTZWuTm4m32a0PFvYJMG1WHQ8FbcXs7qIAUMtxY1lLaVSiw3EGIq38k2U3nfZQvrPAnrr34Gnz2_xqmlUbN2O2Vp2w9iqm4wxkpfJgp0NF7cW0BFJPikHQIJlAvjAN4nSw11UErTfSLjTmFk3rq8JZ7-2STSDJHGkBuhaWGE9ZeGDsGaVjRdpq0tw7HGe1evj2aKdYlEkbNLaQfhzRJ_LJYJykcaseUtbMjYVdXUOEx_yfC2tzxMMj6Lo2T54DMjVmjcODY8C4UA6_TNtp2n20%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0e81256065f043e18c91ced6ed6c7c3d&_e=fP6uX_E74tZOMioOUG1AVRTZWuTm4m32a0PFvYJMG1WHQ8FbcXs7qIAUMtxY1lLaVSiw3EGIq38k2U3nfZQvrPAnrr34Gnz2_xqmlUbN2O2Vp2w9iqm4wxkpfJgp0NF7cW0BFJPikHQIJlAvjAN4nWm7LcLmS-4YEcdfnksQVlgIpVob7pzBVe-PRc_hpzWC8Y147JefxEQ3GJ6C13yvhIXn-WVcmYwDhCkxFsBRrSayj8DenampSrI8mWcqNlixKKNfWTmI3D9IFzCmUT9x4i8ArIHdv0vWujJElFVF1z0%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0e81256065f043e18c91ced6ed6c7c3d&_e=fP6uX_E74tZOMioOUG1AVRTZWuTm4m32a0PFvYJMG1WHQ8FbcXs7qIAUMtxY1lLaVSiw3EGIq38k2U3nfZQvrPAnrr34Gnz2_xqmlUbN2O2Vp2w9iqm4wxkpfJgp0NF7cW0BFJPikHQIJlAvjAN4nTkWxElgYY0oqJfCs0R6nCAcrS6GmHoo6rMDhG5e9N3Px_PIh-CTHbd9xO2EZ2F6B6H2YXmijnOs9Bz9N6D7fSs3NJ5N--U0Z1INxU3xr4cQdv10DXAiwap8vNAxXvFfVIEB5aGzaeHW3v5Fd1_xmzU%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

clean_body: This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zp6r06f9hms3ovk8kbphefhss49lb5r0ck1vue9o_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3ie0o74clh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztjeik1dh2ncr6enc5i0rujunk6vrai443ltkgj0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3ie0o74clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqu4lbno29nr37ncclssrs7cn346knk5cbfq6eq0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3ie0o74clh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

subject: We are at a critical point
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWfu01PDuN

I hope you're having a great day. There's something important I
want to share with you today. For years, we've seen a growing
effort from radical activists to destroy the principles of
liberty that have made our nation the freest and most prosperous
in history. These radicals have found a willing ally in the Biden
administration's education department.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWfu01PDuN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

I hope
you're having a great day. There's something important I want to
share with you today.

For
years, we've seen a growing effort from radical activists to
destroy the principles of liberty that have made our nation the
freest and most prosperous in history. These radicals have found
a willing ally in the Biden administration's education
department.

And right
now-with the help of these government bureaucrats-they are
actively denigrating the U.S. Constitution in America's schools
while teaching destructive ideologies like critical race theory
and socialism.

We are at
a key point in our history. We must defend our nation's founding
documents and principles of liberty through education.

And
that's why I'm emailing you today.

Hillsdale
College recently produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our
very popular "Constitution 101" online course, and I'd like you
to have a copy.

The
course features Hillsdale's faculty-the same professors who teach
our required course on the Constitution on campus. And when you
view "Constitution 101," you'll learn about:

The
original design and purpose of the Constitution.
The
challenges it faced during the Civil War.
How
it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and
liberalism.
How
limited government under the Constitution might be revived in our
own time.

Right
now, it can be yours when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100
or more. You can take advantage of this limited-time offer using
this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61875051:Wfu01PDuN:m:3:2532013465:C8941A5CB99A738F9C599EB3DC44396C:r

And when
you do, you'll not only get your own DVD box set, but you'll help
expand our national educational outreach efforts such as free
online courses, classical K-12 education curriculums, and
Imprimis-our digest of liberty.

We need
your support because we REFUSE all government funding, even
indirectly in the form of student grants or loans.

So,
please reserve your DVD box set with a gift of $100 or more using
this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61875051:Wfu01PDuN:m:3:2532013465:C8941A5CB99A738F9C599EB3DC44396C:r

And
remember, as I mentioned above, supplies are limited, so be sure
to reserve your copy today.

Warm
regards,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

There's something important I want to share with you today. For years, we've seen a growing effort from radical activists to destroy the principles of liberty that have made our nation the freest and most prosperous in history. These radicals have found a willing ally in the Biden administration's education department. And right now-with the help of these government bureaucrats-they are actively denigrating the U.S. Constitution in America's schools while teaching destructive ideologies like critical race theory and socialism. We are at a key point in our history. We must defend our nation's founding documents and principles of liberty through education. And that's why I'm emailing you today. Hillsdale College recently produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our very popular "Constitution 101" online course, and I'd like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale's faculty-the same professors who teach our required course on the Constitution on campus. And when you view "Constitution 101," you'll learn about: The original design and purpose of the Constitution. The challenges it faced during the Civil War. How it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. How limited government under the Constitution might be revived in our own time. Right now, it can be yours when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more. You can take advantage of this limited-time offer using this secure link: And when you do, you'll not only get your own DVD box set, but you'll help expand our national educational outreach efforts such as free online courses, classical K-12 education curriculums, and Imprimis-our digest of liberty. We need your support because we REFUSE all government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. name: Breaking Supreme Court News ---------------- via House Conservatives
subject: BREAKING NEWS: New vicious ad blitz unleashed against Clarence Thomas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Here's the truth: Democrats are going after a trailblazing American...

| |
---
| | | Patriot,

_**[RIGHT NOW, the Liberal Mob is pulling out all the stops to get Justice Clarence Thomas IMPEACHED from the Supreme Court.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62767280:JTdVPmION:m:1:3299561967:6025BD364F48D9FB420E8034DB33BD7B:r "RIGHT NOW, the Liberal Mob is
pulling out all the stops to get Justice Clarence Thomas IMPEACHED from the Supreme Court.")**_

Newsmax just broke a story about a Liberal group unleashing a coordinated, six-figure ad blitz calling for Clarence Thomas to RESIGN from the Supreme Court!
---
| | | [STAND WITH CLARENCE THOMAS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62767280:JTdVPmION:m:1:3299561967:6025BD364F48D9FB420E8034DB33BD7B:r "STAND WITH CLARENCE THOMAS")
---
Here's the truth: Democrats are going after a trailblazing American who fought through hardship and injustice to become one of the greatest legal minds in history.

His unlikely rise to the nation's highest court should serve as an inspiring example of the possibilities and opportunities provided by our great nation.

Instead, Leftists are trying to destroy the reputation of a brilliant constitutionalist.
_Here 's the incredible story of the man they are smearing:_
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62767280:JTdVPmION:m:1:3299561967:6025BD364F48D9FB420E8034DB33BD7B:r "image")
---
* Born on June 23, 1948, in Pin Point, Georgia, Thomas, a descendant of slaves, grew up in a low-income home and faced racial discrimination in his early years.

* After his father left the family when he was two years old, Thomas' mother struggled to raise him and his siblings.

* A house fire left the family homeless when Thomas was still a child.

* After the fire, he was sent to live with his grandparents in Savannah, Georgia. It was the first time he'd had indoor plumbing and regular meals.

* Thomas' grandfather would prove to be a huge influence on his life, teaching his young grandson about the importance of hard work and personal responsibility.

* Thomas - whose grandfather impressed upon him the importance of a good education - became the first member of his family to enroll in college, attending Conception Seminary College and later transferring to Holy Cross College, where he graduated cum laude.

* After completing his undergraduate studies, Thomas attended Yale Law School, where he was one of the only black students at the time.

* Thomas began his legal career by working in various positions, including at the Missouri Attorney General's Office and the U.S. Department of Education's Office for Civil Rights.

* In 1981, he was appointed as the Assistant Secretary for Civil Rights under the Reagan administration.

* Thomas gained recognition for his conservative views and his strong commitment to originalism and textualism in interpreting the Constitution.

* In 1991, President George H.W. Bush nominated Thomas to the Supreme Court to fill the vacancy left by the retirement of Justice Thurgood Marshall, the first black man to serve on the court.

* Despite a contentious process, Thomas was confirmed by the Senate in October 1991, becoming the second African American to serve on the Supreme Court.

* His confirmation solidified his position as a conservative justice, known for his independent thinking and often dissenting opinions.

Despite the many hardships in his life, Clarence Thomas persevered to achieve success in his career. His journey is a testament to his resilience, determination, and ability to navigate adversity. But the Radical Left is going to do anything they can to DESTROY this man's legacy.

We have one request for you, _**[will you stand alongside House Republicans and fight to DEFEND Clarence Thomas against this unjust smear by the Radical Left?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62767280:JTdVPmION:m:1:3299561967:6025BD364F48D9FB420E8034DB33BD7B:r "will you stand alongside
House Republicans and fight to DEFEND Clarence Thomas against this unjust smear by the Radical Left? ")**_
---
| | | [STAND WITH CLARENCE THOMAS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62767280:JTdVPmION:m:1:3299561967:6025BD364F48D9FB420E8034DB33BD7B:r "STAND WITH CLARENCE THOMAS")
---
We are looking for 20,000 signatures by midnight tonight. Will you be one of them?

Thank you,
House Republicans

---

---
|
---

name: signature needed (Left Action)
subject: YouTube is changing its rules, and will allow FALSE claims about the 2020 election. Tell them not to do it
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [YouTube is changing its rules, and will allow FALSE claims about the 2020 election. Tell them not to do it >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2bd46be1-d828-4d28-8ce8-983f0fc08cc3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T46325b89-34ba-4e38-9225-d04a326cca7f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | In a stark and [sudden reversal of its content rules](https://default.salsalabs.org/T48b12f93-8ad5-4a70-8434-023b770670be/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), YouTube just announced it will allow users to post patently false claims about the 2020 election being stolen. [**Sign the petition, and tell YouTube not to do this.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te9fd38f9-1816-4b77-a8e4-1eb73ffde2ba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) YouTube has rules governing what is posted on its platform, and it routinely forbids false, misleading, and dangerous content. It makes no sense to allow a special exemption for dangerous lies related to the 2020 election. YouTube has the right to block such lies, and also the responsibility. We've all seen what happens when lies are allowed to spread unchecked. And we can't afford to let it happen again. [**Add your name, and tell YouTube not to change its policy, and not to allow 2020 election lies.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8616eeb4-d848-4bb3-9a14-656dba8816d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b71c22b-66f7-41f5-a9c5-811836523c7f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

body:
And COVID-19 Vaccine Leaves Jamie Foxx Paralyzed and Blind

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668736%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yBV9X2UVvCEKWEGcm%2fifDw&sysid=1 Kershaw Takes a Stand: Christian Faith Day vs. Pride Night

The Dodgers' inclusion of the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence in their Pride Night game has sparked criticism. Clayton Kershaw, the team's star pitcher, disagrees and will relaunch Christian Faith and Family Day. He opposes ridiculing religions, specifically the group's portrayal of Christianity.

name: Team Lucas
subject: Hey Peter, can you fill out this quick survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Your feedback is invaluable as we build out this campaign to elect Lucas Kunce and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.
#
Hey Peter, can you take a moment today to **[fill out this quick survey?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20230604-1-survey?t=1&akid=3213%2E614464%2E5KZCWq)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20230604-1-survey?t=2&akid=3213%2E614464%2E5KZCWq)**
Lucas Kunce is running for U.S. Senate because he’s on a mission to fundamentally change who calls the shots in our country.
Unlike Missouri’s current U.S. Senator Josh Hawley, Lucas isn’t taking cues from the corrupt mega-donors and corporate elites who’ve spent decades tearing our country up. He’s relying on input from real voters like you to drive our campaign’s message and priorities at every step of the way — **and that’s why we’re reaching out to you today.**
**[Will you take just a few moments to fill out our short priorities survey and share your thoughts with Lucas about the issues on your mind this year, our campaign, and what you think we need to accomplish before November 2024?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20230604-1-survey?t=3&akid=3213%2E614464%2E5KZCWq)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20230604-1-survey?t=4&akid=3213%2E614464%2E5KZCWq)**
Lucas doesn’t have a network of shady mega-donors or corporate elites backing up his campaign — and he doesn’t want them. He’s committed to building this movement the right way, completely powered by everyday people like you, because those are the only folks he wants to serve in the U.S. Senate.
Part of that means our campaign won’t accept ANY corporate PAC money. But it also means we need input from real people like you to guide our strategy and priorities throughout this campaign. **So Peter:**
**[Can you take just a minute or two to share your priorities and thoughts with Lucas in this quick survey? Your feedback is invaluable as we build out this campaign to flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20230604-1-survey?t=5&akid=3213%2E614464%2E5KZCWq)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20230604-1-survey?t=6&akid=3213%2E614464%2E5KZCWq)**
Thank you so much,
Team Lucas Kunce

name: American Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668747%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mPSNr6oqpOVQ9A9tLQ5E3A&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668748%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M%2bx2TmeTokPwv27E12ng4Q&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668749%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bOwj93OVll9WSoUObrUA3A&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Get your kids off TikTok and into books
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
TikTok (and all social media, for that matter) correlates with higher anxiety and attention issues in kids.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=79524e7ada7e4b0dbcf899dc93883c41&_e=oL4bv8Oo7RSaVcKsmEvgoqr4sohAEhBxtkxK36RRB4GrwPQnDh3NyAdEExVNxwmk7dN1u1qT6KssKgz69TeXw1OkbDfiR_w3N1rXN9A5ra0XKiY_5cou2B-liiTE6L5-i2rMTmPrCryS9A88-cpUdQ_SR-Lnqyri5IIGxqG8deU0xH1F-c3J4r5AQDGSsISX79fLYfnQkXo2VV3gcZmO_KIpdBev3gO_5EG_CJKrV5oiFEdzONhFVQvuAut8wvvgliferEmc2M6Igt4HFSA7ZtXiw1t42aUI0DwGpnKXvO8%3D "Tuttle Twins")

Friend,

TikTok (and all social media, for that matter) correlates with higher anxiety and attention issues in kids.

Mindless scrolling keeps kids engaged and has even led to some dangerous trends.

However, adults concerned about what kids are doing is nothing new.

When I grew up, video games were a major concern. Video games were seen as mindless and addictive and were even blamed for the Columbine shooting by some people.

As I became a parent, I wanted my kids to learn about freedom, our history, and personal responsibility, but in an entertaining way. I wanted books that would keep them engaged while learning about the ideas of liberty, free market economics, and the dangers of socialism.

I decided I had to create my own fun educational experience for my kids. So I began writing the Tuttle Twins children's books nearly a decade ago!

And I never dreamed of how successful it would become. We've distributed nearly 5 MILLION copies across the country!
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=79524e7ada7e4b0dbcf899dc93883c41&_e=oL4bv8Oo7RSaVcKsmEvgoqr4sohAEhBxtkxK36RRB4GrwPQnDh3NyAdEExVNxwmk7dN1u1qT6KssKgz69TeXw1OkbDfiR_w3N1rXN9A5ra0XKiY_5cou2B-liiTE6L5-qsw1ZQhx-q4eJh3s4n21npydTVH83RXIt5VluMrQTUl2tcd_trWf3b5KEk0Cc3eYeeYQiG_idOILcwwZRHvH6EnPFqyjXJGbd45sBdIaRXg0f9WwiuBqHgM19ihvr4bOsY2OJ_pGBf0s1-dfV_I0HxgxPHRFDMAoPRDPvUaE6T0%3D)
Here's why I'm emailing you.

I share your concerns about social media. Instead of banning things, I am in the business of creating positive alternatives you can point your children to.

It costs roughly $10 to ship a book.

**I aim to distribute another 1 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins books to libraries, schools, and families this year. It 's an ambitious goal, and I must raise $100,000 this month to stay on track. Can you donate $10 or more to distribute a copy of the Tuttle Twins?**

The Tuttle Twins teach kids about personal responsibility, freedom, the rule of law, free market economics, and more.

And the best part, kids love them!

While there are many books to teach these ideas to adults, there has been a profound void in the children's literature market. The Tuttle Twins series closes the gap, helping parents convey the principles of freedom to their kids in a fun way.

Each book in this series focuses on a different aspect of the principles of a free society: free markets, competition, individual rights, the non-aggression principle, personal responsibility, protectionism, and a variety of other issues--all boiled down to core concepts that children of different ages can easily grasp.

Get to know Connor Boyack

Connor Boyack founded Libertas Institute in 2011 and serves as its president. Named one of Utah's most politically influential people by The Salt Lake Tribune, Connor's leadership has led to changing over 100 laws on issues ranging from privacy and government transparency to property rights and education.

A public speaker and author of 40 books, he is best known for the Tuttle Twins books, a children's series introducing young readers to economic, political, and civic principles. The books have sold nearly 5 million copies and have now been turned into a cartoon, also named The Tuttle Twins, for which he serves as executive producer.

clean_body: TikTok (and all social media, for that matter) correlates with higher anxiety and attention issues in kids. "Tuttle Twins" Friend, TikTok (and all social media, for that matter) correlates with higher anxiety and attention issues in kids. Mindless scrolling keeps kids engaged and has even led to some dangerous trends. However, adults concerned about what kids are doing is nothing new. When I grew up, video games were a major concern. Video games were seen as mindless and addictive and were even blamed for the Columbine shooting by some people. As I became a parent, I wanted my kids to learn about freedom, our history, and personal responsibility, but in an entertaining way. I wanted books that would keep them engaged while learning about the ideas of liberty, free market economics, and the dangers of socialism. I decided I had to create my own fun educational experience for my kids. So I began writing the Tuttle Twins children's books nearly a decade ago! And I never dreamed of how successful it would become. We've distributed nearly 5 MILLION copies across the country! Here's why I'm emailing you. I share your concerns about social media. Instead of banning things, I am in the business of creating positive alternatives you can point your children to. It costs roughly $10 to ship a book. I aim to distribute another 1 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins books to libraries, schools, and families this year. It 's an ambitious goal, and I must raise $100,000 this month to stay on track. Can you donate $10 or more to distribute a copy of the Tuttle Twins? All online donations are being matched right now. So your $10 becomes $20! The Tuttle Twins teach kids about personal responsibility, freedom, the rule of law, free market economics, and more. And the best part, kids love them! While there are many books to teach these ideas to adults, there has been a profound void in the children's literature market. The Tuttle Twins series closes the gap, helping parents convey the principles of freedom to their kids in a fun way. Each book in this series focuses on a different aspect of the principles of a free society: free markets, competition, individual rights, the non-aggression principle, personal responsibility, protectionism, and a variety of other issues--all boiled down to core concepts that children of different ages can easily grasp. Lastly, I want to share with you our biggest compliment ever. It's from CNN! They called us "right-wing children's entertainment." I am counting on you to help me distribute 1 MILLION copies. Children's libraries are full of all kinds of books (some shouldn't even be in there). Why should they not have access to pro-liberty books? All online donations are being matched. Please send your generous support today by selecting an amount below to help me raise $100,000 this month. I don't have woke billionaires behind me. I can't rely on the media to be friendly towards our books. I depend on your support to get these books into the hands of kids. Thank you, Connor Boyack Author, Tuttle Twins President, Libertas Institute Get to know Connor Boyack Connor Boyack founded Libertas Institute in 2011 and serves as its president. Named one of Utah's most politically influential people by The Salt Lake Tribune, Connor's leadership has led to changing over 100 laws on issues ranging from privacy and government transparency to property rights and education. A public speaker and author of 40 books, he is best known for the Tuttle Twins books, a children's series introducing young readers to economic, political, and civic principles. The books have sold nearly 5 million copies and have now been turned into a cartoon, also named The Tuttle Twins, for which he serves as executive producer. | | | | | Peter, **[Donald Trump May Finally Have Met His Waterloo.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T62856e3f-c784-4ef3-8c8e-38a54aaee434/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** [PLEASE WATCH THE VIDEO!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T54630a2d-d4fb-47d2-9e4e-52487f6349b8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _He apparently didn't learn the lesson of his old pal Dick Nixon: [Tapes ain't good](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta706d899-ee9f-448a-a94e-a481f9417185/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._ _Especially if they have your grubby little voice admitting to illegal acts AND undermining your entire "See No Evil/Hear No Evil" defense. [Whoops](https://default.salsalabs.org/T16a1f2a8-c33b-4901-9e07-82f62ea5e9d2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._ [PLEASE SUBSCRIBE TO THE CHANNEL](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9cc484b9-9953-48c4-aa28-9c8cead98d91/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_At our sister outlet, [Blue Amp Channel,](https://default.salsalabs.org/T62fcb95c-89ee-41df-87c2-6f15eda570f4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ we produced a video that has the goods for you: What Trump said, how he said it & how it's *really bad.* for him.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tea577775-c0f8-43f0-8bc5-92bdc9c35f53/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Be warned, [it may provide a hint of schadenfreude :).](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4f6eb224-0bbb-450b-bfb1-95c1f23bb984/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_** [PLEASE WATCH THE VIDEO](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te17366fd-b932-44d1-baa2-bbdfbd0edc3f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_[Please watch](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68d2941c-f64f-430e-9c3d-57015c5d44e3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), and [subscribe to the channel](https://default.salsalabs.org/T712c3205-82fe-42d6-9d0f-4f445ef57584/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)! | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf271107b-678f-43ab-9b8b-0893620dabf5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | Peter, I’m about to reveal what’s going on behind the scenes, so listen up: [**FIRST:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64317723/409700843/1662333042?refcode=20230604_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDRjN2M0OS1mOTAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KI_ydyoz4_RFLB0kGVfGqO_zfdh4lp2cuoA6uttGqmI=) Extreme MAGA Republicans raised a recording-breaking [**$38 million**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64317724/409700844/1662333042?refcode=20230604_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDRjN2M0OS1mOTAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KI_ydyoz4_RFLB0kGVfGqO_zfdh4lp2cuoA6uttGqmI=) to defeat us. [**THEN:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64317725/409700845/1662333042?refcode=20230604_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDRjN2M0OS1mOTAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KI_ydyoz4_RFLB0kGVfGqO_zfdh4lp2cuoA6uttGqmI=) They used that massive campaign war chest to attack [**35**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64317728/409700846/1662333042?refcode=20230604_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDRjN2M0OS1mOTAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KI_ydyoz4_RFLB0kGVfGqO_zfdh4lp2cuoA6uttGqmI=) swing-seat Democrats. [**NOW:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64317730/409700847/1662333042?refcode=20230604_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDRjN2M0OS1mOTAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KI_ydyoz4_RFLB0kGVfGqO_zfdh4lp2cuoA6uttGqmI=) The latest polls show Team Extreme has taken the lead by a staggering [**FIVE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64317732/409700848/1662333042?refcode=20230604_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDRjN2M0OS1mOTAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KI_ydyoz4_RFLB0kGVfGqO_zfdh4lp2cuoA6uttGqmI=) points. I know Republicans and their special interest donors think they can attack Democrats with vicious lies and turn voters against us. [**_I also know that we have what it takes to rise up and prove them absolutely wrong._ **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64317734/409700849/1662333042?refcode=20230604_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDRjN2M0OS1mOTAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KI_ydyoz4_RFLB0kGVfGqO_zfdh4lp2cuoA6uttGqmI=) [**_That’s why I just launched a rapid-response fund to raise 2,109 gifts in the next 24 hours to outraise the GOP’s mega-donors and help Democrats win back our majority. I’m relying on your donation to rush funds to critical races nationwide, counter Republican attacks and connect with the voters we need to win in every battleground district. Will you rush $15 to help me kick off this unbeatable campaign operation, propel our Democrats to victory and hand right-wing extremists a shocking defeat? >> _**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64317736/409700850/1662333042?refcode=20230604_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDRjN2M0OS1mOTAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KI_ydyoz4_RFLB0kGVfGqO_zfdh4lp2cuoA6uttGqmI=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64317738/409700851/1662333042?refcode=20230604_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDRjN2M0OS1mOTAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KI_ydyoz4_RFLB0kGVfGqO_zfdh4lp2cuoA6uttGqmI=)
**[FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64317739/409700852/1662333042?refcode=20230604_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDRjN2M0OS1mOTAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KI_ydyoz4_RFLB0kGVfGqO_zfdh4lp2cuoA6uttGqmI=)**

But what we do – or fail to do – right now could decide the course of this entire election. We can either sit back and allow Republicans to build a massive war chest and lie their way into power again... [**Or we can band together and meet this moment with a response so historic that nothing can deter our victory.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64317741/409700854/1662333042?refcode=20230604_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDRjN2M0OS1mOTAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KI_ydyoz4_RFLB0kGVfGqO_zfdh4lp2cuoA6uttGqmI=) [_**I need 2,109 supporters like you to chip in before midnight to help Democrats regain our lead in the polls, withstand expensive attacks from Republicans and prove we will not allow them to buy their way out of the humiliating election defeat they deserve. | | The Washington Post is reporting on the truth that many of us know, but the GOP won’t admit: their lies have real human consequences. **The Big Lie is putting people in danger!** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64302468/409652783/201656768?refcode=em_fr_b1_060423_election-workers_30ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDU0MzM2Ny1kYjAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mA00xRxBwNTKXIIhjd1iYldOB1IIOBhY2YTI86xNfrM=) Being an election clerk used to be a way to get involved in democracy and contribute to the political system we all cherish. After all, local officials are crucial to making our elections possible!

**But Trump and the GOP’s conspiracy theories have made life hell for election officials.** The Brennan Center for Justice reports that similar intimidation has taken place across the country. And it’s not just at the local level – Secretaries of State have been receiving death threats ever since the 2020 election.

With threats to election workers at an all-time high, we need to do everything we can to elect Secretaries of State who will DEFEND democracy - _but that takes grassroots support!_ **_[That’s why we’re asking you to chip in anything you can to help us crush our daily fundraising goal and elect Democratic Secretaries of State. clean_body: | = | | The Washington Post is reporting on the truth that many of us know, but the GOP won’t admit: their lies have real human consequences. The Big Lie is putting people in danger! = Being an election clerk used to be a way to get involved in democracy and contribute to the political system we all cherish. After all, local officials are crucial to making our elections possible! But Trump and the GOP’s conspiracy theories have made life hell for election officials. The Brennan Center for Justice reports that similar intimidation has taken place across the country. And it’s not just at the local level – Secretaries of State have been receiving death threats ever since the 2020 election. With threats to election workers at an all-time high, we need to do everything we can to elect Secretaries of State who will DEFEND democracy - but that takes grassroots support! = | = = = = = = Team DASS Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions. = | =

body:

| _The Democrats’ attempt to put Trump in jail is a “GREATER ASSAULT” on our democracy than Jan 6._

Only a massive GOP response right now will save Trump from this witch hunt!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ron=20DeSantis?=
subject: what I don’t believe about politics.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I think most candidates get this wrong, and I want to set the record straight. | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=b0bf54d8e6&e=84ee529f47)
---

Fellow Conservative,

I don’t believe politics is entertainment. I don’t believe politics is building a brand or virtue signaling.

Ultimately, politics is about **WINNING** and about **PRODUCING RESULTS.**

So instead of writing you a long email about what I believe, I just want to show you what I've DONE in Florida.

**Do you want results like these for all of America?** [**Then join my campaign today.** ](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=b40056a5c3&e=84ee529f47 "Then join my campaign today.")
---
| | [Donate](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=9610a1fba8&e=84ee529f47)
---
Ron DeSantis

**RON DESANTIS GOT RESULTS FOR FLORIDA**
---
| | | **K-12 Education**

Parents' rights have been increasingly under assault around the nation, but in Florida, we stand up for the rights of parents and the fundamental role they play in the education of their children.
* School choice is available for all Floridians by eliminating enrollment caps and income requirements while still prioritizing lower-income families and expanding scholarships for students with special needs.

* Florida is now the first state in the nation to have school choice fully integrated in the public K-12 funding process.

* Florida is ranked #1 in education freedom, #1 in parental empowerment, #1 in state spending on private school choice, and #1 in school choice enrollment.

* Florida eliminated Critical Race Theory in its K-12 schools.

* In 2021 Florida created annual increases in scholarships for students with special needs and we provided $750 for transportation costs to the chosen school.

* Florida has established robust civics education requirements so that students learn about the constitution and what it means to be an American.

**Higher Education Reform**

Academia, writ large, across the country, has lost its way. In Florida, we’re changing that with a series of reforms:
* Ending tenure by instating regular performance reviews.

* Dismantling the monopolistic style of higher ed accreditation agencies.

* Resetting the focus of higher ed towards preparing students to be contributing members of society, rather than imposing political ideology.

* Ensuring students and staff are evaluated based on merit and eliminating so-called D.E.I. programs, which are effectively programs based in discrimination, exclusion, and indoctrination.

**China**

Ron DeSantis has taken action to stand against the United States’ greatest geopolitical threat — the Chinese Communist Party (CCP). He signed legislation that:
* Prevents Chinese entities or affiliates from buying farmland in Florida or land near our military bases.

* Stops sensitive data from being stored on servers that might be owned by entities affiliated with the CCP.

* Prohibits the Chinese influence that we rooted out of higher education from working its way into our primary and secondary education institutions, including a prohibition on Confucious institutes.

* Blocks access to dangerous applications, such as TikTok, on government servers and devices.

**Protecting Life**
* The Heartbeat Protection Act protects the most vulnerable: babies in the womb whose hearts have already begun to beat.

**Defending 2nd Amendment Rights**
* Enacted constitutional carry that allows Floridians to carry concealed weapons without a government-issued permission slip.

**Law and Order**

Other states endanger their citizens by making it easier to put criminals back on the street. Here in Florida, we support and enact policies to protect our communities and keep our people safe. Governor DeSantis signed reforms that:
* Strengthen pre-trial detention and pushed back against woke “bail reform” efforts

* Increasing sentences for drug traffickers that target children with dangerous fentanyl.

* Subjected child rapists to the death penalty while simultaneously reforming death penalty statutes to ensure justice.

* Gov. DeSantis is also the only elected official in America to remove a “progressive” Soros-funded district attorney from office.

**Immigration**

The Biden Border Crisis has wreaked havoc across the United States and has put Americans in danger. But Governor DeSantis did not stand idly by while the federal government abandoned its lawful duties to protect our country, instead he:
* Mandated immigration status verification through E-Verify for public and private employers.

* Made knowingly transporting illegal immigrant minors a felony.

* Made using a fake ID to gain employment a felony.

* Required hospitals to report healthcare costs for illegal aliens.

* Gave Florida more money to send more illegal immigrants to more “sanctuary” jurisdictions such as Martha’s Vineyard.

**Prescription Drugs**

Pharmacy benefit managers and Big Pharma have managed to escape the public eye and work in the shadows for far too long. Ron DeSantis signed a bill that takes the reins back from these healthcare monopolies while empowering consumers.
* With the legislation passed this session, drug companies must disclose wholesale drug price increases of 15% or more.

* Florida is also prohibiting pharmacy benefit managers from mandating mail orders.

**Tax Cuts**

Florida’s economy has consistently outpaced the nation, but we are still fighting against inflationary policies imposed on us by the Biden administration. IIn Florida, we supported our residents and helped them afford the goods that they need.
* We lowered tolls across the state.

* We created a permanent tax exemption on diapers, wipes, baby clothes, cribs, strollers, and much more.

* We reduced taxes by nearly $5 billion – a Florida record.

**Legal Reform and Housing**

As Florida’s population booms, we have provided record support for Florida’s workforce to get quality housing and live the American Dream.
* The Live Local Act dedicates more than half a billion dollars to incentivize and jumpstart new construction.

* The Hometown Heroes Program makes sure police officers, firefighters, teachers, and other community leaders can afford to live in or near the communities they serve.

**Environmental, social, and corporate governance & Central Bank Digital Currency **

Ron DeSantis refuses to let elites circumvent the ballot box to implement a radical ideological agenda through financial sleight of hand.
* Governor DeSantis signed legislation that prohibits the financial sector from considering so-called “Social Credit Scores” in banking and lending practices that aim to prevent Floridians from obtaining loans, lines of credit, and bank accounts.

* And Governor DeSantis is on the record: NO to CBDCs or Federally-controlled digital dollar. Any proposal will be dead on arrival.

**Let Kids Be Kids**

There is a disturbing trend in our society to try to sexualize young people. That is not the way you look out for our children. You protect children—and Governor DeSantis has, by signing landmark legislation that:
* Prohibits sex reassignment surgeries and prescriptions for children under 18.

* Bans children from attending drag shows.

* Protects students from having to “declare” their pronouns in school and ensures that students are not forced to use pronouns that are not based on a student’s biological sex.

* Expands parents' rights in the education of their children by prohibiting classroom instruction on sexual orientation and gender identity in Pre-K through 8th grade.

* Protects young women from being forced to use bathrooms and locker rooms alongside biological males who have decided that they can invade women’s spaces.

---
| | **These kinds of accomplishments are why Floridians re-elected Ron DeSantis as their governor by a whopping 20-point margin, turning Democrat strongholds red. We need candidates and proven records who can win—that’s Ron DeSantis. Are you ready to win big for ALL of America? **
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=836f0029c9&e=84ee529f47)
---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=446991c990&e=84ee529f47)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state’s infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
