The Live Local Act dedicates more than half a billion dollars to incentivize and jumpstart new construction. The Hometown Heroes Program makes sure police officers, firefighters, teachers, and other community leaders can afford to live in or near the communities they serve. Environmental, social, and corporate governance & Central Bank Digital Currency Ron DeSantis refuses to let elites circumvent the ballot box to implement a radical ideological agenda through financial sleight of hand. Governor DeSantis signed legislation that prohibits the financial sector from considering so-called “Social Credit Scores” in banking and lending practices that aim to prevent Floridians from obtaining loans, lines of credit, and bank accounts. And Governor DeSantis is on the record: NO to CBDCs or Federally-controlled digital dollar. Any proposal will be dead on arrival. Let Kids Be Kids There is a disturbing trend in our society to try to sexualize young people. That is not the way you look out for our children. You protect children—and Governor DeSantis has, by signing landmark legislation that: Prohibits sex reassignment surgeries and prescriptions for children under 18. Bans children from attending drag shows. Protects students from having to “declare” their pronouns in school and ensures that students are not forced to use pronouns that are not based on a student’s biological sex. Expands parents' rights in the education of their children by prohibiting classroom instruction on sexual orientation and gender identity in Pre-K through 8th grade. Protects young women from being forced to use bathrooms and locker rooms alongside biological males who have decided that they can invade women’s spaces. | | These kinds of accomplishments are why Floridians re-elected Ron DeSantis as their governor by a whopping 20-point margin, turning Democrat strongholds red. We need candidates and proven records who can win—that’s Ron DeSantis. Are you ready to win big for ALL of America? | | | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn’t stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.” Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state’s infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 %%profilecenterurl%% %%subscriptioncenterurl%% %%unsubcenterurl%% | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2023 American Victory 2024. clean_body: It gets worse... | | | Friend, George Soros already snuck $50,000,000 into 2024 to buy Crooked Joe the White House. Then, just last month, a Soros-linked Super PAC pledged to spend another $75,000,000 targeting the top battleground states of the election. $125 MILLION in total... all linked to Soros... all intended to STOP our movement from winning back the White House. Friend, you would think that’s as bad as it gets, right? But sadly, the most nefarious plot of all is coming from WITHIN our own Party. Corrupt special interests claiming to be “Republicans” are spending $200 MILLION to try and eliminate our campaign in the primary! But if there’s one thing I’ve learned above all else over the last 8 years, it’s that we NEVER SURRENDER to those who think they can BUY our elections. While these RINOs seek to DIVIDE our Party and help Biden remain in the White House, we’re UNITING Americans behind Trump 2024. And our HISTORIC 50-POINT LEAD proves it! But now, I need YOUR help wrapping up the primary as quickly as possible so that we can shift 100% of our focus to the REAL mission: firing Crooked Joe Biden and MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6e35898088724a709ddc40de81bb6b80&_e=O_FaqJxP1_QbEpi_DR87boSeIX5k6biZWB4-mIDGah8-Zbx7H-uazIBeloZrP49Fez3Nw2JZrKRUXKdpe5M-gjI3odpL1TjYLI-vtNbtqnT0xaQw2ftmBsJ97WIeXXwNiAdJ7QuVRB0UnYLrfQFeeEyMvb8AFm0QKs0RHKwZGVF61ipoYoCmNyWlWuEtoWZMxo2vK5hefZXrAdgd0HneMVpSa9j-KPLQmz7qRy6LOwYMJTCT0pOXiTNbsCKBHHOqDS4uznOYsiwbcAePzWhmvCc_Uqa4yXLVbXk70Pb3mTlPyK1RgEGQLUBIMONqgibgRg71oCQ3Wdaw_cAN4dBO1Ut2noCjugga2La8rzET78uKGKb-S_ONY4KSjBlfsCweZmUPhTuX_S3LcDRBPt8AWcOKFHz-2cX1gCz4-xxZIMM%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6e35898088724a709ddc40de81bb6b80&_e=O_FaqJxP1_QbEpi_DR87boSeIX5k6biZWB4-mIDGah8-Zbx7H-uazIBeloZrP49Fez3Nw2JZrKRUXKdpe5M-gjI3odpL1TjYLI-vtNbtqnT0xaQw2ftmBsJ97WIeXXwNiAdJ7QuVRB0UnYLrfQFeeEyMvb8AFm0QKs0RHKwZGVF61ipoYoCmNyWlWuEtoWZMxo2vK5hefZXrAdgd0HneMVpSa9j-KPLQmz7qRy6LOwYMJTCT0pOXiTNbsCKBHHOqDS4uznOYsiwbcAePzWhmvAoRKWEMFqfm4y1d2ZMOPZqxGOFBJkSOYe4YsTV1a63FMRCwO8-YJZfgqmEnjDdibG-3xyabufrpkUWYuCNNoROK3NMlKmRRxqLsn0uE6bIW5SLpagYSpgp27HIj2eBGvLYZGmLgXDx1euqX9BAJreg%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6e35898088724a709ddc40de81bb6b80&_e=O_FaqJxP1_QbEpi_DR87boSeIX5k6biZWB4-mIDGah8-Zbx7H-uazIBeloZrP49Fez3Nw2JZrKRUXKdpe5M-gjI3odpL1TjYLI-vtNbtqnT0xaQw2ftmBsJ97WIeXXwNiAdJ7QuVRB0UnYLrfQFeeEyMvb8AFm0QKs0RHKwZGVF61ipoYoCmNyWlWuEtoWZMxo2vK5hefZXrAdgd0HneMVpSa9j-KPLQmz7qRy6LOwYMJTCT0pOXiTNbsCKBHHOqDS4uznOYsiwbcAePzWhmvDKldUmx9hs4Jq4VCAcHKKs7efNTeBEJddeKs5hscaDAIr4_LZ0JSTYuIoNHZRu-DCbUlunU6mTdZfDj5oB9IuhSJ4v9_dzwY4HR853BUNWfsD9rgSNtHP0J-53-6ycQAU3AxRKo43Q57rIucHB1HR0%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "The Second World Wars " on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
Our struggles for justice and liberation are interconnected. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvn7Qm0iGIrReV9UcChKbkV45W-SCGHqZVVUVHX9Kv2q9ibHcmtlSjHiYxbUnZAspOhbS2qHXPMXMAzlLjkLQYfYmRlO366297FUtRd-Nn1OBC9O_H6JUBcyEugFJjPIzPBIchr4kaMmeqeXh4zzvlRMrZX0_Q-P6hftGfLmZEaKVKKey0ZWrqaknjB_nBH9YgAhLWcr5QDTjaAFBTUBdeQA/3wr/Ubg2vM3YR4G4DXRf2bhmCw/h0/IofXzomrBLRZrxQR53nxsWu7YOouBBcj7rxLXnOmCDQ)

Friend, While visiting the West Bank in 2021, my colleague Rep. Jamaal Bowman met with my sity (grandmother) and was then blocked at a military checkpoint near her house. He experienced in-person what it’s like for Palestinians to live in fear under constant military presence. And he connects it to his own experience as a Black man in the U.S. growing up with intimidating police forces targeting Black people. Jamaal and I know that our struggles for justice and liberation are interconnected, from the U.S. to Palestine and beyond. And he’s taken principled stands, including by leading a recent letter to President Biden and the State Department, calling for action to ensure that U.S. taxpayer funds don’t support the Israeli government’s human rights abuses against Palestinians. \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Rashida Tlaib
Date: Sat, June 3, 2023
Subject: Jamaal’s courageous leadership on Palestinian rights
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
It’s meaningful to me when my colleagues in Congress take a stand for Palestinian rights, because it requires a lot of political courage in the face of attacks from those who want to maintain the unjust status quo.
My colleague Rep. Jamaal Bowman has really stepped up, including by leading a recent letter calling on President Biden and the State Department to ensure that U.S. taxpayer dollars don’t fund human rights abuses by the Israeli government against the Palestinian people.
[**Can you split a donation today between my campaign and Jamaal Bowman’s, in support of his courageous leadership on Palestinian rights?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKuxxxGNCMufLZFZwalOj6rEt8-lfD1ZZUUiDWuQieYJ-NBmxKxco8Dnk2clIuM5_tKh7g7XpAQKMVq7uItT6Vn973L3rSGZhKwRpGx4UwmYZpeHkBteJHsWbyMnLg_qNLgs_oZhuFg-TalPbq6N5y6rGN0pgEUas7DlhlBQoD7nnOr8UY-n_0Ilne_efPrLW_d0B5sKSirEY2i6UOeyAryJFF-cUrHb4BEmmrUjhxDuor6KSMwE0vUn-VxCsil02ZNamda5lc3C0FwdWnQyhp-XLVC3YaLFKxydV2fsylWlMeKzmsjAH3JdJ_V6sZFNR5TTO4JDMGMvAAJt3PuOHdskN5WU2EY54fsQWeU1ENUFgo5irUnxaUzhXqSlUjvEc4rV-SfYMuL_b-FDtMQA72fw/3wr/Ubg2vM3YR4G4DXRf2bhmCw/h8/mWxs5f8c2E02hzTl6btFIJ99T5QhOi07-_KYtLyE3LU)

While visiting the West Bank in 2021, Jamaal met with my sity (grandmother) and was then blocked at a military checkpoint near her house.
He experienced in-person what it’s like for Palestinians to live in fear under constant military presence. And he connects it to his own experience as a Black man in the U.S. growing up with intimidating police forces targeting Black communities. Black people and Palestinians are criminalized just for existing.
**Our struggles for justice and liberation are interconnected, from the U.S. to Palestine and beyond. We all deserve human dignity and freedom.**
Human rights organizations around the world have recognized what Palestinians have said for decades: the Israeli government is oppressing the Palestinian people and systematically denying equal rights to Palestinians—in what constitutes apartheid and ethnic cleansing.
And we know that the U.S. is complicit, sending billions of dollars each year to the Israeli military and silencing criticism of Israeli policies. That’s why we need to keep building power in the U.S. Congress to advocate for change. Let’s start by supporting members of Congress like Jamaal Bowman, who are taking the lead despite being targeted for speaking up.
[**Please chip in $5 or more today, to show you’ve got Rep. Jamaal Bowman’s back as he takes courageous stands for human rights in the U.S., Palestine, and around the world.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKuxxxGNCMufLZFZwalOj6rEt8-lfD1ZZUUiDWuQieYJ-NBmxKxco8Dnk2clIuM5_tOamjxuBzrK94TBrMiJGpH3NRLR6asXoSi2rJwhm4jmDlt0KCIX2YtW1c9jumupEQaOszO4CtS1_RMlk2A1DO3BwVAtfHHXgI1ppcnkLyvZi4PrghU5pZcrUPzJpBU-H1JJthTGz4J8Awsss23xwq_-B-KmPc0C1FQ8EeafYT6jng-dwfXSobQ56hY2WDAG3KXTdfmmwchTfyBrlpZOsyRvWLYVvSK6pcCDjbmus9rCpWpS7gD7HiTD471LwSczAUvaWVo4dK5fnLOvMTzUnSR_B8za8yRL5rBO1tqRnZaEULNxDzaSsjBzKNhaU-_14kAiAxbcT7o7WYTNJbUggapA/3wr/Ubg2vM3YR4G4DXRf2bhmCw/h10/aKS0cKt8QwRueTFzCka99qtLIR-24KBJ2BNtfHtHBvw)

clean_body: Our struggles for justice and liberation are interconnected. | | | Friend, While visiting the West Bank in 2021, my colleague Rep. Jamaal Bowman met with my sity (grandmother) and was then blocked at a military checkpoint near her house. He experienced in-person what it’s like for Palestinians to live in fear under constant military presence. And he connects it to his own experience as a Black man in the U.S. growing up with intimidating police forces targeting Black people. Jamaal and I know that our struggles for justice and liberation are interconnected, from the U.S. to Palestine and beyond. And he’s taken principled stands, including by leading a recent letter to President Biden and the State Department, calling for action to ensure that U.S. taxpayer funds don’t support the Israeli government’s human rights abuses against Palestinians. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Jamaal Bowman: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for supporting Palestinian rights and freedom, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib Date: Sat, June 3, 2023 Subject: Jamaal’s courageous leadership on Palestinian rights To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, It’s meaningful to me when my colleagues in Congress take a stand for Palestinian rights, because it requires a lot of political courage in the face of attacks from those who want to maintain the unjust status quo. My colleague Rep. Jamaal Bowman has really stepped up, including by leading a recent letter calling on President Biden and the State Department to ensure that U.S. taxpayer dollars don’t fund human rights abuses by the Israeli government against the Palestinian people. While visiting the West Bank in 2021, Jamaal met with my sity (grandmother) and was then blocked at a military checkpoint near her house. He experienced in-person what it’s like for Palestinians to live in fear under constant military presence. And he connects it to his own experience as a Black man in the U.S. growing up with intimidating police forces targeting Black communities. Black people and Palestinians are criminalized just for existing. Our struggles for justice and liberation are interconnected, from the U.S. to Palestine and beyond. We all deserve human dignity and freedom. Human rights organizations around the world have recognized what Palestinians have said for decades: the Israeli government is oppressing the Palestinian people and systematically denying equal rights to Palestinians—in what constitutes apartheid and ethnic cleansing. And we know that the U.S. is complicit, sending billions of dollars each year to the Israeli military and silencing criticism of Israeli policies. That’s why we need to keep building power in the U.S. Congress to advocate for change. Let’s start by supporting members of Congress like Jamaal Bowman, who are taking the lead despite being targeted for speaking up. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Fellow American, I intend to have a prime spot on the debate stage for the first Presidential debate in August.

I intend to elevate the debate process for the 2024 presidential primary.

I have officially qualified for the debate but we cannot afford to slow down. I also want to make sure I have a front and center spot in August. We need to continue to secure unique grassroots donations to discuss how to actually *FIX* our country.

**[Please take 90 seconds to watch my latest "DEBATE ME" Video ⬇️⬇️](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=3cf76378d9074393a5f67d71454d7b45&_e=GBOOoyo7Mds_E9a0wnkiGg-EmpzRv-mCgMh_Dq9UwTNoECgo8--jD21wHOpLB4fHMf3xrfAV8XaAkKrQPeaooKFHTwviG9VGUzX9LMXTBjfOVykgWUb1KzzMR7_lC6dLXgWhFntaTr1eYH94QG9KOrShJWAwED0vcq6cBUngDxtx71bisQh3c6xUpx58OdNJMJPU5EjcpmUETO5AGFL7vZTyawnrDV1SR5a9xUquspulvwob_NUnSj0j95Gi9JUig77aRE4xVP9LEKwDLWlwDwmL0fFMJ9tr5Wd9f_FZjUxbgOYV_IS6-uYHoPEmST8OCMGOwzUH0seomGg83jo_jLHDlaNS5Dbo2CklhH2Coj78nyz5Fd_UGL-m4Xt30Z8mlmEyJj062cNoF54eTPyV4w%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=3cf76378d9074393a5f67d71454d7b45&_e=GBOOoyo7Mds_E9a0wnkiGg-EmpzRv-mCgMh_Dq9UwTNoECgo8--jD21wHOpLB4fHMf3xrfAV8XaAkKrQPeaooKFHTwviG9VGUzX9LMXTBjfOVykgWUb1KzzMR7_lC6dLXgWhFntaTr1eYH94QG9KOrShJWAwED0vcq6cBUngDxtx71bisQh3c6xUpx58OdNJMJPU5EjcpmUETO5AGFL7vZTyawnrDV1SR5a9xUquspulvwob_NUnSj0j95Gi9JUiYfDxnrL38bgP1pzZs8h6IWQrfA2sR_HdyweAr2vQ4Bas7cJ-6EisaYqPL7U4CZhs74JCiVO2IQ_LNRIU6eRzaa8CBSOTcBoNDXbaowY8vIQabQ6CSKmuKOxJEzW9fBtX1l30fuY91feLFU7Gp8JDNg%3D%3D)
It's going to take radical new ideas to put America back on track - and that's ok. We won't deliver national unity by standing in the proverbial "middle," singing kumbaya and compromising. It's by embracing the radicalism of the ideals that birthed America in 1776.

**[Just one dollar (or more) will help us drive forward and get our ideas a prominent spot on the debate stage.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=3cf76378d9074393a5f67d71454d7b45&_e=GBOOoyo7Mds_E9a0wnkiGg-EmpzRv-mCgMh_Dq9UwTNoECgo8--jD21wHOpLB4fHMf3xrfAV8XaAkKrQPeaooKFHTwviG9VGUzX9LMXTBjfOVykgWUb1KzzMR7_lC6dLXgWhFntaTr1eYH94QG9KOrShJWAwED0vcq6cBUngDxtx71bisQh3c6xUpx58OdNJMJPU5EjcpmUETO5AGFL7vZTyawnrDV1SR5a9xUquspulvwob_NUnSj0j95Gi9JUihCw4GuuiDmFm-WDuvLP5sc9mpW--7HCOA4XOg512DDWnnigK7sxeZJ_gIVDG7SC4tJ3at-ybUX4aehwJhrCryoZU6MKRYRf6ECNZjubbbRH-Tl1IHp5vew44zWcdN-cXeOBdvF8px4uS55hHspgKqg%3D%3D)**

Fellow American, it's a cornerstone of my campaign strategy to debate ANYONE, ANYWHERE, ANYTIME. **If you are afraid to take the debate to MSNBC or CNN,_how are you going to take on Xi Jinping?_**

It's my goal that as many folks as possible see this video and we continue to grow our unique grassroots donor army. **[Will you help me today?](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=3cf76378d9074393a5f67d71454d7b45&_e=GBOOoyo7Mds_E9a0wnkiGg-EmpzRv-mCgMh_Dq9UwTNoECgo8--jD21wHOpLB4fHMf3xrfAV8XaAkKrQPeaooKFHTwviG9VGUzX9LMXTBjfOVykgWUb1KzzMR7_lC6dLXgWhFntaTr1eYH94QG9KOrShJWAwED0vcq6cBUngDxtx71bisQh3c6xUpx58OdNJMJPU5EjcpmUETO5AGFL7vZTyawnrDV1SR5a9xUquspulvwob_NUnSj0j95Gi9JUicaJB8TrLPD8n8t4H4zJJvVyGSZ0975QB2brfgrwfnFUlVhNRCc9LTA4zDGRNmt4lSNbI3H2l6_ihl9klY-OX2bT1rQpFSgk9URWeD3pSxWb9ZWJjAzEJDtqPdxPTtkgn3yxbgMO1Sy0DYN2ojoBQ6A%3D%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I am ready to elevate the debate process for the 2024 presidential primary. | | Fellow American, I intend to have a prime spot on the debate stage for the first Presidential debate in August. I intend to elevate the debate process for the 2024 presidential primary. I have officially qualified for the debate but we cannot afford to slow down. I also want to make sure I have a front and center spot in August. We need to continue to secure unique grassroots donations to discuss how to actually FIX our country. It's going to take radical new ideas to put America back on track - and that's ok. We won't deliver national unity by standing in the proverbial "middle," singing kumbaya and compromising. It's by embracing the radicalism of the ideals that birthed America in 1776. Fellow American, it's a cornerstone of my campaign strategy to debate ANYONE, ANYWHERE, ANYTIME. If you are afraid to take the debate to MSNBC or CNN,how are you going to take on Xi Jinping? It's my goal that as many folks as possible see this video and we continue to grow our unique grassroots donor army. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. | Re-elect Delegate Buddy Fowler

|
---
|

| Please ask Hanover, Louisa, and Henrico friends to vote to re-elect my friend and fellow Republican, Delegate Buddy Fowler in the District 59 primary June 20. The new district 59 is within the boundaries of Senate District 10. I am super excited Governor Glenn Youngkin joined me in endorsing Delegate Buddy Fowler. Please vote in this primary on June 20th. clean_body: | | | | | | == | Re-elect Delegate Buddy Fowler | | | Please ask Hanover, Louisa, and Henrico friends to vote to re-elect my friend and fellow Republican, Delegate Buddy Fowler in the District 59 primary June 20. The new district 59 is within the boundaries of Senate District 10. I am super excited Governor Glenn Youngkin joined me in endorsing Delegate Buddy Fowler. Please vote in this primary on June 20th. You can vote early now through June 17. == | Virginia Guard to Deploy to Southern Border | == | Americans are outraged about our southern border. It is impossible to keep America safe without a secure border. Thousands of illegal immigrants, fentynal, terrorist, and more are impacting the Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness of fellow Americans. I'm glad we have a Governor doing something about it. Governor Youngkin will deploy 100 Virginia National Guard soldiers and 21 support personnel to the U.S. border with Mexico. == | General Williams Retires | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | My brother, Colonel Rusty McGuire, and I attended the retirement ceremony for Virginia National Guard Adjutant General Timothy Williams. It has been an honor working with General Williams over the last six years on legislation and other initiatives that keep Virginians safe and better support our troops. He leaves behind some big shoes to be filled. Thank you Sir for a lifetime of service to our country and our Commonwealth! | Virginia's 29th adjutant general | == | Congratulations to Brig. Gen. James W. Ring on being appointment by Governor Glenn Youngkin as Virginia's 29th Adjutant General, chief administrative officer of the state's Defense Force and Army and Air National Guards "I am incredibly honored and humbled by Governor Youngkin selecting me to lead the more than 9,000 Virginia National Guard Soldiers and Airmen and members of the Virginia Defense Force," Ring said. == | Congratulations Delegate Jason Ballard | == | Landslide victory! On June 3rd, my friend, seat mate, and fellow veteran Jason Ballard won his Firehouse Primary for District 42 with 91.7% of the vote! == | Congratulations Tom Garrett | == | | On May 20, my friend and fellow Veteran Tom Garrett won the Republican nomination for the new House of Delegate District 56. The new District 56 is within the boundaries of the new Senate District 10. == to read the story in the Richmond Times Dispatch. | Amelia Academy Keynote Speaker | | | | | | | | I had the honor of speaking at the Amelia Academy graduation. Amelia Academy's mission is to educate the whole student including, but not limited to, ethical, intellectual, and physical development. We are proud of our new graduates. Thank you to parents, teachers, and staff for preparing our young people for life! | Memorial Day Ceremony Louisa County | | | | | | | | Without our men and women who serve in our military, we would not have a country. Delegate Buddy Fowler and I remembered and honored our fallen at the Louisa County Memorial Day Ceremony. We must never forget. | District Photos | | | | We are making friends all over the district. We look forward to seeing you soon! | The Greek Fest | | | | | | | Tracy and I attended the 45th Annual Richmond Greek Festival, hosted by the Saints Constantine and Helen Greek Orthodox Cathedral. This event has been on hold due to COVID since 2019. The good news is attendance is up with 30,000 plus visitors from all over Central Virginia. We ran into many friends including the Clerk of the House of Delegates, Paul Nardo. Paul and his team do an incredible job keeping legislators and legislation organized and on task. | Louisa Car Show | | | | | | | | | | | | | Delegate Buddy Fowler and I discussed issues important to voters at the Louisa County car show at the Mineral Fire Department this weekend. | Louisa Crawfish Boil | | | | Delegate Buddy Fowler and I enjoyed conversation and good food in Mineral at the Crawfish Boil. | Jack Jouett Day Festival | | | | | | Delegate Buddy Fowler and I attended the Jack Jouett Day Festival on June 3 == | Song of the Day Blake Shelton - God's Country | == | For a little inspiration, == to listen to Blake Shelton - God's Country (Official Music Video)! | == | I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you in the Virginia House of Delegates. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | 70 Plus Endorsement List == | == == You can donate == or by mail. If you'd like to donate by mail, please make a check out to "Friends of John McGuire" and send to: Friends of John McGuire P.O. Box 168 Manakin-Sabot, VA 23103 | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life == Pro-Gun America 1st The Spirit of Virginia Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | Friends of John McGuire | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

name: Sen. Chris Murphy
subject: I'm reaching out personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Friend,

One of my first jobs out of college was as a campaign manager for a U.S. House race in Connecticut. That election, we lost one of the closest races in the country (1587 votes!), but it taught me a lot about running successful campaigns. And if there's one thing I'll never forget, it's that **there is no substitute for early money. I’ll explain more below, but first, I have a request:**

**[Will you split $5 between my campaign and the DSCC to defend my Senate seat in Connecticut and protect our Democratic majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/14140?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230604-SenChrisMurphy-MurphyTandem1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230604-SenChrisMurphy-MurphyTandem1-Pros-sl1&akid=10960%2E9716520%2EEp63oF)**

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/14140?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230604-SenChrisMurphy-MurphyTandem1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230604-SenChrisMurphy-MurphyTandem1-Pros-sl1&akid=10960%2E9716520%2EEp63oF)
---

Listen, I get it: Election cycles are long, and it can feel like we have plenty of time before November 2024. But this time is crucial for campaigns like mine that rely on grassroots supporters like you -- rather than the megadonor groups that Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump turn to.

With your help, we can build critical campaign infrastructure, hire staff on the ground, and make investments in grassroots organizing _right now_ \-- but it’ll only happen with your support. This is the real work that wins elections, even more than TV ads or flashy billboards, and it’s vitally important that we make this time count.

Then later in the campaign, when we're facing outside, far-right forces like McConnell's super PACs or the NRA -- groups with near unlimited resources -- **we'll be ready for whatever they throw at us because you had my back right now.**

**[That’s why I’m personally asking for your help: Will you split $5 or more TODAY between my campaign and the DSCC to help build a people-powered movement and defend our Democratic majority? Every dollar you give makes a huge difference >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/14140?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230604-SenChrisMurphy-MurphyTandem1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230604-SenChrisMurphy-MurphyTandem1-Pros-sl1&akid=10960%2E9716520%2EEp63oF)**

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Friends of Chris Murphy and the DSCC.

| [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/14140?amount=5&t=8&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230604-SenChrisMurphy-MurphyTandem1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230604-SenChrisMurphy-MurphyTandem1-Pros-sl1&akid=10960%2E9716520%2EEp63oF)

---
| [Donate $20](https://go.dscc.org/go/14140?amount=5&t=10&amount=20&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230604-SenChrisMurphy-MurphyTandem1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230604-SenChrisMurphy-MurphyTandem1-Pros-sl1&akid=10960%2E9716520%2EEp63oF)
---
| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/14140?amount=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230604-SenChrisMurphy-MurphyTandem1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230604-SenChrisMurphy-MurphyTandem1-Pros-sl1&akid=10960%2E9716520%2EEp63oF)
---

Every best wish,

Chris Murphy
U.S. Senator, Connecticut

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/14140?amount=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230604-SenChrisMurphy-MurphyTandem1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230604-SenChrisMurphy-MurphyTandem1-Pros-sl1&akid=10960%2E9716520%2EEp63oF)

Chris Murphy has dedicated his career to serving the people of Connecticut. He's fought to create good-paying jobs, expand access to affordable health care, restore voting rights, and keep our kids safe from the nationwide epidemic of gun violence. Now, he needs your help to win re-election so he can continue to deliver for Connecticut and the entire nation.

_**[Chip in $5 now to help Chris Murphy and the DSCC win in Connecticut and defend our Democratic Senate majority >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/14140?amount=5&t=13&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230604-SenChrisMurphy-MurphyTandem1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230604-SenChrisMurphy-MurphyTandem1-Pros-sl1&akid=10960%2E9716520%2EEp63oF)**_

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: An independent journalist
body:
We hope you are enjoying the first weekend of June! As we enter the summer months, we have you covered on what's going on in your own backyard. Read on... | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61881110:WWw1CPDfN:m:1:2610672541:D8EE6253495FB95E606B315E4BBC0F16:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends, We hope you are enjoying the first weekend of June! As we enter the summer months, we have you covered on what's going on in your own backyard. Read on... **This week 's Newsmaker Interview...** Brandi Kruse, the creator and host of the local political podcast "[un]Divided," joined us for this week's Newsmaker Interview. A journalist who has distinguished herself for holding powerful political figures accountable, Kruse shared her thoughts on the creation of her podcast and the growing trend of independent journalism. She also described the negative impact of "one-party" control of government and gave her views on various controversial new events. **_[Read more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61881111:WWw1CPDfN:m:1:2610672541:D8EE6253495FB95E606B315E4BBC0F16:r)_.** **This week 's top story...** Tired of being a punching bag for King County Executive Dow Constantine and liberal activists from the homelessness industrial complex, the Burien City Council is moving forward with allowing the dismantling of an illegal homeless camp. The Burien City Council will not continue allowing people to live in an undeveloped park. The park has been leased to group that will clear it and operate it as a dog park. The move comes despite threats and intimidation efforts from the county into doing what Executive Constantine wants. **[Read more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61881112:WWw1CPDfN:m:1:2610672541:D8EE6253495FB95E606B315E4BBC0F16:r).** **In case you missed it ...** Governor Jay Inslee is not running for re-election, so he no longer needs campaign contributions from tribes. The truth about the deals that had been cut to pass his costly environmental policies are now seeping out. And - as perhaps could be expected - Inslee no longer believes that the state should exempt tribal gas stations from his extreme green policies that have caused fuel prices to skyrocket across the state. **[Read more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61881113:WWw1CPDfN:m:1:2610672541:D8EE6253495FB95E606B315E4BBC0F16:r).** **This week 's wind-down...** Please enjoy Former U.S. Rep. Rod Chandler's beautiful photograph of Falls Creek Falls... | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61881114:WWw1CPDfN:m:1:2610672541:D8EE6253495FB95E606B315E4BBC0F16:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14216379&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWWw1CPDfN).
---

name: David Trone
subject: Criminal justice survey inside (please read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
Team,

The U.S. incarcerates more people than any country in the world.

Right now, we have more than 2.2 million people in prison.

And this mass incarceration is impacting people of color and impoverished communities the most.

It’s a systemic crisis where racial disparities persist at every level, from misdemeanor arrests to life sentences.

I've fought for years to reform our broken criminal justice system. While we've made progress, I'm running for Senate because there's still so much more to do. I want to hear from you on this issue, because your perspective is important:

Do you believe that Congress should take immediate action to reform our criminal justice system? Take the one question survey right now:

YES. We need to immediately reform our criminal justice system. >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/LEerz3qtkk-f2TihX1oyHg2

NO. Our criminal justice system does not need reform. >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/LEerz3qtkk-f2TihX1oyHg2

Thank you for letting me know

David

Take the Survey >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/LEerz3qtkk-f2TihX1oyHg2

Paid for by David Trone for Maryland.
David Trone for Maryland
P.O. Box 83998
Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998
United States

subject: Yard signs don't win elections

body:

That's why our team is sending a yard sign out with

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2fe9fd5e0105078a33248abb76a42808eb9a0d50c1b87c1456747955c81f4b9e8550576a1eb0eb52170cad49009fbf206f53bb0a6111cdabb7213c7524950e02
DONATE TODAY >> GET YOUR YARD SIGN

We hope to see you on the trail,

Team DeSantis

P.S. Friendly reminder that during the month of June, our team is hand-writing the names of the first 100,000 DeSantis for President donors on the walls of the campaign HQ. Consider donating today to see your name go down in history with us!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2fe9fd5e0105078a4643624b87e223efcc6569893f08eec9cb669527fd7aabfbfe2ccd62148f880a2244c461acb2ddb34cc79094f4011c43c4944f5f42c1e566
DONATE ANY AMOUNT TO JOIN TEAM DESANTIS

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2fe9fd5e0105078abdab64aef989471407fe2d7201bcc1e151d64c55727c9eff71f0108fcf50a8886b1bbe0b972d33d6fa5c0711a40c2db84973388fcd1f845d
Sign up here!

Meet Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2fe9fd5e0105078a33248abb76a42808eb9a0d50c1b87c1456747955c81f4b9e8550576a1eb0eb52170cad49009fbf206f53bb0a6111cdabb7213c7524950e02

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
-
Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,
-
Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,
-
Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,
-
Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,
-
Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,
-
Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,
-
Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,
-
Protecting the unborn,
-
Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,
-
Expanding education freedom,
-
Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,
-
Lowering prescription drug costs,
-
Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,
-
Creating a universal school choice program,
-
Delivering record-breaking tax relief,
-
Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,
-
Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,
-
Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,
-
Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,
-
...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
-
Record tax relief
-
ESG prohibitions
-
Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
-
The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
-
Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency
-
Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI
-
Improvements to our state’s infrastructure
-
Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists
-
The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis
-
Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions
-
Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida
No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Peter, Yard signs don't win elections... but we still like them! New Ron DeSantis for President yard signs have arrived and we'd love to send one to you. As our support continues to grow, we want to make sure you're not left behind. These yard signs will be popping up in neighborhoods across the nation, Peter. We don't want you to miss out on our movement. That's why our team is sending a yard sign out with every donation of $47.00 or more for those not officially on Team DeSantis yet. DONATE TODAY >> GET YOUR YARD SIGN We hope to see you on the trail, Team DeSantis P.S. Friendly reminder that during the month of June, our team is hand-writing the names of the first 100,000 DeSantis for President donors on the walls of the campaign HQ. Consider donating today to see your name go down in history with us! DONATE ANY AMOUNT TO JOIN TEAM DESANTIS Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Meet Ron DeSantis A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: - Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, - Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, - Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, - Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, - Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, - Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, - Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, - Protecting the unborn, - Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, - Expanding education freedom, - Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, - Lowering prescription drug costs, - Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, - Creating a universal school choice program, - Delivering record-breaking tax relief, - Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, - Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, - Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, - Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, - ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn’t stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.” Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: - Record tax relief - ESG prohibitions - Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP - The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. - Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency - Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI - Improvements to our state’s infrastructure - Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists - The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis - Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions - Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I gave birth after a 13-hour day in the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I gave birth to my second son, Henry, after putting in a 13-hour day on the floor of the House.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64310431/409683044/1423499192?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4190-su-nd&refcode=jtk4190-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2JmYjQzYi1lOTAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LQQfbe_egSzRoTGQy8Yrk39f-WfQo7pI9o6mZp96He4=&emci=34295102-9300-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=97bfb43b-e902-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
I was proud to work right up until the day I gave birth, but in the months after Henry was born, 13-hour days simply weren't possible. I needed time at home to recover and care for my newborn son. Luckily, as a congresswoman at the time, I had a job that allowed me to take the time I needed to care for myself and my family.
But the fact is, millions of Americans don't have the basic protection of paid leave. Instead, they're forced to make impossible decisions. No working American should have to choose between a paycheck and caring for a loved one, between their job security and taking the time to recover from a serious illness.

**We're the only industrialized nation in the world that fails to provide paid family leave. It's far past time that changes.**
That's why, ten years ago, I first introduced a bill to create guaranteed paid leave for _every single American_. Over the years, I've introduced this bill again and again, working hard to build coalitions and fight for progress.
**Just a few weeks ago, I raised this issue again. And to enact real change, I need grassroots Americans like you to stand with me.[Please, will you add your name to my petition before midnight tonight to show your support for paid family leave?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64310432/409683046/1423499192?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4190-su-nd&refcode=jtk4190-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2JmYjQzYi1lOTAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LQQfbe_egSzRoTGQy8Yrk39f-WfQo7pI9o6mZp96He4=&emci=34295102-9300-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=97bfb43b-e902-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**
| | [SIGN ON NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64310433/409683048/1423499192?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4190-su-nd&refcode=jtk4190-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2JmYjQzYi1lOTAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LQQfbe_egSzRoTGQy8Yrk39f-WfQo7pI9o6mZp96He4=&emci=34295102-9300-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=97bfb43b-e902-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
---
It's impossible to overstate just how truly transformative this legislation would be for working American families.
We need a comprehensive national paid leave program, providing workers with ample support for family or medical leave. Parents shouldn't have to decide between their paycheck and staying home with their sick child. Workers deserve job security, even if they need to take time off for themselves or care for a loved one.
But that's not all: Studies have shown over and over that paid family leave would actually _benefit_ our economy, making life better for _all_ of us.
**Paid leave should be a national priority. And I won't stop fighting until it becomes a reality.[Please, will you join me by adding your name to my petition before midnight tonight? I'm counting on 5,000 engaged Democrats to sign on, so your support here would mean so much.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64310434/409683049/1423499192?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4190-su-nd&refcode=jtk4190-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2JmYjQzYi1lOTAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LQQfbe_egSzRoTGQy8Yrk39f-WfQo7pI9o6mZp96He4=&emci=34295102-9300-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=97bfb43b-e902-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**
| | [SIGN ON NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64310435/409683050/1423499192?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4190-su-nd&refcode=jtk4190-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2JmYjQzYi1lOTAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LQQfbe_egSzRoTGQy8Yrk39f-WfQo7pI9o6mZp96He4=&emci=34295102-9300-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=97bfb43b-e902-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)

With gratitude and love,

Kirsten
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64310436/409683051/1575385346?code=jtk4190-su-nd&refcode=jtk4190-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2JmYjQzYi1lOTAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LQQfbe_egSzRoTGQy8Yrk39f-WfQo7pI9o6mZp96He4=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64310437/409683052/1575385346?code=jtk4190-su-nd&refcode=jtk4190-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2JmYjQzYi1lOTAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LQQfbe_egSzRoTGQy8Yrk39f-WfQo7pI9o6mZp96He4=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64310438/409683053/1575385346?code=jtk4190-su-nd&refcode=jtk4190-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2JmYjQzYi1lOTAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LQQfbe_egSzRoTGQy8Yrk39f-WfQo7pI9o6mZp96He4=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

clean_body: | | | Friend, I gave birth to my second son, Henry, after putting in a 13-hour day on the floor of the House. I was proud to work right up until the day I gave birth, but in the months after Henry was born, 13-hour days simply weren't possible. I needed time at home to recover and care for my newborn son. Luckily, as a congresswoman at the time, I had a job that allowed me to take the time I needed to care for myself and my family. But the fact is, millions of Americans don't have the basic protection of paid leave. Instead, they're forced to make impossible decisions. No working American should have to choose between a paycheck and caring for a loved one, between their job security and taking the time to recover from a serious illness. We're the only industrialized nation in the world that fails to provide paid family leave. It's far past time that changes. That's why, ten years ago, I first introduced a bill to create guaranteed paid leave for every single American. Over the years, I've introduced this bill again and again, working hard to build coalitions and fight for progress. Just a few weeks ago, I raised this issue again. And to enact real change, I need grassroots Americans like you to stand with me. | | It's impossible to overstate just how truly transformative this legislation would be for working American families. We need a comprehensive national paid leave program, providing workers with ample support for family or medical leave. Parents shouldn't have to decide between their paycheck and staying home with their sick child. Workers deserve job security, even if they need to take time off for themselves or care for a loved one. But that's not all: Studies have shown over and over that paid family leave would actually benefit our economy, making life better for all of us. Paid leave should be a national priority. And I won't stop fighting until it becomes a reality. | | With gratitude and love, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: NDRC Democracy Update, me (2)
subject: The latest update on voting rights (good news and bad news)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team –

Last month, we reached out with an urgent update about the latest phase of the GOP’s attack on voting rights. **Here’s where things stand now (there’s good news and bad news):**

**First, the good news:** According to the _Washington Post_ , “While there are ongoing efforts to make it more difficult to vote in many Republican-controlled states, a research group found there has also been **a quiet countermovement to expand access to voting across the country**.”

**This is a direct result of our grassroots efforts!** The NDRC’s work to secure fair maps and elect Democracy Defenders in places like Maryland, Michigan, and Minnesota helped make it possible for Democrats to win full control of those states for the first time in _years_. Now, those states are working to expand voting rights. | [Help the NDRC keep fighting for fairness](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64310996/409685056/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230604_FR_6D_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzM2Y2NGExLWVhMDItZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hAIWsDnFdwA-DPHzdBzJQgbS7Ir8lE8ZAWxupM4Z1og=)
---
**Now, the bad news:** While we’re still awaiting the Supreme Court’s decision in _Allen v. Milligan_ , experts have issued grim predictions. According to _FiveThirtyEight_ , **“The Supreme Court Is On The Verge Of Killing The Voting Rights Act.”**

Republicans aren’t slowing down in their efforts to undermine our democracy, team, so we can’t slow down in our efforts to protect and strengthen it. As President Obama said recently, **“Our democracy is resilient as long as we stay engaged and active.”**

[**_One way you can stay engaged and active in the fight for our democracy is by making a donation to support our work at the NDRC. Can we count on you to pitch in today?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64310997/409685057/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230604_FR_6D_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzM2Y2NGExLWVhMDItZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hAIWsDnFdwA-DPHzdBzJQgbS7Ir8lE8ZAWxupM4Z1og=)

Thank you!

– The NDRC Team

From: **NDRC Democracy Update**
Subject: The next phase in the GOP attack on voting rights:
> This is urgent, team:
>
> **First,** Donald Trump and his GOP allies spread the Big Lie that the 2020 election was “stolen” due to non-existent voter fraud.
>
> **Then,** based on these baseless lies, Republican lawmakers passed _dozens_ of laws making it harder to vote in _nearly half_ of all states.
>
> **Now,** Republican election deniers in Congress are _praising_ these bills. They’ve called them “models” for the kind of voter suppression they hope to pass at the national level!
>
> **And, to make matters worse,** the Supreme Court is currently considering a case that CNN reports “may completely hollow out the Voting Rights Act by 2024.”
> [**_With Republican attacks on voting rights escalating, the NDRC’s efforts to strengthen our democracy and fight for fairness have never been more important. Can we count on you to donate today to help us keep going?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64310998/409685058/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230604_FR_6D_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzM2Y2NGExLWVhMDItZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hAIWsDnFdwA-DPHzdBzJQgbS7Ir8lE8ZAWxupM4Z1og=)
> [Yes! I’m donating to help the NDRC defend democracy](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64310999/409685059/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230604_FR_6D_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzM2Y2NGExLWVhMDItZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hAIWsDnFdwA-DPHzdBzJQgbS7Ir8lE8ZAWxupM4Z1og=)
