clean_body: | Team – Last month, we reached out with an urgent update about the latest phase of the GOP’s attack on voting rights. Here’s where things stand now (there’s good news and bad news): First, the good news: According to the Washington Post , “While there are ongoing efforts to make it more difficult to vote in many Republican-controlled states, a research group found there has also been a quiet countermovement to expand access to voting across the country.” This is a direct result of our grassroots efforts! The NDRC’s work to secure fair maps and elect Democracy Defenders in places like Maryland, Michigan, and Minnesota helped make it possible for Democrats to win full control of those states for the first time in years. Now, those states are working to expand voting rights. | = Now, the bad news: While we’re still awaiting the Supreme Court’s decision in Allen v. Milligan , experts have issued grim predictions. According to FiveThirtyEight , “The Supreme Court Is On The Verge Of Killing The Voting Rights Act.” Republicans aren’t slowing down in their efforts to undermine our democracy, team, so we can’t slow down in our efforts to protect and strengthen it. As President Obama said recently, “Our democracy is resilient as long as we stay engaged and active.” = Thank you! – The NDRC Team \---------- Forwarded Message ---------- From: NDRC Democracy Update Subject: The next phase in the GOP attack on voting rights: This is urgent, team: First, Donald Trump and his GOP allies spread the Big Lie that the 2020 election was “stolen” due to non-existent voter fraud. Then, based on these baseless lies, Republican lawmakers passed dozens of laws making it harder to vote in nearly half of all states. Now, Republican election deniers in Congress are praising these bills. They’ve called them “models” for the kind of voter suppression they hope to pass at the national level! And, to make matters worse, the Supreme Court is currently considering a case that CNN reports “may completely hollow out the Voting Rights Act by 2024.” = = --- The future of voting rights – and the legacy of the Civil Rights movement – are on the line. As Attorney General Eric Holder has warned, “Now is not the time to take our democracy for granted.” The NDRC is NOT taking democracy for granted, team, and we hope you won’t either. Will you pitch in today to power our work? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: --- = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = --- = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Joe Biden
subject: I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain whyit’s so important you chip in a few bucks right now to this campaign:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I believe there’s not a thing we can’t do if we do it together -- and I really mean that. | | |
---
Peter, I don’t send emails like this often. So, I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain just how far we’ve come over these past two years and why **[every contribution our campaign receives right now is important.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zqTn1nB5X1rOxL7-i3KQqZ_wCAa2XScN-OPPqXwNKoi-UWWn2ZmG3x-kXUtrnhbeG34LPsDeEtMff2lOgxLr5upYsdamG2eOnXLdMxgbguMoa-O-kKgTdLnuH5jrqM70oOEIKSL8hd_t-VnTuxwbMlVt-diJ0wWBavlsqFR1qmF9gjKEPtzb2I4UG2HP0YKeOvJBAJ0kAXWwAOTMgTx-jqtJOoPZCAmHfoESSJp6YhTMK4Np4vhiWKOajMQwf15qexHbRr3GjMupaaQDFrn7aU6kFsJxsjPvgowR20250UNxTf1O7pdSpmJ8yD1rcRUcLheTYHwFuhYSzVhyV5RMRBp7KR930ZGVBqVmkLsnUrVJBOuwaVrRE2XBXzdFTOc3lYjt7II4G7_NRPJ2jigRiaZ1XsrKDVEajjhG_l_-6SDHdKzxn6CAMBkWaE2ZEIRhJDySBHRvG6VYwxCaqi1S4wGxh-w4-mj1D2o87K_4mFEg/3wr/QcJqLlYCS12pqubxuLhzYg/h0/peyENRCS9_IZ3QDGMKbsaxi4iwyyyD40vN7TKEHK33g)** We have accomplished so much since Kamala and I were sworn in in January of 2021: We confirmed Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court; passed the first significant federal gun safety law in nearly 30 years; passed the biggest investment in combating climate change in our nation’s history; got to work lowering costs for working families; brought the unemployment rate to its lowest in 50 years... the list goes on. **I believe there’s not a thing we can’t do if we do it together -- and I really mean that.** Folks like you who support our party and our work made all of this possible. Peter, for as much as we’ve accomplished, we have some unfinished business on our agenda. We simply can’t afford to become complacent now. _We must finish the job._ **Will you chip in $25 to our reelection campaign today? Whatever you are able to afford will go a long way toward helping us build a winning reelection campaign.**

clean_body: I believe there’s not a thing we can’t do if we do it together -- and I really mean that. | | | Peter, I don’t send emails like this often. So, I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain just how far we’ve come over these past two years and why We have accomplished so much since Kamala and I were sworn in in January of 2021: We confirmed Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court; passed the first significant federal gun safety law in nearly 30 years; passed the biggest investment in combating climate change in our nation’s history; got to work lowering costs for working families; brought the unemployment rate to its lowest in 50 years... the list goes on. I believe there’s not a thing we can’t do if we do it together -- and I really mean that. Folks like you who support our party and our work made all of this possible. Peter, for as much as we’ve accomplished, we have some unfinished business on our agenda. We simply can’t afford to become complacent now. We must finish the job. Will you chip in $25 to our reelection campaign today? Whatever you are able to afford will go a long way toward helping us build a winning reelection campaign. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thanks to folks like you who donated time and money to support our party through the midterms -- we are delivering on our agenda. But we’re not done yet. Thanks, Joe Joe Biden

name: Rand Paul
subject: Politicians will not save us
body:
The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic.

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7b1d03b27f24ff5a6dadb3ef0677a2b&_e=o9PYyelu50LYkAMiyUU4HsAID9fmlnqQGOKNBLMkQUV-IJ56WymdTgiz9K0nWjq8M5Nu_U8JIA4Tm3o9kX678t5Jq_Y1zexvGvTP3JNCC61IfiKeUD7jxpm0XazqajopjlBJxyA-6MDBn07aIEQ4STNRgh9Kd537NfevlIk-Z_eIJcWuixqLXl8DU1ghmyAH6Cvt6ogaTZ3N_YIUjgoF3TOwmXGmVBzsHaRdmoxAWcX30AxFqwTvurr_O-1adG9LMaApT_uCcdG1_oGV6c-u5k-c0GbVdIeN8rOOWSVCY_-I3h1NyJOeEBLcA-8DDvCM)

Friend,

I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal freedoms it upholds. **Do you want to know something important I 've learned? **

Politicians will not save us.

The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. _Politics is downstream from culture_. Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution.

**Which is why I am supporting the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE):** FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility.

In fact, the Foundation for Economic Education has launched "FEE In the Classroom."

It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teach young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

As thousands of young Americans come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom workshops, their most frequently asked question afterwards is : "_why haven 't I heard these ideas before_?"

You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: _America 's public schools don't teach our nation's founding principles anymore_. But FEE is changing this--and they are doing it in classrooms and virtual classrooms across the country.

[_**I am PERSONALLY supporting FEE In the Classroom and am asking all of my supporters to contribute or even sponsor a FEE In the Classroom program. Please click here to contribute $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $10. **_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7b1d03b27f24ff5a6dadb3ef0677a2b&_e=o9PYyelu50LYkAMiyUU4HsAID9fmlnqQGOKNBLMkQUV-IJ56WymdTgiz9K0nWjq8M5Nu_U8JIA4Tm3o9kX678t5Jq_Y1zexvGvTP3JNCC61IfiKeUD7jxpm0XazqajopjlBJxyA-6MDBn07aIEQ4STNRgh9Kd537NfevlIk-Z_f8vi9SpXbEfBHqgDSGi7sVVNGkRp-yH_3v11PXF3N6GTQt5de4WLwGH0mAzhclUE3LVx5DdTpijdF4wuZWrZkIL6yGsDEC45ebPlazJMTSwRdkH0Gw3da3gbeeHF2i2m3ARF5ocrAJUrWtF4uZ8kkS)

[_**Help more high school and college students learn about free markets, entrepreneurship, and our Founding Principles by supporting FEE In the Classroom!**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7b1d03b27f24ff5a6dadb3ef0677a2b&_e=o9PYyelu50LYkAMiyUU4HsAID9fmlnqQGOKNBLMkQUV-IJ56WymdTgiz9K0nWjq8M5Nu_U8JIA4Tm3o9kX678t5Jq_Y1zexvGvTP3JNCC61IfiKeUD7jxpm0XazqajopjlBJxyA-6MDBn07aIEQ4STNRgh9Kd537NfevlIk-Z_comTDl4u7hG5eH7x66Az6XK262bvph3p2Dh6lLs8u2emCgpGWF3hH91oBdQEo4074QtzCrLLRy7tqCx7sqacweBeBgkTu6ugUTzvh-KO5aJzbP4EAVQr10zPctSTiPziK2XCFVcQFDQrzhentGal-U)

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7b1d03b27f24ff5a6dadb3ef0677a2b&_e=o9PYyelu50LYkAMiyUU4HsAID9fmlnqQGOKNBLMkQUV-IJ56WymdTgiz9K0nWjq8M5Nu_U8JIA4Tm3o9kX678t5Jq_Y1zexvGvTP3JNCC61IfiKeUD7jxpm0XazqajopjlBJxyA-6MDBn07aIEQ4STNRgh9Kd537NfevlIk-Z_eje2EGeMENCDV7lzAYsT__EFgJZYov4y6Ce5PI68gtT2wtgtf88ds7rSEOksewgrbzNPStLHR7DkLbnaGq6QKISpnQUZvf0Gg0sUK0YbrPgijiw0x8mT_PE6rsB0w9Pn7plB9S7QAannICW5O4IX34)

**_Let me tell you more about FEE In the Classroom and why you should support this essential program and FEE 's efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom_.**

It's no secret the Radical Left, Cancel Culture, and big government have teamed up to indoctrinate our nation's youth into embracing socialism.

The sad truth is that free market capitalism, the history of our Founding Fathers, entrepreneurship, and are NOT being taught in high schools or college campuses across the country.

FEE's President, Zilvinas Silenas, knows this more than anyone... Zilvinas once lived under the Soviet Union's Communist rule in Lithuania. He's now made it his life's mission to educate young people about the dangers of socialism and how free markets and free people solve problems.

Trust me... if some of my colleagues in the U.S. Senate attended a FEE In the Classroom teaching, we would not be the same mess we are in today.

**Here is our goal:** I am trying to help FEE raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund FEE In the Classroom workshops for over 1,000 students. I hope you will consider making a donation of ANY size by using one of the links below:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7b1d03b27f24ff5a6dadb3ef0677a2b&_e=o9PYyelu50LYkAMiyUU4HsAID9fmlnqQGOKNBLMkQUV-IJ56WymdTgiz9K0nWjq8M5Nu_U8JIA4Tm3o9kX678t5Jq_Y1zexvGvTP3JNCC61IfiKeUD7jxpm0XazqajopjlBJxyA-6MDBn07aIEQ4SaQj_PkVGVchGP6umF3PgZfa6Znoa9vOYUI_hpgPFnqTT6Z0VrnPi2fh6c2KEM8VjEc2-ic9XANVEGrK7sL_uw1X1hT3e_BUVIKmdnpSS3L6SUALyotDoPxB2ekNRT0qyb-0HNyYzUC9dMQbORWA1aMww4cmhT-voaarb72MDnbyUWGOaKp4XE81H5E7o64A1A%3D%3D)

Friend, I'm sure you share my frustration with the direction of our country. We cannot count on our government for fiscal restraint, nor our schools or universities for any fair argument for free-market ideas.

[_**Today I invite you to join me, and thousands of other committed Americans, in supporting FEE and contributing to the economic education of the young men and women who will lead our nation tomorrow.**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7b1d03b27f24ff5a6dadb3ef0677a2b&_e=o9PYyelu50LYkAMiyUU4HsAID9fmlnqQGOKNBLMkQUV-IJ56WymdTgiz9K0nWjq8M5Nu_U8JIA4Tm3o9kX678t5Jq_Y1zexvGvTP3JNCC61IfiKeUD7jxpm0XazqajopjlBJxyA-6MDBn07aIEQ4STNRgh9Kd537NfevlIk-Z_erxv0mbP7pkHZfFMSG2zAaYK8UfBcB41FrKuuKPa7SducxbfMMUEJISkrYablWnwIafz-0sV2df0562HvqEQBRzDrAC-cdAImnbxwm_qJQqMU5-1l-mYW6RQA2o-OhBZD06-Vl1wL5URM4hF_-68Ol)

Senator Rand Paul

clean_body: The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. Friend, I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal freedoms it upholds. Do you want to know something important I 've learned? Politicians will not save us. The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. Politics is downstream from culture. Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution. Which is why I am supporting the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE): FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility. In fact, the Foundation for Economic Education has launched "FEE In the Classroom." It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teach young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government. As thousands of young Americans come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom workshops, their most frequently asked question afterwards is : "why haven 't I heard these ideas before?" You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: America 's public schools don't teach our nation's founding principles anymore. But FEE is changing this--and they are doing it in classrooms and virtual classrooms across the country. Let me tell you more about FEE In the Classroom and why you should support this essential program and FEE 's efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom. It's no secret the Radical Left, Cancel Culture, and big government have teamed up to indoctrinate our nation's youth into embracing socialism. The sad truth is that free market capitalism, the history of our Founding Fathers, entrepreneurship, and are NOT being taught in high schools or college campuses across the country. FEE's President, Zilvinas Silenas, knows this more than anyone... Zilvinas once lived under the Soviet Union's Communist rule in Lithuania. He's now made it his life's mission to educate young people about the dangers of socialism and how free markets and free people solve problems. Trust me... if some of my colleagues in the U.S. Senate attended a FEE In the Classroom teaching, we would not be the same mess we are in today. Here is our goal: I am trying to help FEE raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund FEE In the Classroom workshops for over 1,000 students. I hope you will consider making a donation of ANY size by using one of the links below: Friend, I'm sure you share my frustration with the direction of our country. We cannot count on our government for fiscal restraint, nor our schools or universities for any fair argument for free-market ideas. I hope I can count on your support and see your name on the list of FEE's newest supporters. Thank you for everything, Senator Rand Paul Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

clean_body: RESPOND IMMEDIATELY | Not interested? . Dear Peter, We are facing a critical moment in our nation's history, and to secure the future of our country and our values. The time is now to stand with Chairwoman Elise Stefanik, the bold conservative leader who has been officially re-elected as House GOP Conference Chair. As you know, the Elise Stefanik has been a shining example of a conservative voice in Congress, consistently standing up against their socialist plans and putting America First. Now, we need to know if you are with us. We need to know if you stand with Chairwoman Stefanik and her leadership within the Republican Party. PLEASE CONFIRM YOUR INFORMATION BELOW: | | PLEASE SIGN NOW >> The deadline to submit your response is 11:59 PM TONIGHT. Time is running out, and we cannot afford to wait any longer. Your response will help shape the future of our party and our nation. Please, do not let this opportunity pass you by. Take action now to support Chairwoman Stefanik and the conservative movement. | Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter. Republican Action Alerts

| Fellow activist, 104 years ago today, Congress passed the 19th Amendment, finally beginning the process of ratification to correct one of the greatest injustices in our nation’s history and give women the right to vote.

Yet not all women enjoyed this right equally, despite the vital role Black, Indigenous and other women of color played in winning it.

Poll taxes, literacy tests, grandfather clauses disenfranchising the descendants of the formerly enslaved, months-long voter registration deadlines, and every other tool of voter suppression available was applied to keep Black, Indigenous and other women of color from exercising their newfound right to vote.

**[We have made significant progress, but the fight for EVERYONE’S suffrage continues today. Pitch in $10 now to help fund our work to register historically disenfranchised communities, including and especially women of color, and make the lasting expansion of the electorate we need to win Fellow Conservative,

June marks the beginning of our first full month since launching our 2024 election bid:
**🇺 🇸 RON DESANTIS FOR PRESIDENT 🇺🇸 **
In May, we raised over $8.2M because of over 40,000 generous donors. **This month, we want to prove how much your support means to us. **

**Our team has decided to build a giant donor wall with the names of our first 100,000 donors (that includes our first 40,000 donors already). Not because we don't enjoy our beige walls but because when we say you 're a part of this team we mean it - your support is the foundation of our campaign.**

Every day when our team is in the office, we think about the mission and the people across the country who have chipped in because they're focused on it with us. We take that responsibility and that trust very seriously, and we want everyone who works here to see it.

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/au-em-june2023? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/au-em-june2023?]

Happy Pride Month!

This month, we honor and celebrate our LGBTQ+ community, recognizing their invaluable contributions, and recommitting ourselves to the essential principles of equality and justice.

This year, I was honored to sign groundbreaking legislation that expands the Elliott-Larsen Civil Rights Act to provide comprehensive protection against discrimination based on sexual orientation and gender identity. This protection covers critical areas like employment, education, housing, real estate, public accommodations, and services. I’m so proud we got this done together.

Elliott-Larsen Civil Rights Act bill signing. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP37/1/90099/images/Elliott-Larsen.jpg]

Friend, I know it’s not just about the law; our work is about building a stronger and more prosperous Michigan. And guess what: our economic growth thrives on welcoming all people to our state. By creating an inclusive environment where every citizen can live without prejudice, we foster a brighter future for everyone.

Thank you for your unwavering support. May this Pride Month be filled with joy, celebration, and a deep appreciation for the positive impact we can make when we stand together.

With heartfelt pride,

Gretchen Whitmer

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/au-em-june2023?]

name: Juliana at United We Dream Action
subject: About last week’s DACA hearing
body:

We need to prepare for the worst case scenario, Peter, which is why we’re demanding President Biden and Congress work together to deliver citizenship for DACA recipients and all undocumented people. **Rush in a $10 donation to help UWDA fight for permanent protections before it’s too late. Judge Hanen could rule against DACA any day now.** | | [Donate Now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8mx_5ABkFHmeFViL7NEeBD_AogMf18kAB-piHwjkW8FG7TPgUNVnhcPk0DPlgHC_PAJYc_uny6gZ2Bt3HViuIeb3GGWI_QRUIUItymgQAB7FOALsyIGxi5q0zQ_0lym3EYV9Q_PSqilIgdmpJ7PfU3QfiCMxDdCDMXD2iLEAnngX9D6WGeiE684c5mK1I5SMGBdbAUF577R2-569NBFH66loJb5IMZt7Mwm8UhJldZnxb5LifnRWHOeaE4UpO5s3h14XezwW_2RrBV-al-h3MWBl5sloFAVFWbj3yWwL3ftgTRXioD672yUQlDeFPD1ozzF4VQ1CuB5rMV_cRvopixxcnkwP6FL4GjFTQMnNOb5YFNQHYZdojdPN4H7DOVNYQaS72f0fDOivNky2gUz1RJQ/3wr/A9fm45XTR1CUINZfrq6QwQ/h2/91DW0FFfqDiMCOsLQ2-U6kq_EaNGwbBTg_Ux2c1hBrM)
---
Judge Hanen is the reason DACA is closed to new applicants. His 2021 ruling against DACA has prevented immigrant youth from applying to DACA for the first time.
Even though current recipients can continue to renew their DACA status, that may not be true for much longer as courts like Judge Hanen’s threaten the future of the program for everyone.
We’re no strangers to attacks on DACA. When Trump tried to illegally end DACA, we fought back and went all the way to the Supreme Court to defend it.
But at the end of the day, DACA is still a temporary solution. We need more. We deserve more.
**UWDA is leading the fight for permanent protections — for DACA recipients and all undocumented people — because we are here to stay, regardless of what anti-immigrant leaders like Judge Hanen have to say.**
As we scale up our advocacy work to win our demands in Congress and pressure the Biden administration to deliver on its promises, we are counting on support from grassroots allies like you, Peter.
**Rush a donation to support United We Dream Action’s fight for DACA recipients and all undocumented people. We need to secure a pathway to citizenship before it’s too late.**

name: Arizona Democratic Party
subject: Celebrating Pride Month!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| Friends,

In June, the Arizona Democratic Party is proud to stand together with the LGBTQ+ community and allies in celebrating Pride Month.

Pride Month is a powerful reminder of the ongoing fight for LGBTQ+ rights and commemorates those pushing the movement for equality forward. We also need to acknowledge the work that lies ahead of us.

Together we are dedicated to creating a more inclusive Arizona where every person – regardless of sexual orientation or gender identity – is treated the same.

The Arizona Democratic Party has been and will continue to strongly advocate for LGBTQ+ rights.

We encourage everyone this month to stand together and advocate for a state where everyone is free to be themselves.

Happy Pride Month!

The Arizona Democratic Party

I first became active in politics because of the assault on women’s sports and women’s spaces. As a D1 swimmer for the University of Kentucky who was forced to compete against biological males, and even share locker rooms with men, I felt like our elected leaders had abandoned us — until Governor Ron DeSantis.
---
|
---
Governor DeSantis shined a spotlight on the cruelty girls and women were being subjected to, and even went as far as to reinstate victories of women who had lost titles and sacrificed their athletic careers because of these men competing in our leagues... and for that, he was ripped apart in the media. But Peter, Governor DeSantis did NOT back down.

I want someone like that in the White House — someone who will fight for us. Governor Ron DeSantis’ record is simply second to none. That’s just who the Governor is. He’s taken on the political establishment, woke corporations, and legacy media — and he’s won.

There’s only one candidate in this race who has truly walked the walk rather than just offered soundbites on these issues — and that’s Governor Ron DeSantis. It’s an easy choice.

In a moment when everything in our culture feels like it’s upside down, that’s the kind of strength we need in the White House to put us back on the right track.

In America today, sanity is in short supply, and common sense has become an uncommon virtue — but Governor Ron DeSantis has proven with his leadership that he can put an end to these woke Olympics, and I can’t wait.
---

This is Congressman James Comer. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

Now, as Chairman of the House Oversight Committee, I am spearheading our commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning.**_

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. _**[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8cbdfbce1f1143518e7dae1dd883c3fd&_e=kw27zHMNmuABbW78xTZCGerZtcsrjLQi6Ps3R86ZvLPN30Ch6JX4ERfssZlMIIVOcvmwg_56ucHMVBl_kMw8YjpQVcWq4bOGgZ6iWJZRvLjFR03fo8YNylArNCazs3gQbt5VScxiokJYck3kJCHTu5ZFDFjaClxjhQXD7EUMPGqnXkPdJqVVcDnStZDdwDvdV7XjDshPdKYh5gkhjLY2TvqZHdgUcjXFt6mwIkBf9N3sc_P9CapWK0Aye2hqann0xucFidld9KTF51rAjUTCvZO30nkgb7UKzpbiDpfWA72PBohjGmpe1VLQeWfh7gKoGdaXSO4s2Dcg71iZPDRhCt2NQ3q2emDcCFY3PpgtmqH9M53vDhNUll_0wwVmEzlLyXEFP41VXWn8jLpwj4jHIA1BZl9AnR-JTQSmkiD_Gelt9EVkYrfHY536gAkUZr6ruZtsR56hmO-SOy6G1iaffg%3D%3D "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**_

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: A gay kid named Eric.
body:
| Happy Pride Month, Peter.

Pride has taken on a new meaning for me this year. It's my first as a member of Congress, and as the first openly gay federal representative elected in Illinois state history!

I'm an example of the progress that's been made on LGBTQ rights. But the truth is, it wasn't long ago that I was just a gay kid named Eric who never really believed I'd be accepted as a TV meteorologist -- let alone as a member of Congress.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64314235/409696169/-665437442?refcode=em-6.4.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTg2ODkzMi1mNjAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ULkYFrD0AH1b4OGsi6JiGAXorEqpzYqjShdO29WkXZk=)
After my first job as meteorologist in East Texas, I experienced discrimination and was ultimately pushed out of my job for being gay. Management was clear:

**“We can’t have a gay meteorologist at channel 7, Eric.”**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64314236/409696170/-665437442?refcode=em-6.4.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTg2ODkzMi1mNjAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ULkYFrD0AH1b4OGsi6JiGAXorEqpzYqjShdO29WkXZk=)
_The suits have gotten an upgrade since my Texas days..._
It was a tough time, but after job searching and soul searching, I got the opportunity of a lifetime -- to serve my hometown of Rockford, Illinois -- where I could be my true, proud self. The rest, as they say, is history.

**So for those struggling this Pride Month, know that there’s hope. Whether it's your 10th year openly celebrating, your first, or maybe you're not ready to just yet -- know that you are loved and that I'm proud of you.**

Thanks for your time and support, and Happy Pride Month! 🌈

Eric

clean_body: | Happy Pride Month, Peter. Pride has taken on a new meaning for me this year. It's my first as a member of Congress, and as the first openly gay federal representative elected in Illinois state history! I'm an example of the progress that's been made on LGBTQ rights. But the truth is, it wasn't long ago that I was just a gay kid named Eric who never really believed I'd be accepted as a TV meteorologist -- let alone as a member of Congress. = After my first job as meteorologist in East Texas, I experienced discrimination and was ultimately pushed out of my job for being gay. Management was clear: “We can’t have a gay meteorologist at channel 7, Eric.” = The suits have gotten an upgrade since my Texas days... It was a tough time, but after job searching and soul searching, I got the opportunity of a lifetime -- to serve my hometown of Rockford, Illinois -- where I could be my true, proud self. The rest, as they say, is history. So for those struggling this Pride Month, know that there’s hope. Whether it's your 10th year openly celebrating, your first, or maybe you're not ready to just yet -- know that you are loved and that I'm proud of you. Thanks for your time and support, and Happy Pride Month! 🌈 Eric | = | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, = To volunteer on Eric's campaign, We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Eric Sorensen Eric Sorensen for Illinois P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States

clean_body: With your support, we can send our elected officials a resounding message that climate action is our top priority and it must be theirs too. | = | Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I know you get a lot of emails from me and our team. I won’t take up too much of your time, but I have an important ask: = | = We have to protect our planet. As the devastating toll of climate change intensifies, our window of opportunity to address the crisis narrows. We need to hold our elected officials accountable to pass climate legislation. CT-O5 is a top battleground district and could decide whether or not we can flip Congress from red to blue in 2024, or if we will face another two years of inaction, obstruction, and dangerous policies that cut necessary programs for our most vulnerable. Peter Willis,

Republican fascism is the greatest threat to
our safety, and Our Revolution is doing everything possible to stop it
before it leads to unimaginable pain.

That means standing up to weaponized hatred at both a federal and state
level, and on June 20th, we have a chance to reverse the Glenn Youngkin
led fascist backsliding in Virginia.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Republican power grab in Ohio this August: Your help needed.
body:
Abortion rights at risk in Ohio
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T198c651c-88c6-4270-8f4e-52c2f7b53964/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[We Must Stop Them From Stealing Abortion Rights in The Dark Of NIght](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc3298e9d-5c23-4e4e-9c47-c2c5709e49ba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). ** _Last year, many states supported ballot measures to protect choice. Blue states like California, Michigan & Vermont. But also red states, where extremists produced ballot measures to ban abortion. They lost them all and the right to choose was affirmed in Kentucky, Kansas & Montana. Oops._ **_Now Ohio's set to vote on a November ballot measure to decide the fates of 11,800,000 residents, of which 6 million are women. So, GOP state legislators, knowing they'll lose, are doing what they do best: Cheating._** **The gerrymandered jackals passed legislation creating a special August election--wasting millions in taxpayer dollars--to get ahead of the choice vote with their own measure to fix the vote--changing necessary support for an amendment in Ohio from 50% to 60%**_. _**Outrageous** _._ **_We must get the word out to Ohioans NOW that they must turn out in August to vote against this ridiculous power grab by Republican zealots._** _Ohioans for Reproductive Choice, who got this measure on the ballot, is out there educating people about the GOP's treachery. Per their recent email:_ Join the _Vote Not In August_ campaign to educate Ohioans about the extreme proposal to make it harder to amend our state constitution. Together we will defeat this extreme measure on August 8, then secure abortion rights on the November ballot. The next several months are make-or-break for the future of our great state. _We stop them now, or we may never be able to, and believe me when I say they'll export this 60% threshold to other states if it works in Ohio._ [**_So will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Ohioans for Reproductive Justice, to stop Republican cheating and enshrine abortion rights in Ohio's Constitution?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T078b8bfe-ce11-49be-b6b1-50821b55e9f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting for decency and humanity wherever it's needed._ Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T924555d1-0dfe-485c-bc2e-9ab4733a43f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb02b702d-bb4b-4b83-b93f-9e56bd51d3b1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

The gerrymandered jackals passed legislation creating a special August election--wasting millions in taxpayer dollars--to get ahead of the choice vote with their own measure to fix the vote--changing necessary support for an amendment in Ohio from 50% to 60%. Outrageous . We must get the word out to Ohioans NOW that they must turn out in August to vote against this ridiculous power grab by Republican zealots. Ohioans for Reproductive Choice, who got this measure on the ballot, is out there educating people about the GOP's treachery. Per their recent email: Join the Vote Not In August campaign to educate Ohioans about the extreme proposal to make it harder to amend our state constitution. Together we will defeat this extreme measure on August 8, then secure abortion rights on the November ballot. The next several months are make-or-break for the future of our great state. We stop them now, or we may never be able to, and believe me when I say they'll export this 60% threshold to other states if it works in Ohio. Thank you for fighting for decency and humanity wherever it's needed. Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

Peter, have you heard of the “summer slump”? It might be a little inside baseball, so let us break it down → The “summer slump” is a phenomenon that we see in politics every single summer when fundraising slows way down. Schools are out, families travel, folks spend more time outside and less time online. That means fewer people see these emails and our fundraising dries up. It makes sense! But the issue is, there is no summer slump on the other side. When Republicans see a dip in fundraising, they can just cozy up to their shady super PAC friends and ask for huge checks to make up the difference. We don’t have that luxury. We rely entirely on grassroots donations from folks like you to power our work. That’s why we’re trying to get ahead of the summer slump right now. clean_body: | = Peter, have you heard of the “summer slump”? It might be a little inside baseball, so let us break it down → The “summer slump” is a phenomenon that we see in politics every single summer when fundraising slows way down. Schools are out, families travel, folks spend more time outside and less time online. That means fewer people see these emails and our fundraising dries up. It makes sense! But the issue is, there is no summer slump on the other side. When Republicans see a dip in fundraising, they can just cozy up to their shady super PAC friends and ask for huge checks to make up the difference. We don’t have that luxury. We rely entirely on grassroots donations from folks like you to power our work. That’s why we’re trying to get ahead of the summer slump right now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

"So with that in mind, why wouldn’t we put you on the actual brick-and-mortar of Ron DeSantis for President HQ?" Don't believe us? We 'll be pushing out live updates weekly so you can see how your support holds up the walls of our home base. Fellow Conservative, we have pledged to you to never lose sight of our mission -- to achieve our Great American Comeback. Despite what the woke mob will tell you, STEP 1 is building the resources we need to win this election. We are so excited to see your name on our walls here at HQ. "Chip in ANY amount you can today to leave your mark on what will be an unprecedented and historic moment for our nation." | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | You belong here, Fellow Conservative. This month, we are dedicated to proving that to you. But hurry! We're going to complete this project by June 30 and we want you included. | | We'll see you at HQ, Team DeSantis Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The truth about America’s Christian heritage
body:
Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6d051c8494254a1e94c18bff7c85df4f&_e=ahwrh0mK60i-REZzt1n1m4KS46EQRl1j7Uv54hq_VsIG-fD1A7qVtzkPvRjysCv6kuId3-LYqIubLdKfpsKb6a0fTD2LoaMxAGw9GoBT7sLZNXAYMSWw-liSj017toTehJ42ll9ExDhsiBoYSOAr9JI8MtevNoNWdVXa20SYBOnhFtfH278NuQS6xNnDbgrgwuDNj4i_P6pWzXw_96dJWLyfWMsMEKIei5NjCNObCM0GEnvnF2sJaPUycmyeQURIOq8dXb12QAcAbPxjwK2vflGtoEVMm6QkcQBp-NX-hyum184zBcJkymzhdyG2kWw62KfyxzJSuduHmUZoZLsJKkHQNNc4QDDjK9gNd6QMlYa2jNN-Nl4UZRrPfi2PHJxDtaeWCTjRG9IzruU_JCbwCA%3D%3D)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I've written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you'll appreciate.
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6d051c8494254a1e94c18bff7c85df4f&_e=ahwrh0mK60i-REZzt1n1m4KS46EQRl1j7Uv54hq_VsIG-fD1A7qVtzkPvRjysCv6kuId3-LYqIubLdKfpsKb6a0fTD2LoaMxAGw9GoBT7sLZNXAYMSWw-liSj017toTehJ42ll9ExDhsiBoYSOAr9JI8MtevNoNWdVXa20SYBOnhFtfH278NuQS6xNnDbgrgwuDNj4i_P6pWzXw_96dJWLyfWMsMEKIei5NjCNObCM0GEnvnF2sJaPUycmyeQURIP0HRTXX0wiByEmjtdqUoU4RELFRFDAQU1khDANLQa7WmE2TPCCRIjWUkwH7nSBKbEA8flqZb_e_y7nOGRt9SbsIXxu4C6N6B2tYYkz8E5irqumC4nFrvuO_RHis362M-xV5AYHfIqkGQzQmSXU0o_g%3D%3D)
---
| | I would love for you to read this book and discover the truth about our nation's Christian heritage. As a token of appreciation for any gift you can make to Pathway to Victory today, we'll send you a copy of the book. You can secure your copy by donating here: [https://ptv.org/donate/america-is-a-christian-nation-by-dr-robert-jeffress/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6d051c8494254a1e94c18bff7c85df4f&_e=ahwrh0mK60i-REZzt1n1m4KS46EQRl1j7Uv54hq_VsIG-fD1A7qVtzkPvRjysCv6kuId3-LYqIubLdKfpsKb6a0fTD2LoaMxAGw9GoBT7sLZNXAYMSWw-liSj017toTehJ42ll9ExDhsiBoYSOAr9JI8MtevNoNWdVXa20SYBOnhFtfH278NuQS6xNnDbgrgwuDNj4i_P6pWzXw_96dJWLyfWMsMEKIei5NjCNObCM0GEnvnF2sJaPUycmyeQURIq8wCtBY2TQJUiqaK4R3VaxpEgvan5vaBYtC-ECHt5uCChRv8ewdg2LozbVhmUMFOeDCYFpaYs7ey3DkgQQe7M8iDPFILzdPqI3RLVKHiDe_LaN9sF_AEuJsEE1edsuFlm-9LR2cvqX2wMDKdzoa5qw%3D%3D)

Your donation will be matched dollar-for-dollar thanks to a $500,000 matching challenge that ends on July 4th.

As believers, we must preserve America's unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. By understanding our nation's Christian roots, we can work to bring our country back to its founding principles. At the end of my book, I provide suggestions for how to do just that.

I hope you'll consider donating to _Pathway to Victory_ and receiving your copy of _America Is a Christian Nation_ so you can know without a doubt that the foundation of our country was solidly established in the principles of the Bible.

Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress

name: Letitia James
subject: before we enter the next half of the year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64330926/409711573/-1997846888?code=jtk1100-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2JlN2Y1Yi0wMjAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k0LQrYHSRGyMP5GbU90V98X1-umW4L4dymL3ABuuIxg=)
---
Peter, I didn’t grow up with power or privilege.
I was born and raised in a working-class family in one of Brooklyn’s many diverse neighborhoods. And, throughout my entire childhood and into my young adulthood, I had no real platform to voice my opinions or speak out against the decisions that were _directly_ affecting me and my family.
But when I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black women _ever_ to serve as New York's attorney general, I vowed that I would never let another person feel as voiceless as I did then. **And this priorities survey is a key part of upholding that vow.**
**Peter, I will _always_ fight for you and your loved ones – but to do that most effectively, I must know what concerns are top of mind for you. That's why I sent around my Mid-Year Priorities Survey – but it looks like your response is still _missing_.**
| | **2023 MID-YEAR PRIORITIES SURVEY**
---
NAME: Peter
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
STATUS: INCOMPLETE
Please record your response before 11:59 p.m. to make your voice heard
---

**[Please, will you take my priorities survey before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64330928/409711576/-37019199?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1100-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2JlN2Y1Yi0wMjAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k0LQrYHSRGyMP5GbU90V98X1-umW4L4dymL3ABuuIxg=&emci=ca2bac6b-9f00-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=17be7f5b-0203-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
For millions across our nation, 2023 has been a _devastating_ year. Millions came into the year with little to no reproductive freedom, the gun violence epidemic has continued to claim hundreds more lives, and far-right lawmakers have waged their culture wars on every aspect of our lives – from our schools to our libraries.
And while I will _never_ bow or break in the face of a hard challenge, I must know where your top priorities lie so I can ensure I'm doing everything I can to best defend you.
**I'm looking for at least 5,000 fearless fighters like you to update your top priorities with my team as we head into the next half of the year. So _please_ : [Will you take 60 seconds now to share your top priorities with my team so I can continue to fight for the things that matter most to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64330929/409711578/-37019199?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1100-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2JlN2Y1Yi0wMjAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k0LQrYHSRGyMP5GbU90V98X1-umW4L4dymL3ABuuIxg=&emci=ca2bac6b-9f00-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=17be7f5b-0203-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64330930/409711579/-37019199?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1100-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2JlN2Y1Yi0wMjAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k0LQrYHSRGyMP5GbU90V98X1-umW4L4dymL3ABuuIxg=&emci=ca2bac6b-9f00-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=17be7f5b-0203-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

name: Working Families Party
subject: How we can show up for our LGBTQ+ siblings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Happy Pride, Peter — As we celebrate Pride Month, it is crucial that we remember our history. Pride is not just a parade or a celebration — it is an act of resistance. This month we are celebrating by uplifting the stories of LGBTQ+ activists, organizers, and icons, like **Marsha P. Johnson** and**Sylvia Rivera** , who were instrumental in the Stonewall Riots and went on to found STAR to address issues impacting sex workers, trans youth, the homeless, and the incarcerated. And **Angie Xtravaganza** , a Puerto Rican voguer who started a Latine ballroom house known as Xtravaganza which is still around today. As well as **Renée Richards** , a doctor and trans pioneer in tennis who played in the U.S. Open. And radical feminist, professor, philosopher, civil rights activist, and poet **Audre Lorde** whose powerful prose gave words to a movement. This year, as we honor the icons who came before us, we do so with a renewed sense of urgency, as recent events have shaken our LGBTQ+ community and reminded us of the critical importance of our ongoing fight for equality, acceptance, and basic human rights. **[Help us uplift the stories of LGBTQ+ icons who came before us by sharing their stories on social media.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhkjyHYqt8H8hDV-_Pd8DlhN4z-pz9keHd1CtmEen-uqiTgUXRI5xZCligsjJk6H2YM31lmpCKWkklvklVvDAb7uL1hW_rb_EP0bJJOCDqFIV2GclWqcSoXi8Y7KOuAGizojcO8b2Vepbie3oV1OtanbSX6wk26VSusFx152-s6df_zKT6ATtWMde8SkcGkk1IXhrOUwpXIYXuqvvxb1djgr9ItzCPWIRv7Ubb0o6_5PNuiDPDjPYhy5Z-3zH6prlaiTWYjzOp7ykLlCxNaiPJvnAU3l3-07efTDP9Dsnm0SV81dELBqLpKXQODjoyiTHtQ/3wr/vOA3PdMtQJaJS2aX0M8CAg/h0/pWkaPdScSqRkQfoCow8-K9_M8FX4Su5g3w57__VmLLQ)** clean_body: | | | Happy Pride, Peter — As we celebrate Pride Month, it is crucial that we remember our history. Pride is not just a parade or a celebration — it is an act of resistance. This month we are celebrating by uplifting the stories of LGBTQ+ activists, organizers, and icons, like Marsha P. Johnson andSylvia Rivera , who were instrumental in the Stonewall Riots and went on to found STAR to address issues impacting sex workers, trans youth, the homeless, and the incarcerated. And Angie Xtravaganza , a Puerto Rican voguer who started a Latine ballroom house known as Xtravaganza which is still around today. As well as Renée Richards , a doctor and trans pioneer in tennis who played in the U.S. Open. And radical feminist, professor, philosopher, civil rights activist, and poet Audre Lorde whose powerful prose gave words to a movement. This year, as we honor the icons who came before us, we do so with a renewed sense of urgency, as recent events have shaken our LGBTQ+ community and reminded us of the critical importance of our ongoing fight for equality, acceptance, and basic human rights. Across the country, reactionary Republican lawmakers have introduced a record-breaking number of bills this year attacking the LGBTQ+ community, with trans youth being especially targeted. 1 From banning access to gender affirming care to heavily regulating discussions around LGBTQ+ people in schools to banning drag shows — it has never been more important to stand in solidarity with our LGBTQ+ brothers, sisters, and non-binary siblings. We cannot let hate go unchallenged or allow fear to silence us. We must unite in solidarity and take a stand against discrimination in all its forms. In love and solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , USA Today, March 31, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know.
