name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: For God and Country: A Musical Tribute to America
body:
For a limited time, we are offering a brand-new music CD from the First Baptist Dallas Choir

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24210bc91a884aee838d4e93831b22de&_e=d8nW8lO76916wrmZgef81TBH6p5B64SRuRORu6pGk_aIdQFDqziuijE6s_bqKIXuplaqtDoK6atcfotU-0Cn09BAdC-_8de995iDZRZAtcX34x8OaisXR_1BO3WHW2iquRr8MwW6IZ2CEimDw_WkwaoXNQZV9lBuandvIO7epXYXYsAyZv1VQuJ7XwLBgkYl0ggFscT_keNKxkIBEZQm6FlNRoOI8dD73C0d1NPSNVLkw0Ofd_UkwITA1wJ7JMXI9TrR5x6dvEupJ50sQHbDGPqQl0yiYmAQxDvkIacB9Y_RYGq_Fo0d9NRCYE_xCUeQ_v_vUhHTHGoxwkMLm9928gsMj_4pgDkMY-n4hm4Wdso%3D)
---
Hello, For a limited time, we are offering a brand-new music CD from the First Baptist Dallas Choir and Orchestra called _For God and Country_. This beautiful collection features some of the most beloved patriotic songs ever written, performed by some of the most talented musicians in the country. Songs like "God Bless America" and "America the Beautiful" are not just musical masterpieces--they are timeless expressions of the love that we Americans have for our country and the godly values it stands for.

"God Bless America," for example, was written by Irving Berlin during World War I to express his gratitude for the opportunities that America had given him. Later, during the Great Depression, it became a rallying cry for a nation needing hope and unity. And today, it remains a beloved anthem that reminds us of the blessings we enjoy as Americans--blessings bestowed on us by God Himself.

Similarly, "America the Beautiful" was written by Katharine Lee Bates as a tribute to the beauty and majesty of the American landscape. Her words remind us of the awe-inspiring vistas that grace our country, from the amber waves of grain to the purple mountain majesties. The song reminds me of Romans 1:20, which tells us that "since the creation of the world His invisible attributes, that is, His eternal power and divine nature, have been clearly perceived, being understood by what has been made."
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24210bc91a884aee838d4e93831b22de&_e=d8nW8lO76916wrmZgef81TBH6p5B64SRuRORu6pGk_aIdQFDqziuijE6s_bqKIXuplaqtDoK6atcfotU-0Cn09BAdC-_8de995iDZRZAtcX34x8OaisXR_1BO3WHW2iquRr8MwW6IZ2CEimDw_WkwaoXNQZV9lBuandvIO7epXYXYsAyZv1VQuJ7XwLBgkYl0ggFscT_keNKxkIBEZQm6B3dpM8wNeBq1bA-YqpZ7HE0Dz_PIR6KfZVecV6yu73Wb2LJoUToLL21cqpgoAQkmEe4d_EaRK9E-pte3zCyPrs024eX-XG14FdYKXed6KSSP3rEETvkQK8VmFooDvYM0tFRKt2oDKuvoBR8TshjjEg%3D)
---
| | When you donate any amount to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_ , we will send you this music CD as a thank-you gift. Your donation will help us continue to spread the gospel message and offer hope and inspiration to people across America and around the world.

Here's the link to make your donation: **[https://ptv.org/donate/for-god-country-music-cd](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24210bc91a884aee838d4e93831b22de&_e=d8nW8lO76916wrmZgef81TBH6p5B64SRuRORu6pGk_aIdQFDqziuijE6s_bqKIXuplaqtDoK6atcfotU-0Cn09BAdC-_8de995iDZRZAtcX34x8OaisXR_1BO3WHW2iquRr8MwW6IZ2CEimDw_WkwaoXNQZV9lBuandvIO7epXYXYsAyZv1VQuJ7XwLBgkYl0ggFscT_keNKxkIBEZQm6JzLJkeOG6SsUKxJNbftgqfAQdl8sAlPwVGxkY3nkXKhCqlVvIbAvTs1BEu-GZY6_TYpmq42KSbmgFGEsUeasD6vt8YUR5o6_rXltUQNwAfueNFDaPJUsmAFX3NSYyRMR5mrdJlS5-GMulh3ZwyUWT0%3D)** Thank you for your support, and may God bless you and this great nation of ours.

Sincerely,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=24210bc91a884aee838d4e93831b22de&_t=XfNlROlu8p_Z2wB9nM7yuz9mR2gYpfkYcN7cbM8HNihQx7xwq6YTtQr6SHvpgNbKUN9WvrBPFrPO0t_d_m22VYPokKiQJQ9KdBEcpp8Tk5lrSuLLipxfN2r2gWsmQTJzs8eBLRy76FgOTSFQLFPuT1bX5PSjvK5Jdys88gMemgI%3D)

name: Zak for Congress
subject: Bumping this for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
Your feedback means a lot to Zak and the rest our campaign team.
#
Hi, Team Zak here! 👋
The other day, Zak reached out and shared our quick Issues Survey with you. We’ve started looking through the responses and noticed **we haven’t heard from you yet.**
Our campaign and our policy priorities are driven by what’s on the minds of the people Zak’s hoping to represent in Congress — but that means we have to hear directly from you!
[**If you have 30 seconds to spare, will you take a moment to tell us which issues you’d like to see our campaign focus on? We’re hoping to get 100 more responses today:**](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/take-our-issues-survey/?source=em20230604&akid=91%2E8507%2ESyWBYY)
**[Take the survey ››](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/take-our-issues-survey/?source=em20230604&akid=91%2E8507%2ESyWBYY)**
Thanks so much,
Team Zak
P.S. We’ve included Zak’s original message below, just in case you missed it.
* * *
Winning this race is about more than defeating George Santos.
**The reason I am running for Congress** is to deliver results for my hometown, my neighbors, and the everyday Americans that Santos and his MAGA cronies have been ignoring.
Unlike them, I am not here to ignore your concerns and waste time and resources pushing an extreme agenda — **I am here to listen and act.** This leads me to an important question...
[**Which issues matter most to you? My team has put together a simple, 30-second survey where you can share what’s on your mind and what you would like to see our campaign to focus on.**](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/take-our-issues-survey/?source=em20230604&akid=91%2E8507%2ESyWBYY)
**[Take the survey ››](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/take-our-issues-survey/?source=em20230604&akid=91%2E8507%2ESyWBYY)**
_Based on your responses, I will share more on how these issues affect our community and how I plan to address them when I am in Congress._
My hometown, New York’s 3rd congressional district, is not the same as it was when I was growing up.
This district has always been a place where families like mine could put down roots so their kids could grow up and prosper, with both access to the opportunity of the city and the community of the suburbs. However, **it has become too expensive and too hard to make a life here.**

Families who have been here for generations are watching their children move away. Home prices and rents are up. Local businesses are struggling with inflation. Residents aren’t sure what the future holds.
On top of that, our nation is struggling to address climate change, protect abortion rights, and provide crucial funding and support for public teachers and students.
**These are just a few of the issues on my mind and the minds of my neighbors** — both Republicans and Democrats alike. But for me to provide the kind of honest, action-driven representation we all deserve, I need to hear from as many people as possible.
[**Will you take 30 seconds to respond to our Issues Survey?**](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/take-our-issues-survey/?source=em20230604&akid=91%2E8507%2ESyWBYY)
**[Take the survey ››](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/take-our-issues-survey/?source=em20230604&akid=91%2E8507%2ESyWBYY)**
Thanks for taking the time, I really appreciate it.
— Zak
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=91%2E8507%2ESyWBYY)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=91%2E8507%2ESyWBYY)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)
PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

| Peter,

I’m sorry to bother you on a Sunday, but Republicans are already running attack ads and billboards against me, so I can’t afford to slow down for even a day if I’m going to defend my toss-up seat in Congress.

This was the most expensive House race in Pennsylvania in 2022, and you can bet Republicans are preparing to spend even more this time around in their efforts to defeat me – especially because they know flipping this seat red is their only chance to hold on to their razor-thin House majority and continue pushing their extremist anti-family, anti-worker agenda. name: =?utf-8?B?8J+Ps++4j+KAjfCfjIggTWFyayBUYWthbm8=?=
subject: I’m out and proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
Peter, I want to wish you a Happy Pride Month!

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64334714/409713784/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDUxMWVjZS0wODAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KX5ZvHwKAaWj-k0Dxmwc4Oy-bkI1bPcAfgkKY3BiSOQ=)
---
**Peter -- As you likely know, I’m a proud, openly gay man.**

But I'll be honest, navigating that identity hasn’t always been easy.

From discrimination to stigma, bullying and rejection, queer adults and young people face a host of uniquely painful obstacles. **That’s why Pride Month is such an important time for our community and our nation.**

It’s a chance to celebrate, acknowledge, and take pride in our vibrance and resilience.

It’s a time to remember how much Black trans women and queer people of color sacrificed to push our movement forward.

But it’s also a time to reaffirm our commitment to a world without hate, discrimination and inequality.

Sadly, with record numbers of anti-LGBTQ+ bills being introduced around the country, this year’s Pride is more significant than ever. I’m fighting everyday to stop queer and transphobia in Congress **but I need your help.**

[**Peter, this Pride Month, will you join me in recommitting to the fight for LGBTQ+ rights and dignity? clean_body: Peter, I want to wish you a Happy Pride Month! | = Peter -- As you likely know, I’m a proud, openly gay man. But I'll be honest, navigating that identity hasn’t always been easy. From discrimination to stigma, bullying and rejection, queer adults and young people face a host of uniquely painful obstacles. That’s why Pride Month is such an important time for our community and our nation. It’s a chance to celebrate, acknowledge, and take pride in our vibrance and resilience. It’s a time to remember how much Black trans women and queer people of color sacrificed to push our movement forward. But it’s also a time to reaffirm our commitment to a world without hate, discrimination and inequality. Sadly, with record numbers of anti-LGBTQ+ bills being introduced around the country, this year’s Pride is more significant than ever. I’m fighting everyday to stop queer and transphobia in Congress but I need your help. | Peter, this Pride Month take a moment to celebrate all that you are -- even if that means being different. With pride, Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. name: Casey HQ
subject: RE: Show your support for LGBTQ+ rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Did you see our previous email?
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=117%2E552475%2EwBeW-s)
Peter, did you see Bob’s email?
We’re kicking off Pride Month by asking folks to sign on to support the Equality Act. Now more than ever, we must protect and codify protections for our LGBTQ+ neighbors and community members.
**[Will you add your name to our petition to show your support for the Equality Act?](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-em-equality-act/?source=em20230604-1&akid=117%2E552475%2EwBeW-s)**
**[Add Your Name ››](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-em-equality-act/?source=em20230604-1&akid=117%2E552475%2EwBeW-s)**
In solidarity,
Team Casey
_\-------Forwarded Message-------_
Hi Peter,
Fifty-four years ago this month, police raided the Stonewall Inn, a refuge for the LGBTQ+ community in Manhattan. It wasn't the first time but, that night, led by Black and Latino patrons, they said, "Enough!"
Despite the threat of losing their jobs or homes because of who they were and whom they loved, they protested and sparked the modern LGBTQ+ rights movement. Millions of Americans have continued to fight to not only live authentically and love whom they love — but to simply exist.
We've seen incredible progress in the years since Stonewall, but constant efforts to turn back the clock continue. Extreme Republicans in states across the nation have passed new laws to further restrict the rights of LGBTQ+ people, while others are attempting to erase their existence entirely.
So this month, I want to encourage you to celebrate Pride with our LGBTQ+ community and show care and compassion for yourselves.
I also want to ask you to take action. We stand at a critical moment where the rights that LGBTQ+ people have won in the courts could easily be erased. And today, too many still face the threat of being evicted or denied services for who they are.
**[It's time for federal legislation to end discrimination against LGBTQ+ Americans. If you agree, will you stand with me and demand action this Pride Month?](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-em-equality-act/?source=em20230604-1&akid=117%2E552475%2EwBeW-s)**
**[Add Your Name ››](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-em-equality-act/?source=em20230604-1&akid=117%2E552475%2EwBeW-s)**
We must celebrate Pride, and we must act. I promise to keep fighting for more legislation to protect the civil rights of every American, and I'm glad to have you with me in this fight.
Thank you,
Bob Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=117%2E552475%2EwBeW-s)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=117%2E552475%2EwBeW-s)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F8r305D4RRh27qrP9YZ-l8zd1lKMN3fABnXsgz5IHG0WkkKgQEZYtfxdBTyESGMFFEzyV-1dPk8p0b1p0wV1O4qoKZ5m59Hs2-N37jtrgCW4USlthBjbAV9ZUxQIcGbOdtUBzlwN2R5phuZTCMFxSz6zv5eN5nAuHffluw9-qcc=&c=aiYSUn7FIOfpWCMJZkpDHx6OSkd-kYrVSp5ppjaunobaa8kXzlcsxA==&ch=95WTwADEezKW3WiVRvlF6UOZmO0rnirzBcwbBHfxNAZL4zZupRVxtg==)

| COME JOIN US
---
| | |
---|---
Dear Friends,

Election Day is almost here. There isn't much time left, we need your help today!

Monday, June 5, is our monthly meeting of the Chesterfield VA Tea Party. Join us at Great American Ranch in Midlothian from 7pm to 8:30pm

Friday, June 9, is the last day to request an absentee ballot by mail for the Republican Primary. You can do so, [through this link](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F8r305D4RRh27qrP9YZ-l8zd1lKMN3fABnXsgz5IHG0WkkKgQEZYtb15yxi1YvPSujqRyy0qD1oHfZetZX_Pb3WddnuXz83W2pyp5W396V-A-abAVatw29rtEjoXwoYFNPK-wtYIpVfubM8mR4Mn-eTGDkQe5GYkrziycPzwOnsJ0euivvlFfumvd4b-OjHF4bsOxgJS1c4=&c=aiYSUn7FIOfpWCMJZkpDHx6OSkd-kYrVSp5ppjaunobaa8kXzlcsxA==&ch=95WTwADEezKW3WiVRvlF6UOZmO0rnirzBcwbBHfxNAZL4zZupRVxtg==).

Early Voting will be open on Saturdays, June 10 and 17, at the local registrar's office. For Chesterfield residents, vote at 9848 Lori Rd. Chesterfield, VA 23832. For Colonial Heights residents, vote at 201 James Ave. Colonial Heights, VA 23834. And of course, on Tuesday, June 20, everyone votes at their local voting location.

Once again, this week our focus is to hit as many doors as we possibly can. I'll be out walking every day this week and I need volunteers to join me. Sign up today for an afternoon shift, [chris@chaseforva.com](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com).

Come visit our office this week to help with mail projects, phone calls, or door-to-door.

We look forward to seeing you this week.

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

name: Paul Dame - VTGOP Chairman
subject: We Need Your Voice Today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vermont Republican Party ([vtgop
body:
Your voice can make a difference

| Not interested? [Unsubscribe here](https://vtgop.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=541e81b2a652adbc7e93973f82cc3809&utm_source=vtgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230531_hd_prosecute_ad_24_99&n=1).
---
_Listen, Peter_ \-- our democracy is being tested and it's urgent that we stand up to those who abuse their power. **[Adam Schiff, former House Intelligence Chair, has been at the center of a costly and divisive investigation.](https://vtgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYgU6j7Am6gC471idLqEyVoiIFPr-vKPYf0bR4rTn40CDODYDNuY2pBy2z2ZVMNE9gnAuZ7WL9yc6Ar0ZijcWOKwgZsTh31NbwuTrFYXrzU4Ol28Hu_aAB1jTURnlcumb7lg-k8UA41-HoAuqpxWS9JZOzHWJo1cdNp14wNM3eO-glZOVco3qaid2-RRfhmerndQtVCzh2t8xywbMpMKDTzxhH5fbMheTMwEqzC0vwyYX-rh_aymDdFf8Lbhdt3kA41fTnBWrZMd2yLFZOVafINrNngFHh-PU6pFhp5ePOSrizlKBlKcue3-TzsyXaAvhBPG9mNvr1URARyrOHFKviDsR8lq8C9zWO24dBc4h94OVv7eXptvheTNrTtFyVjMojg53fcdkd36uxYMJlW6FiEwWzqi72YCl0ogIOxHd6OZO9_BP3koQqnGUSEQxQafQXL2rx5xn5Co-wALu6NSjc4w&e=541e81b2a652adbc7e93973f82cc3809&utm_source=vtgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230531_hd_prosecute_ad_24_99&n=2)** His actions have proven him unworthy of his position and it's time he is held accountable. Imagine a future where our elected officials continue to lie and manipulate for their own gain. [Where the truth is no longer respected or sought after. ](https://vtgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYgU6j7Am6gC471idLqEyVoiIFPr-vKPYf0bR4rTn40CDODYDNuY2pBy2z2ZVMNE9gnAuZ7WL9yc6Ar0ZijcWOKwgZsTh31NbwuTrFYXrzU4Ol28Hu_aAB1jTURnlcumb7lg-k8UA41-HoAuqpxWS9JZOzHWJo1cdNp14wNM3eO-glZOVco3qaid2-RRfhmerndQtVCzh2t8xywbMpMKDTzxhH5fbMheTMwEqzC0vwyYX-rh_aymDdFf8Lbhdt3kA41fTnBWrZMd2yLFZOVafINrNngFHh-PU6pFhp5ePOSrizlKBlKcue3-TzsyXaAvhBPG9mNvr1URARyrOHFKviDsR8lq8C9zWO24dBc4h94OVv7eXptvheTNrTtFyVjMojg53fcdkd36uxYMJlW6FiEwWzqi72YCl0ogIOxHd6OZOaX_FnGCAvnycxEAa93HyrQ&e=541e81b2a652adbc7e93973f82cc3809&utm_source=vtgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230531_hd_prosecute_ad_24_99&n=3) Where the trust of the American people is disregarded and abused. This is a future we cannot accept. We are asking you today to stand with us. **[Add Your Name if you agree that Adam Schiff should be prosecuted!](https://vtgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYgU6j7Am6gC471idLqEyVoiIFPr-vKPYf0bR4rTn40CDODYDNuY2pBy2z2ZVMNE9gnAuZ7WL9yc6Ar0ZijcWOKwgZsTh31NbwuTrFYXrzU4Ol28Hu_aAB1jTURnlcumb7lg-k8UA41-HoAuqpxWS9JZOzHWJo1cdNp14wNM3eO-glZOVco3qaid2-RRfhmerndQtVCzh2t8xywbMpMKDTzxhH5fbMheTMwEqzC0vwyYX-rh_aymDdFf8Lbhdt3kA41fTnBWrZMd2yLFZOVafINrNngFHh-PU6pFhp5ePOSrizlKBlKcue3-TzsyXaAvhBPG9mNvr1URARyrOHFKviDsR8lq8C9zWO24dBc4h94OVv7eXptvheTNrTtFyVjMojg53fcdkd36uxYMJlW6FiEwWzqi72YCl0ogIOxHd6OZO9_BP3koQqnGUSEQxQafQXNR9vbyZbT6CkXO2Nr7Ybgk&e=541e81b2a652adbc7e93973f82cc3809&utm_source=vtgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230531_hd_prosecute_ad_24_99&n=4)** Your support is not just vital, it is necessary for us to ensure that those in power are held accountable for their actions. |
## HOLD ADAM SCHIFF ACCOUNTABLE

We just heard some bad news: **Brian Kemp is using his multimillion-dollar political machine to try to claw back the historic gains we’ve made in the Georgia legislature.**

In 2022, we flipped seats in both the State Senate and the State House, chipping away at the Republican majority and making progress for our state.

Brian Kemp is scared to lose his control over the state legislature, so he’s coming after our most vulnerable Democratic legislators – **targeting mainly women and legislators of color!**

name: Senate Republicans
subject: $32 Trillion and climbing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Since 2020, Joe Biden and the Democrats have ignored the will of the people to pass unprecedented TRILLIONS in new spending for their liberal special interest agenda...| | | Peter, Since 2020, Joe Biden and the Democrats have ignored the will of the people to pass unprecedented TRILLIONS in new spending for their liberal special interest agenda... ...Their reckless use of taxpayer dollars and their left wing priorities are destroying our savings, crushing our stock portfolios, and wiping out the value of our earnings. Have you been following the news out of Washington, D.C. surrounding the “debt ceiling” and the debate over more massive, debt-fueled federal spending? We are finally getting to shine a spotlight on the critically important question of our country’s economic situation -- and the direction we should be taking as a nation. But the Debt Ceiling deal is just a band-aid, a short-term claw-back of some of the Democrats’ wasteful spending. To permanently change the direction of our nation – to literally SAVE our country from liberals who are spending us into a depression – We need to elect a Republican Senate Majority that can give a new Republican President and our Republican House Majority the leverage to pass meaningful reforms and spending cuts. That’s why the **National Republican Senatorial Committee** (NRSC), is [**reaching out to grassroots conservatives like you for your input on how the policies of the Biden-Democrats have affected you, your family and your community.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=164a59fe09254d738c52ae9883d922e6&_e=VUiMAbNtpzxYHSm2n0a-vA3fkepZvztAAnjih1c2bjEH0e6sku6q2t54DYE9YqSS3mWY7KTiTOYbTEKZLav1KNNsAFAhJynGTvM8p1tNM9O-wNtIJuDuXJF62XBd4s9_1icmTZ1pC8WB28x6MQYsdy6bdlBg2SgDRiTUQ1JFQWJMOQ7izGyaYzw8GH00c3mCAQoeoLObL_vSxxM9gebp5q09t33NkEATm2PD0o-CDoxjJONU0okgEZhUJkSYRfCxpYXQvA2XxNt5xUVTT8sWoDPSgeKvynkF6cKh0nyawj_fs36mT_jEx_qJZ5PtnAgm93GmcUIksrdWcKkhiC1dA2l9qivb6fIZ-wPzcLsS9uokcuz8jp6FmTt1ptANrViyraAhsIuM1VZKX1M7bjYNpTDX-1G_Cl2G_TBGatVhzljrPZ1xzwttBFyCMCPIOUWZL_kaDuVNiOhur8sCWSYCGA%3D%3D) Please **[take just a few moments right now to complete our 2023 Biden Economic Impact Survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=164a59fe09254d738c52ae9883d922e6&_e=VUiMAbNtpzxYHSm2n0a-vA3fkepZvztAAnjih1c2bjEH0e6sku6q2t54DYE9YqSS3mWY7KTiTOYbTEKZLav1KNNsAFAhJynGTvM8p1tNM9O-wNtIJuDuXJF62XBd4s9_1icmTZ1pC8WB28x6MQYsdy6bdlBg2SgDRiTUQ1JFQWJMOQ7izGyaYzw8GH00c3mCAQoeoLObL_vSxxM9gebp5q09t33NkEATm2PD0o-CDoxjJONU0okgEZhUJkSYRfCxpYXQvA2XxNt5xUVTT8sWoDPSgeKvynkF6cKh0nyawj9u8QYckfLN6_SW6KS9JM5YitYsECAjib-smm_qrCy-xrVBlNHC6uIYoLJX_vVUX3NohWSWUIJFRpJ3MuaZD0R5poKuA5FSBcjCzFCwdEpsHueSun17RfXGNXzuOQXptuUZ5yeHD9Ky79k4Dkjb9PiWgBu8bCOjepnZq32hAFdx9A%3D%3D) **and let us know where you stand on the budget, spending, taxes and the national debt. Peter, as you well know, Joe Biden and the Democrats have embarked on an unprecedented course of deficit spending when they had control of both Chambers of Congress and the White House in 2020-2022. The Democrats seized upon the confusion and urgency of 2020 Covid-19 response to try to “normalize” emergency spending, seeing it as an opportunity to shower their leftist special interests with an astounding multi-trillion dollar spending spree that brought the highest inflation rates in 40 years, wiping out years of retirement savings for millions of Americans and driving up the cost of living.
---
**[Where do YOU Stand on the Biden Democrats’ Spending and Debt? Take the Biden Economic Impact Survey and Let Us Know NOW!](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=164a59fe09254d738c52ae9883d922e6&_e=VUiMAbNtpzxYHSm2n0a-vA3fkepZvztAAnjih1c2bjEH0e6sku6q2t54DYE9YqSS3mWY7KTiTOYbTEKZLav1KNNsAFAhJynGTvM8p1tNM9O-wNtIJuDuXJF62XBd4s9_1icmTZ1pC8WB28x6MQYsdy6bdlBg2SgDRiTUQ1JFQWJMOQ7izGyaYzw8GH00c3mCAQoeoLObL_vSxxM9gebp5q09t33NkEATm2PD0o-CDoxjJONU0okgEZhUJkSYRfCxpYXQvA2XxNt5xUVTT8sWoDPSgeKvynkF6cKh0nyawj_bltupVbPBs4xcRLxrISTYi81XejBDFC4F18xR41kDTdV65mBp4QrF4We1KgoEluO6-znoqxjSFNO355r3Jg-XCdkVrASIgtw4BpR7979DU2LQs3ua6lEZUCov7o6zSmZYTf_ZiiXWjXWBm43aa-hV5m9aInv4pNJ41QfPCbpPkw%3D%3D)**
---
Peter, we need to know where conservatives stand on pivotal questions of spending and debt so we can best help our GOP Senate candidates form effective, aggressive campaign messages that rally voters behind them. By working together, we can erase the Chuck Schumer Democrats’ narrow one-seat advantage in the U.S. Senate and elect Republicans to the Senate to form a new Republican Majority that listens to the people and fights for your interests**.** That’s why we’re counting on you **[to take just a few moments to answer some critically important questions](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=164a59fe09254d738c52ae9883d922e6&_e=VUiMAbNtpzxYHSm2n0a-vA3fkepZvztAAnjih1c2bjEH0e6sku6q2t54DYE9YqSS3mWY7KTiTOYbTEKZLav1KNNsAFAhJynGTvM8p1tNM9O-wNtIJuDuXJF62XBd4s9_1icmTZ1pC8WB28x6MQYsdy6bdlBg2SgDRiTUQ1JFQWJMOQ7izGyaYzw8GH00c3mCAQoeoLObL_vSxxM9gebp5q09t33NkEATm2PD0o-CDoxjJONU0okgEZhUJkSYRfCxpYXQvA2XxNt5xUVTT8sWoDPSgeKvynkF6cKh0nyawj-DQr6DAN0AGzJ3nLAWwDIL-KYAMqGk0Drn6MT500Yr154E02eUNaGHF00qncSqHwOM-2S1tVNuBS-mHrXT3lHCiwpxYGNk_t154X5AazmCICcMZSstuF9kqm6PwnOQaTiT5gOBha4XBXFhdqM-fvuuA0nBFxUSg5Kq7gEudwy4LA%3D%3D) **\-- and provide your views on the budgetary battle. clean_body: Since 2020, Joe Biden and the Democrats have ignored the will of the people to pass unprecedented TRILLIONS in new spending for their liberal special interest agenda...| | | Peter, Since 2020, Joe Biden and the Democrats have ignored the will of the people to pass unprecedented TRILLIONS in new spending for their liberal special interest agenda... ...Their reckless use of taxpayer dollars and their left wing priorities are destroying our savings, crushing our stock portfolios, and wiping out the value of our earnings. Have you been following the news out of Washington, D.C. surrounding the “debt ceiling” and the debate over more massive, debt-fueled federal spending? We are finally getting to shine a spotlight on the critically important question of our country’s economic situation -- and the direction we should be taking as a nation. But the Debt Ceiling deal is just a band-aid, a short-term claw-back of some of the Democrats’ wasteful spending. To permanently change the direction of our nation – to literally SAVE our country from liberals who are spending us into a depression – We need to elect a Republican Senate Majority that can give a new Republican President and our Republican House Majority the leverage to pass meaningful reforms and spending cuts. That’s why the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), is Please and let us know where you stand on the budget, spending, taxes and the national debt. Peter, as you well know, Joe Biden and the Democrats have embarked on an unprecedented course of deficit spending when they had control of both Chambers of Congress and the White House in 2020-2022. The Democrats seized upon the confusion and urgency of 2020 Covid-19 response to try to “normalize” emergency spending, seeing it as an opportunity to shower their leftist special interests with an astounding multi-trillion dollar spending spree that brought the highest inflation rates in 40 years, wiping out years of retirement savings for millions of Americans and driving up the cost of living. Peter, we need to know where conservatives stand on pivotal questions of spending and debt so we can best help our GOP Senate candidates form effective, aggressive campaign messages that rally voters behind them. By working together, we can erase the Chuck Schumer Democrats’ narrow one-seat advantage in the U.S. Senate and elect Republicans to the Senate to form a new Republican Majority that listens to the people and fights for your interests. That’s why we’re counting on you \-- and provide your views on the budgetary battle. When you take your views will serve to represent concerns in your state and locality -- invaluable grassroots-level input that takes the “political” temperature where you live. So please don’t hesitate, Peter, and after you do, please go even further with your support of our fight to win a crucial new GOP Senate Majority by Thank you, Peter \-- Sincerely, Senate Republicans | | Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | Paid for by the NRSC. | | | Peter,
When I was elected Senator for Missouri, I was determined to fight for the next generation.

And in the years since I first took my oath of office, the threats social media and big tech pose to our children have only grown.

**[Stand with me today against big tech and PROTECT our children.](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=e7b2685b090047baa8148293f68a2d7f&_e=fDMRYsTcuUyniKKOycd6PR29kIP0Uu7RG4UgNCbvwjiJ3hHSUT1HWAZXW2qVRqE8MY8eBED7YV6ItK8Y3QpmJ42KzFwg_S4HCzvqhbHIsfPwH9dvwdhcOo-dH02gukBGJMc67HxxXBMR3b6dZ03wWAc7altYP1FU6QrG5NtljsJ3vMmb1VevQsrLQnOR2ZWY8Vg-Ivq-8Wr5vT_4w9EyvCa63wR31D42mHuamD79IODlJlKIKhzhWlZnSgSqI7bfVc_l-o1HugHiRmVZoRrBZ4I793t0OUfRzYTt8QN_bxgLv2NpUt5CCZBuOohxZk_nfhyVH8YtbLIXy28KN_qLQEFFng7mGbmWLWN9NK27HnM_3AmAFHpcAQbAACfsXj2T3D5VdvFgHsykiinxFE3DhA%3D%3D) **

Social media is poisoning our children. It’s addictive, it’s toxic, and it’s ruining their lives.

And the worst part is big corporations are using it to spread their far-Left lies and indoctrinate the next generation.

I will do everything in my power to hold big tech accountable for what they've done to our youth.

_But I can’t take on big tech alone._

[**Join me today and hold big tech accountable for what they’ve done to the next generation, and DEFEND our children.**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=e7b2685b090047baa8148293f68a2d7f&_e=fDMRYsTcuUyniKKOycd6PR29kIP0Uu7RG4UgNCbvwjiJ3hHSUT1HWAZXW2qVRqE8MY8eBED7YV6ItK8Y3QpmJ42KzFwg_S4HCzvqhbHIsfPwH9dvwdhcOo-dH02gukBGJMc67HxxXBMR3b6dZ03wWAc7altYP1FU6QrG5NtljsJ3vMmb1VevQsrLQnOR2ZWY8Vg-Ivq-8Wr5vT_4w9EyvCa63wR31D42mHuamD79IODlJlKIKhzhWlZnSgSqI7bfGarj_fGWb4WKLu3N2oCo4oEChjo3Jqcli0hWHI2EUL7W-iFiL7K6vCY0A4NQxlnWEuTTIfT-5ulyji4ih7E-CLk2oKWPGNZCESf-TThTiPQqxNtL3Lq4jQg2QlkvDpbL9YErLO7XJN9BT70LqRBI8A%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | | Peter, When I was elected Senator for Missouri, I was determined to fight for the next generation. And in the years since I first took my oath of office, the threats social media and big tech pose to our children have only grown. Social media is poisoning our children. It’s addictive, it’s toxic, and it’s ruining their lives. And the worst part is big corporations are using it to spread their far-Left lies and indoctrinate the next generation. I will do everything in my power to hold big tech accountable for what they've done to our youth. But I can’t take on big tech alone. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

# New York Post - Republican lawmakers demand Gov. Hochul to cut CUNY funding after 'hate-filled' commencement speech

Republican state legislators on Thursday demanded Gov. Kathy Hochul withhold taxpayer funds from any City University of New York campus that allows incendiary rhetoric at school-sponsored events as the fallout from a law graduate's infamous "hate-filled" commencement speech continues.

Senate GOP Leader Rob Ortt and a handful of other Republicans fired off the letter to Hochul after footage of CUNY law school graduate Fatima Mousa Mohammed's May 12 commencement speech went viral.

In addition to withholding taxpayer funding from CUNY schools, the GOP lawmakers called on Hochul to hold back cash from SUNY campuses, too.

"The freedom of thought, inquiry and expression at our institutions of higher education is a value that most Americans hold dear," they said.

"However, we are deeply troubled by what appears to be a misguided and potentially destructive shift toward enabling, embracing and even celebrating radical, intolerant and hate-filled political viewpoints on our CUNY and SUNY campuses.

| [** WATCH NOW ->**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8a05a82314fc416197e41cc71efd2d7c&_e=nFaSjJAdF4d46bhpuvG183hgRfPjCJiRwvuuuCmqhrqgb8bKXl0If2xNlh-iYwHJWtIRKvFqW1IwON-WcAKSa87zKTZ7gZLVvoR9E33hxH_ycJfqh-hoLk-Npb5IcdYQv8Rr_bNKq91tOZwiyYCMsdMaeSPUYO9S9L3EIKghYhKCbG_aEtezX838Wkjn83kmp-gbnHoWR_cv3ulKKLuvzI-x3Ojhhd6Njt02iy1Gveolnl6xzsYc4ji6pGd00RirgN3omvfhjN7OFHVf9h_x_wD0Z4T7BMJ0HIV08_AkydMQqNi62-8CELz0jMS8J3CPamcfVJV96ffqCitLEiEOstuJm-it91HfW70EufBoaIx2RAnRAoUQGJTliCY2hgEnnxpcvthrqU6hyfnwK0hV0g%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

I intend to elevate the debate process for the 2024 presidential primary. I have officially qualified for the debate but we cannot afford to slow down. I also want to make sure I have a front and center spot in August. We need to continue to secure unique grassroots donations to discuss how to actually FIX our country. It's going to take radical new ideas to put America back on track - and that's ok. We won't deliver national unity by standing in the proverbial "middle," singing kumbaya and compromising. It's by embracing the radicalism of the ideals that birthed America in 1776. Peter, it's a cornerstone of my campaign strategy to debate ANYONE, ANYWHERE, ANYTIME. If you are afraid to take the debate to MSNBC or CNN,how are you going to take on Xi Jinping? clean_body: We need to ramp up our on-the-ground efforts in states like Tennessee, mobilizing each and every voter to the polls on Election Day | | | | | FIRST: State Democrats won BIG in the midterms, flipping four chambers and defending each of our existing majorities. THEN: We faced a slew of special elections in battlegrounds like Pennsylvania and Virginia, where Republicans FLOODED the states with dark money to try to tear down our Democratic candidates. NOW: Reps. Jones and Pearson of the Tennessee Three are running for re-election after Republicans expelled them for protesting alongside gun safety activists – and we need the full strength of this movement supporting them right now. We need to ramp up our on-the-ground efforts in states like Tennessee, mobilizing each and every voter to the polls on Election Day – and your contribution could help power this work. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We need you on this team. name: Josh Hawley
subject: I won't back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Fellow Conservative,
When I was elected Senator for Missouri, I was determined to fight for the next generation.

And in the years since I first took my oath of office, the threats social media and big tech pose to our children have only grown.

**[Stand with me today against big tech and PROTECT our children.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=77e8b65e2cdc4a18a469aa21a290c812&_e=CICOr3TdywXlR36iDG-7i0H71xbxXDuyxxFDcJbFLp0cNKRrOeRqzJWzpi1wrtl86S5zo5qtYY1b5qDX-0HHgV1bbM4dOi-NlWR3xiFJ5hS-rShnKmuufHz2vwyHzRf2k8PDAsfL9sKbbQmSfGCM-WSVA1yNXbLuQ2bp42m8OC7WKSevECuEPCWwcICqaRDwqmBskYLX2ElbWMz4Xls9q8JA6n9fITgTy7riMR-RsgHfFVeeGCm_QVPG9CzZlaUpMRFYQbGFqKvA1ENf0Rd_u7RorByAm8b604ZkPu1WyiolV0SPeKCMln1YHgMokiKR5TtWOoh97QsRZlyP_z6c67_g1SdN5Ik9esd_LAgIcNqMkFkWnQZTNnyMi0qVBuEB0Yxur8dx4U9wr82GL3rwYnPCeJFpHw6fVpXACxtDERSLX6Fq_a7zvD6L-RVonwDY) **

[**STOP BIG TECH**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=77e8b65e2cdc4a18a469aa21a290c812&_e=CICOr3TdywXlR36iDG-7i0H71xbxXDuyxxFDcJbFLp0cNKRrOeRqzJWzpi1wrtl86S5zo5qtYY1b5qDX-0HHgV1bbM4dOi-NlWR3xiFJ5hS-rShnKmuufHz2vwyHzRf2k8PDAsfL9sKbbQmSfGCM-WSVA1yNXbLuQ2bp42m8OC7WKSevECuEPCWwcICqaRDwqmBskYLX2ElbWMz4Xls9q8JA6n9fITgTy7riMR-RsgHfFVeeGCm_QVPG9CzZlaUpMRFYQbGFqKvA1ENf0Rd_u0PvbRS9m0z_alOHGPN2JbusToIhHakU2VkgSIDReGL2J4GmEDxGeNDBbS3K8TnVLAvdA8UDC3O-01hu2FGrV0fWpHnp_Ckau8Wq122ke2HWTXDcdU2acYkPFPYk689zvICVoq1_NDwcF7wGNFJ429qLbynA2eipy3MYJRaGWcVE)
---
Social media is poisoning our children. It’s addictive, it’s toxic, and it’s ruining their lives.

And the worst part is big corporations are using it to spread their far-Left lies and indoctrinate the next generation.

I will do everything in my power to hold big tech accountable for what they've done to our youth.

_But I can’t take on big tech alone._

**[Join me today and hold big tech accountable for what they’ve done to the next generation, and DEFEND our children.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=77e8b65e2cdc4a18a469aa21a290c812&_e=CICOr3TdywXlR36iDG-7i0H71xbxXDuyxxFDcJbFLp0cNKRrOeRqzJWzpi1wrtl86S5zo5qtYY1b5qDX-0HHgV1bbM4dOi-NlWR3xiFJ5hS-rShnKmuufHz2vwyHzRf2k8PDAsfL9sKbbQmSfGCM-WSVA1yNXbLuQ2bp42m8OC7WKSevECuEPCWwcICqaRDwqmBskYLX2ElbWMz4Xls9q8JA6n9fITgTy7riMR-RsgHfFVeeGCm_QVPG9CzZlaUpMRFYQbGFqKvA1ENf0Rd_u58eh54_0rviC7hSmFlMJEjoU7a0AjxNcUb8ObMZm6tsoebDg9rfKOnvYOCBncRQXfJThNbxI7Zglb2h3prdig0WfmlKf9riz6fal2d3WQNCkVIbqNbwemCmFN3VurQdHToazmdqtpk_4H5Wfgb4mX23cZpXhdIwV9ehpx2n8gXI)**

clean_body: | | | Fellow Conservative, When I was elected Senator for Missouri, I was determined to fight for the next generation. And in the years since I first took my oath of office, the threats social media and big tech pose to our children have only grown. Social media is poisoning our children. It’s addictive, it’s toxic, and it’s ruining their lives. And the worst part is big corporations are using it to spread their far-Left lies and indoctrinate the next generation. I will do everything in my power to hold big tech accountable for what they've done to our youth. But I can’t take on big tech alone. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

body:
When asked if he'll campaign with Andy's opponent, Daniel Cameron, McConnell responded: "Of course." Did you hear what Mitch McConnell said, Peter?

When asked if he'll campaign with Andy's opponent, Daniel Cameron, McConnell responded: **"Of course."**

We can't say we're surprised – Cameron is McConnell's protégé after all. But with Cameron having the backing of McConnell and his outside spending allies, it's clear we're going to have a tough fight ahead of us.

We know Cameron, McConnell, and their allies will spend whatever it takes to defeat Andy and undo the progress we've made for Kentucky. We're counting on the support of this grassroots team to help us fight back.

clean_body: When asked if he'll campaign with Andy's opponent, Daniel Cameron, McConnell responded: "Of course." Did you hear what Mitch McConnell said, Peter? When asked if he'll campaign with Andy's opponent, Daniel Cameron, McConnell responded: "Of course." We can't say we're surprised – Cameron is McConnell's protégé after all. But with Cameron having the backing of McConnell and his outside spending allies, it's clear we're going to have a tough fight ahead of us. We know Cameron, McConnell, and their allies will spend whatever it takes to defeat Andy and undo the progress we've made for Kentucky. The sun is shining, the air is getting warmer, and Republicans are once again trying to strip seniors of the benefits they’ve worked their whole lives for.

**Here’s the crazy thing though: they aren’t even trying to be SUBTLE about it.** [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmIyhGC_EA4MtwzegfLN6NhASlODRwOh8QLwK7Z13weihm_FZ2pMOrOjyLbzNH9zkD84UF7KkviZtyTlGWGrNZ4TD8pR4CYUwhxirjUXZooTpVxbBo8MM4Ezb-59bSXqmIbNqRmAKawZfCkVw8wc70jjrBMR9I47VcJ4N-cn8q1nqGngXuQhCYtg1PG5yCxOr989MqFDafz8apRK9mct9ptBjyXdrlytq7F_scgukz55JUjGtOVPSM1u0BMNJwzU6hICQPxwZE9PrADz6ORkQeJ6s--qbmJU_kY9d4kmtTQ76Udzq-TeSTWuGSGLhzMOOInFkA-7ZdhonZE1jKI4QbjP7O8Cmb9vuBQKhEiqYU3_lSxoz5C3bhz4bVD4elQqBCicYtPyMxRcET5WSQQv6Po3ZwDfTCvAjYHeXZOtJ5U9KUwwO7FrbJC8c67kXxVOgtloM9tlyU3zQpR9V5geFd2znIDpPbMOVH_-OP0_9ZQSw/3wr/ztOb414LS5iaCfc6gDGDvg/h1/-7r8zxwvyAJ-jIrO6b82U7GVorN9axTvNoXBPeTgPHY) Earlier this week Kevin McCarthy went on Fox _(we’re not calling it news)_ and announced a “commission” to look at CUTTING SOCIAL SECURITY AND MEDICAID.

Every year, Republicans try desperately to slash Social Security and Medicare just to please their corporate overlords. They have no respect for the elderly citizens of the country they’ve sworn to protect, but plenty of respect for the dark money donors who line their pockets 🙄

Look, it’s pretty clear how we feel about McCarthy’s latest announcement, but we want to hear from you, Peter:
[LET US KNOW: Do you want to PROTECT Social Security and Medicare or CUT these all-important social programs? clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter — It’s that time of year again. The sun is shining, the air is getting warmer, and Republicans are once again trying to strip seniors of the benefits they’ve worked their whole lives for. Here’s the crazy thing though: they aren’t even trying to be SUBTLE about it. Earlier this week Kevin McCarthy went on Fox (we’re not calling it news) and announced a “commission” to look at CUTTING SOCIAL SECURITY AND MEDICAID. Every year, Republicans try desperately to slash Social Security and Medicare just to please their corporate overlords. They have no respect for the elderly citizens of the country they’ve sworn to protect, but plenty of respect for the dark money donors who line their pockets 🙄 Look, it’s pretty clear how we feel about McCarthy’s latest announcement, but we want to hear from you, Peter: | | ---|--- We look forward to reading your responses. — Survey and Polling Team @ The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . name: Team Tina
subject: Republicans’ next big move
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Sign our petition now to stand up to the GOP and against more tax cuts for the wealthy: |
#
Team, First, Republicans held our economy hostage in an attempt to cut crucial services at the expense of Americans working hard to make ends meet. We didn’t let them get away with that, so what’s their next big move? _Massive tax cuts for their rich corporate buddies._ I won’t stand by and watch MAGA Republicans play politics with people’s lives. That’s why I’m working tirelessly to ensure Republicans do not succeed in their efforts to harm working families while they openly push tax cuts for billionaires — but I need to know if you’re with me. [**If you’re sick and tired of the GOP turning their backs on everyday people to please their wealthy friends, sign our petition now to stand up to the GOP and against more tax cuts for the wealthy:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64335792/409720026/-497281501?contactdata=dDwAWfZco+8LG46HXbIC1XTSYp+Z4BTIRQ5/3L9FmC4Q68K6ykdzn4NSHjXfRBjjWROQTT3kpWWKVJxXUfJUHNtl95eLHBc9kQa8+BSZztDmuvmUG3huuiMxWa7fjnX8YToIW7tiHtnNpk1xAHeaiw==&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230604_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzdlZDM5Zi0xMjAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0wCIBxA5JJU-857JzjU58bfXvGUi7hF-FnU29Thoytg=&emci=c27a6592-1203-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=437ed39f-1203-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6227932) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64335793/409720027/-497281501?contactdata=dDwAWfZco+8LG46HXbIC1XTSYp+Z4BTIRQ5/3L9FmC4Q68K6ykdzn4NSHjXfRBjjWROQTT3kpWWKVJxXUfJUHNtl95eLHBc9kQa8+BSZztDmuvmUG3huuiMxWa7fjnX8YToIW7tiHtnNpk1xAHeaiw==&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230604_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzdlZDM5Zi0xMjAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0wCIBxA5JJU-857JzjU58bfXvGUi7hF-FnU29Thoytg=&emci=c27a6592-1203-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=437ed39f-1203-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6227932)

name: Hilary Franz
subject: Will you become a Founding Donor to my campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D) **[https://hilaryfranz
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64336036/409721811/-483919999?refcode=emonboarding3_logo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjY3NjkxMjQtMTMwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Jp1C8QySp2jmdO-3n5s7NXIIdN3aGj3l8t07BYA29w4=)
---
Peter,

I want to tell you two things about my campaign:
1. I love our great state of Washington and am committed to doing everything it takes to make it an equitable, prosperous, and green place to live for generations to come.

2. My campaign is powered by people (_just like you, Peter!_) who are able to chip in a little bit at a time.

****[Every dollar counts when you’re running a campaign like ours, which is why I am so grateful to have you on my team. And why I’m hoping you can make your first donation and become a Founding Donor on Team Franz right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64336039/409721814/-483919999?refcode=emonboarding3_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjY3NjkxMjQtMTMwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Jp1C8QySp2jmdO-3n5s7NXIIdN3aGj3l8t07BYA29w4=)**** **[RUSH A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64336042/409721819/-483919999?refcode=emonboarding3_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjY3NjkxMjQtMTMwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Jp1C8QySp2jmdO-3n5s7NXIIdN3aGj3l8t07BYA29w4=)** **I’m running for governor because I think we need urgent, creative solutions to tackling our biggest challenges. We can’t be afraid to try bold new approaches. That’s how I’ve led as commissioner of public lands, and how I’d lead as governor.**

As commissioner, I tackled our wildfire crisis head-on, securing massive investments in reforestation and wildfire preparation, and creating countless sustainable, good-paying jobs along the way.

Washington faces tough challenges, but I know that if we act boldly and we work together, we can solve them. As governor, I’ll do just that.

But I can’t do it alone – I need everyone on my grassroots team right there next to me.

[****That’s why I’m counting on you to become a Founding Donor of our campaign********, Peter********. ********Will you pitch in $5, $10, or more right now to help fund this grassroots powered movement?****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64336044/409721822/191224929?refcode=emonboarding3_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjY3NjkxMjQtMTMwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Jp1C8QySp2jmdO-3n5s7NXIIdN3aGj3l8t07BYA29w4=) **_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_** ****[Donate clean_body: | | = Peter, I want to tell you two things about my campaign: 1. I love our great state of Washington and am committed to doing everything it takes to make it an equitable, prosperous, and green place to live for generations to come. 2. My campaign is powered by people (just like you, Peter!) who are able to chip in a little bit at a time. **= = I’m running for governor because I think we need urgent, creative solutions to tackling our biggest challenges. We can’t be afraid to try bold new approaches. That’s how I’ve led as commissioner of public lands, and how I’d lead as governor. As commissioner, I tackled our wildfire crisis head-on, securing massive investments in reforestation and wildfire preparation, and creating countless sustainable, good-paying jobs along the way. Washington faces tough challenges, but I know that if we act boldly and we work together, we can solve them. As governor, I’ll do just that. But I can’t do it alone – I need everyone on my grassroots team right there next to me. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you for joining me on this adventure, Hilary | | As Commissioner of Public Lands, Hilary took bold action to defend our lands and bring people together to solve statewide issues, like increasing funding for our schools, investing in economic development, and tackling our wildfire crisis. | Peter,

We’re so excited! Every top Democrat is rallying around gun violence prevention legislation and passing an assault weapons ban → **✅ President Joe Biden
✅ Senator Chris Murphy
✅ Senator Amy Klobuchar
✅ Senator Raphael Warnock
✅ Congresswoman Lucy McBeth!** This is GREAT news! This is the support we need to pass gun safety legislation, Peter.

_But listen, we’re up against MAGA Republicans who will do anything to stop our momentum and crush any gun violence prevention legislation brought to the floor._

That’s why we’re working to do everything in our power to ensure a gun violence prevention majority in the House and Senate in 2024.

Stop Gun Violence PAC is committed to electing gun violence prevention champions at all levels of government, but the NRA is already building a massive war chest ahead of the 2024 elections, so we need your help. The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=8152%2E878179%2EO1ykHj). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=8152%2E878179%2EO1ykHj).**

name: Team Baldwin
subject: We need to keep Mike Gallagher far away from the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=367%2E35263%2EsAnrkd)
Peter — An anti-abortion extremist congressman is just one point behind Tammy in a recent poll for the Wisconsin Senate race. **Let’s be clear: We absolutely cannot let Mike Gallagher represent Wisconsin in the Senate.** He supports the most extreme national abortion ban in Congress. A ban that has no exceptions whatsoever for rape, incest, or to save the life of the mother. A ban that could even go after some contraception. Tammy has been a fierce defender of pro-choice policies in the Senate — and most Wisconsinites believe in the right to choose. Peter, Mike Gallagher is Mitch McConnell’s top choice to run against Tammy next year. If he enters the race, McConnell’s super PAC and dark money donors will give him millions of dollars to flip this seat. **[We need to build up our defenses right away to keep Mike Gallagher far away from the Senate. Chip in $10 or anything you can today to defend Tammy’s seat>>](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230604_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=367%2E35263%2EsAnrkd)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-jun23.0mNvpg&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230604_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=367%2E35263%2EsAnrkd)

name: Anna Kaplan via Blue Amp Action
subject: George Santos hires Marjorie Taylor Greene’s campaign treasurer
body:
MTG’s campaign manager?!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T070b08f5-4ae1-478d-8976-1c2841b1dd24/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | BREAKING NEWS: George Santos hires Marjorie Taylor Greene campaign treasurer [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1b3e1c63-a3cb-470f-bff1-7e3158e41481/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hi, it’s Anna Kaplan, Democratic candidate for Congress against George Santos. My opponent informed the Federal Election Commission this weekend that he has hired Marjorie Taylor Greene’s campaign treasurer as the treasurer for his own campaign. He made the change after being charged by federal prosecutors with breaking campaign finance laws, theft of public money, and wire fraud. It’s not surprising that Santos would hire Greene’s treasurer. After all, they agree on everything else -- they’re both: ❌ Opposed to women’s reproductive rights ❌ Pro-gun fanatics (Santos even wore an AR-15 lapel pin on the House floor) ❌ Anti-democracy ❌ Lying Trump supporters who claim Joe Biden didn’t win the 2020 presidential election. [George Santos is a disgrace -- I’m running to defeat him to restore honor and integrity to the U.S. Congress. Will you split a donation between Blue Amp Action and my campaign to help me win?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ab5acd0-4f7e-4c3e-9860-de2e30011e48/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for your support, Anna Kaplan

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb9a152be-31ce-49da-bab3-6c3cb5135e18/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

[**June 4, 1919:** The 19th Amendment was passed by Congress on June 4, 1919, and later ratified on August 18, 1920. [**June 4, 1937:** The world's first shopping carts were introduced by Sylvan Goldman at Humpty Dumpty grocery stores in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma. Sylvan Goldman's creation revolutionized the way people shopped and became an integral part of the retail industry.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e1748ba5a3434080a9c4ddc900a5c95b&_e=BHfoHOhUQMyjbqwzZvtG1vdB_HcF-JkW7nH3zmYdOoN6_0xKezgFp6NXOEpPTPVITkPxX8er2405jh2c7jmQ9m_V3GI7AyXHSh_9lDjOcxkrPYcJ82e4XXEOsmIQtwzMyjz8DmlbGB8n5mbD0OPHb3orJAsW_iqBUVdbLz4NgafupqjZLVvbxaC4EiIVcLS92iTz2PIlP5ZcjBkcbYbaCyAabUoH-mvTg48SUxVsndS4kflqJonN97V54lCA3fOc2fsIGWRdPuCtS6zoTOgBdS-tIkOzDmYMAD6KQ5JB_vw%3D) **Source -[americanhistory.si.edu](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e1748ba5a3434080a9c4ddc900a5c95b&_e=BHfoHOhUQMyjbqwzZvtG1vdB_HcF-JkW7nH3zmYdOoN6_0xKezgFp6NXOEpPTPVITkPxX8er2405jh2c7jmQ9m_V3GI7AyXHSh_9lDjOcxkrPYcJ82e4XXEOsmIQtwzMkcSSVl3QmDbA-uuK0cMsGQUrGmL_ZlUb2F5LM5HIIUyjWSajh5iaiRWIn2NhebfSFCjR0Vq8lYP2xPcNTqbiHyKFgybSTsgUMoH-QsihZL4Skk2Z1KX95dBel5gSNx9O_d9r8cirdRVPMi8lRqP2XxO1Zdg_Ti7u2V1JAJmrjjs%3D)**

[**June 4, 1984:** The song "Born in the USA" by Bruce Springsteen is a powerful anthem that reflects on the experiences of American veterans returning from the Vietnam War. It depicts the struggles and disillusionment faced by these veterans as they grapple with the harsh reality of post-war life. The song carries a deeper message of social and political critique, shedding light on the hardships faced by working-class Americans.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e1748ba5a3434080a9c4ddc900a5c95b&_e=BHfoHOhUQMyjbqwzZvtG1vdB_HcF-JkW7nH3zmYdOoOnqzYQGmhMknr1Cvjk7oK-z8mZ0ZMl-qO0WeSijPhqfkdsiAEcaDv0QrwR1YKnnTK7bh31WuEXzZhDTqA3rm2MJxdbjHSqhmjYJ8DJeLJZlqv04OiactBGhxjHrP6WF6Lxgp5yqSPje3Lj01vmR-clr8P8IKdDiDPIpwAS8yTc3Fn5JCq030QoG44mYseOary94h9NupQgzbGvk4paDRL889R2GruX94Yl1wBrsvzYS_43D_93OfbLismSRD-aBts%3D) **Source -[songfacts.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e1748ba5a3434080a9c4ddc900a5c95b&_e=BHfoHOhUQMyjbqwzZvtG1vdB_HcF-JkW7nH3zmYdOoOnqzYQGmhMknr1Cvjk7oK-z8mZ0ZMl-qO0WeSijPhqfkdsiAEcaDv0QrwR1YKnnTK7bh31WuEXzZhDTqA3rm2MJxdbjHSqhmjYJ8DJeLJZljmthrl4FoOzlU1P2jANvWlQQKAbcDjUJQVnc0SSOSwH5-9pnwXc4fDbqgDTikyoQnT-z2ZGyZVHCIirkVlUcFIymbhokBcw34MHJnlXYSv7pPFY_XUt4PMVQVKb7i9rYZQ5xut2g960-CHbD82BBx4%3D)[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e1748ba5a3434080a9c4ddc900a5c95b&_e=BHfoHOhUQMyjbqwzZvtG1onnB72trj2fqrViLXD8pLYwjXI9nNrgejRFcHAYcSy-ed4BsebScEo2F_naOW1dqHoL7odBePYaQJou6ZEhW3MJjrDkIrbn17JMGwz_hefmcs0EqfI9OhRsQ5CegBnF8rG0DbcS0RDFvFcU1S_R0fmVDizjOekqBqyesbk2v6FVLtAOfb5IHsm5FR80YnWHoTvR4lNrCRYQ-QrVYJD4Ip1Y4wNfUdl6RJJ7UtYCLVIk)**

clean_body: Is there ANYTHING we can say to convince you to make your first donation to Adam Frisch’s campaign against Lauren Boebert before midnight tonight? Hello, = What if we told you that in 2022 – after a recount – Adam lost to Boebert by just 546 votes? What if we told you that it was the closest race in the entire country? What if we told you that after Adam announced he was running again, every political pundit said that Adam absolutely can defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024? What if we told you that the first poll shows another TIED race – 45% to 45%? And what if we told you that Adam out-raised Boebert last quarter, but our fundraising has started to slow down this month? We know that $5 might not seem like much against Lauren Boebert’s millions from corporate PACs and special interests. But when tens of thousands of grassroots donors like you all chip in, we have something far stronger Boebert’s Super PACs. We’ve set a goal to raise another $75,000 before our next fundraising deadline to defeat Lauren Boebert, and right now we’re still short. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Your donation now – no matter the amount – means a lot. body:
Sorry to bother you, friend – but your insight is so important that I had to reach out one more time before we finalize our next steps for June.
---
**Will you take just one minute to complete our new 2023 Priorities Survey? I had my team create this personalized link just for you:[https://surveys.signforgood.com/brown-2023-june-prio/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64337269/409727844/-176176352?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk242-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmJmNTZlNS0yMzAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I4cJgII6uoz7cyOypOfxChzEc-JyVjX72h5-T_rpRpI=&emci=f8ddc299-ffff-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5bbf56e5-2303-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)**
In solidarity,
Sherrod
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Sen. Brown**
Date: Sat, June 3, 2023
Subject: I want to hear from you
| | |
---
Friend, if there’s one thing you should know about me, it’s this:
I’ve dedicated my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the belief that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are or what kind of work you do. For me, this means going to bat for working families in Ohio and across the country. It means making sure _your_ __ voice is heard in the halls of Congress and on the Senate floor.
I’m proud of the progress we’ve made in the last couple of years, including passing a historic infrastructure bill and standing up for workers’ rights. **But we’ve still got a long way to go, so as we chart out our next steps, I’m asking folks like you to weigh in.**
I’ve always said the best ideas don’t come from Washington – they come from the people we serve. In an ideal world, I’d get to sit down and chat with each and every member of this grassroots team to find out which issues are keeping you up at night, what makes you hopeful about our future, and what you want to see Democrats accomplish next. But since I can only be in one place at a time, our 2023 Priorities Survey is the next best thing:
[**So please, friend, will you take just a moment now to share your thoughts with me in our new priorities survey? Your unique perspective is critical to helping us defend this seat, keep the Senate blue, and continue making progress for working families.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64337270/409727845/-176176352?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk242-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmJmNTZlNS0yMzAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I4cJgII6uoz7cyOypOfxChzEc-JyVjX72h5-T_rpRpI=&emci=f8ddc299-ffff-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5bbf56e5-2303-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)
| | [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64337271/409727846/-176176352?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk242-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmJmNTZlNS0yMzAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I4cJgII6uoz7cyOypOfxChzEc-JyVjX72h5-T_rpRpI=&emci=f8ddc299-ffff-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5bbf56e5-2303-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)
---
Thank you for taking the time. I’m looking forward to reading what you have to say.

With gratitude,

Sherrod Brown
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Sherrod Brown: **Friend – thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement and for sharing our commitment to the Dignity of Work.

Fighting for workers means building an economy that prioritizes the needs of workers over tax breaks for billionaires and corporations. No matter who you are or what kind of work you do, I promise to fight for you. But I need your help: Experts say I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection and Senate control could come down to Ohio. The only way we can defend this critical seat is with grassroots contributions from supporters like you.

**[If you're with me in this fight, please chip in any amount today to win in Ohio and defend our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64337272/409727847/-1256022338?code=jtk242-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmJmNTZlNS0yMzAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I4cJgII6uoz7cyOypOfxChzEc-JyVjX72h5-T_rpRpI=)**

Thank you!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64337273/409727848/-1256022338?code=jtk242-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmJmNTZlNS0yMzAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I4cJgII6uoz7cyOypOfxChzEc-JyVjX72h5-T_rpRpI=)

name: PA on the line (via VPP)
subject: If Bob Casey sinks in the polls, it’s GAME OVER
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
And if we lose Senators like Casey, our Senate majority will crumble
| There are three things you need to know ASAP about our fight to save our Senate majority:

1️⃣ **We’re defending 23 Senate seats** – and if we lose a single one, our Senate majority will collapse!

2️⃣ **Senator Bob Casey is one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for re-election.** _If he starts slipping in the polls, it’s GAME OVER!_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46833?t=6&akid=8138%2E878179%2EN8JL6b) 3️⃣ **We’re launching our SWING STATE SENATE FUND** to defend Democrats like Bob Casey and keep the Senate out of MAGA Mitch McConnell’s hands!

[States like Pennsylvania are critical to saving our Senate majority – and if we fall behind now, the MAGA machine will run right over us. Please, don’t let tonight’s deadline pass by: Rush $7 to keep Democrats like Bob Casey soaring ahead! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46833?t=7&akid=8138%2E878179%2EN8JL6b) **SWING STATE SENATE FUND: $7,000 || DEADLINE: 11:59 PM** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46834?t=8&akid=8138%2E878179%2EN8JL6b)

We need you with us,

_– VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=8138%2E878179%2EN8JL6b). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=8138%2E878179%2EN8JL6b).**

But as one of the President’s biggest supporters, we were surprised you had yet to accept your membership, Friend. | When you enroll as a Trump Gold Cardholder, not only will you receive your very own PERSONALIZED Gold Card, but your card will display an active membership since 2022 , so that you’ll always be remembered as one of our 2024 campaign’s FOUNDING MEMBERS. | | TRUMP GOLD CARD MEMBERSHIP Member: dpwillis67@gmail.com Membership #: 19377-1007 Status: PENDING | Thank you, Trump 2024 Membership Services Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: 2 Weeks Until Election Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Please chip in $100 today
| | | |
---
| |
---
| Friend Election Day is in just 2 weeks. And I need you. We need about $10k to get though the week.
We will win this if you help today.
DONATE $100 or more now
---
|
---
| |
---

Friend God is my provider. He has provided every need for my campaign through generous people like you.
On Saturday, before we left with our team to go door knocking I mentioned to them that we were down to our last $30 after paying for commercials and mailers. And we have 2 weeks to go. But, I knew God would provide. And he did.
We knocked on the door of a supporter I had never met before. I was standing there talking to the husband when the wife drove up. She couldn't believe I was knocking on her door. She proceeded to tell me she was a huge supporter who had been following my work for years on social media and instructed her husband to write me a check.
He wrote me a check for $1,000. This kind act brought me to tears. Our God provides and I am forever grateful to each of you who have already donated. Most families can't give $1,000. But please pray about giving your best donation in these final days.
Campaigns are so incredibly expensive and I rely on your generous donations to fund my campaign. You've been there every step of the way. We have more expenses coming up this week.
Would you please chip in again?
I see the names of those who have donated in real time and I want to thank you for answering the sincere call to donate. Many of you give faithfully. Thank you.
I also know who those who for whatever reason haven't donated. Don't feel guilty. I know many of you want to give but are going through tough times. But if you can give, please do. Please give sacrificially. If not you, then who?
Remember. I don't take money from PACS or lobbyists. So, I'm counting on you. If you give, we win.
Will you please do your part so I can continue to serve you?
For God and country,
---
|
---

---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
|

[**TEXT RON TO 94398**](sms:94398?&body=RON)
Governor Ron DeSantis has never backed down from a tough fight. He's a native Floridian with blue-collar roots, played baseball at Yale, and graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. He served in the Navy as a JAG officer in Iraq, worked as a federal prosecutor, and worked in the halls of Congress. name: KatiePorter.com
subject: High prices remain: it doesn't have to stay like this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=24183%2E3422442%2ExXN1z8)
Derek, did you see Katie's tweet from earlier this week? ⬇️
[](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/20230604-em-hold-big-corporations-responsible-for-price-gouging/?source=EMAI04_1_INF_20230604_V1_F&akid=24183%2E3422442%2ExXN1z8)
Prices remain high because corporations are using inflation and past supply chain issues as justification to make you pay more while they rake in record profits. **In 2022, corporate profit margins hit their highest level since 1950.**
Allowing a handful of mega corporations to monopolize all sorts of markets is bad for consumers. It means less choice and higher prices, and it squeezes small local businesses.
**Katie is leading the fight to call out corporate greed and hold CEOs accountable.[ Can you sign on to our petition to show your support for holding big corporations accountable for price gouging?**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/20230604-em-hold-big-corporations-responsible-for-price-gouging/?source=EMAI04_1_INF_20230604_V1_F&t=2&akid=24183%2E3422442%2ExXN1z8)

name: Jon Tester
subject: I hate asking you for money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| Hey Peter,

I was back on the farm recently with Sharla, and we spent the days seeding peas and pulling 16-hour days in the fields.

I love being a farmer. I knew I wanted to take over my family’s farm since I was eight years old. It gets my hands dirty and keeps me grounded. And reminds me why I fight so hard for Montana’s families.

But it also means I have a lot less time to fundraise than all of my colleagues. And trust me, I hate asking for money. I know how hard you work for every dollar—plus I’d rather spend my time out on the tractor anyway.

**The truth is, this race will be the most expensive Senate election in Montana’s history. Outside groups will pour upwards of $100 million into our state to distort my record and mislead voters.**

All this to say, we really do need money to combat attacks like that. So, here’s the part where I ask:

[**June is off to a way slower start than we predicted, and we’re at risk of falling short of our weekly goal. Could pitch in a split donation of any amount to get us back on track? It would mean a lot to me. »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64337944/409730749/-1928029672?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230604_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgxYTZmOWM3LTJmMDMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SNas15N0Vnnvz95nMz_vnoYj5M8Ujv-X-40f7XBbiYY=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64337950/409730755/-1928029672?amount=10&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20230604_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgxYTZmOWM3LTJmMDMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SNas15N0Vnnvz95nMz_vnoYj5M8Ujv-X-40f7XBbiYY=)

clean_body: | Hey Peter, I was back on the farm recently with Sharla, and we spent the days seeding peas and pulling 16-hour days in the fields. I love being a farmer. I knew I wanted to take over my family’s farm since I was eight years old. It gets my hands dirty and keeps me grounded. And reminds me why I fight so hard for Montana’s families. But it also means I have a lot less time to fundraise than all of my colleagues. And trust me, I hate asking for money. I know how hard you work for every dollar—plus I’d rather spend my time out on the tractor anyway. The truth is, this race will be the most expensive Senate election in Montana’s history. Outside groups will pour upwards of $100 million into our state to distort my record and mislead voters. All this to say, we really do need money to combat attacks like that.
